Friend,
By all accounts, Biden’s re-election campaign is FAILING.
His grassroots fundraising numbers are so weak that his campaign has refused to report them for over a month. _Instead, he relies solely on his big-money special interest donors to line his coffers._
His polling numbers are just sad. _His approval rating has hit a historic low of 36% while we continue to CRUSH him by at least 7 points in poll after poll._
**But despite all that, Crooked Joe knows his billionaire megadonors could _still _manage to BUY him a second term given one scenario...**
**Earlier this year, a sinister man by the name of George Soros went on record to say that he wants a LONG, DRAWN-OUT Republican primary that leaves our Party DIVIDED.**
And if we don’t wrap up the primary as quickly as possible, we’ll be giving Biden and Soros exactly what they want – a lifeline.
Which is why I’m counting on the support of loyal MAGA patriots like YOU to help us post our biggest fundraising month to date and leave NO DOUBT that the entire Republican Party is **UNITED** behind Trump 2024.
_(But if you’re struggling right now due to Biden’s moronic and disastrous policies, please do not read any further, and don’t even think about donating. You and your family always come FIRST. And don't worry, when we win back the White House, the greatest economy in history will come ROARING back!)_

Our official DLCC members are the heart of our operation – we can’t secure wins for state Democrats across the country without the help from our consistent, dedicated supporters. You are what makes all of this work possible. We’re asking you to activate your membership today because state Democrats are facing a slew of must-win special elections in key states – and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November! President Biden and President Obama know that electing Democratic leaders in statehouses across the country is critical to building a better future in states like yours.That’s why we rely on grassroots supporters like you to own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe against their Republican opponents. As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight to defeat extremist state Republicans, expand Democratic power at the state level, and help ensure we elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. But that only happens when folks like you step up and chip in what they can. clean_body: VA is now providing more care and more benefits to more Veterans | Defending America at Home and Abroad | | | | | VA is now providing more care and more benefits to more Veterans than ever before, and in order to continue serving Veterans at this historic rate, we are hiring additional staff across the country. We are also implementing new hiring and retention authorities to grow and maintain a diverse, talented workforce that is focused on one core mission: deliver world-class care and benefits to Veterans, their families, caregivers and survivors. | | | | More Stories | | | | VA releases new Workforce Dashboard | | For Memorial Day, VA honors the sacrifices of those who served | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | American Defense News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
Asking for money is our least favorite part of the job, especially when we are ready for a 3-day weekend. Our May fundraising deadline is just a few days away and with many people enjoying their time off and their time away from their inbox, we are seriously behind our end of the month goal.
If we fall short in the month of May, it could put us behind at this crucial time when we need to help Democratic women like Katie Porter build the infrastructure they need to win.
Because it is a 3-day weekend , we received a triple match offer from one of our amazing donors and with your help, we can close the gap and maybe even take some time off this weekend.
Please help us stay out of your inbox by chipping in what you can today! Will you rush a donation before our triple match offer expires? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
We are counting on Democrats like you to power our movement because now more than ever we need to elect women to the US Senate who know first-hand what American families are up against. This is the time to pass legislation like gun control, paid leave and universal free preschool. Moms like Katie get it and with your help, we can fight for the change American families long deserved.
Will you join us and help send a champion for working families to the US Senate? It's a 3-day weekend, so what do you say, Peter? Are you ready to triple your impact? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]

name: Jamaal Bowman
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene’s racist + dangerous words
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| Hey Peter, it’s Congressman Jamaal Bowman. I just want to make one thing clear:

In her press conference in front of countless reporters Marjorie Taylor Greene said something incredibly dangerous — calling me “aggressive” and saying she feels “threatened” by me.

**Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters.** It echoes what happened with Emmett Till and with Mike Brown, and unfortunately this country has a history of characterizing Black men who are outspoken, who stand their ground, or who push back as being “threatening” or “intimidating.”

Marjorie Taylor Greene is a white supremacist. Describing somebody’s beliefs – which are clear for everybody to see — isn’t “like calling a person of color the n word,” no matter what false equivalencies she might draw.

This behavior is dangerous and reckless — but we can’t let it stop our movement for progressive change.

[**We must ALL continue to speak truth to power, and I’ll keep standing up to right-wing extremists. If you’re with me, will you split a donation between UNITEDemocrats and my campaign today? »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63895430/408345522/2064347030?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230526_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViMGM3OTY2LTM2ZmMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qHSJDzmcr3FE2IZlaHlX3xBL1qCHxCLl1q318hsUTOQ=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jamaal Bowman and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63895436/408345528/2064347030?amount=10&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20230526_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViMGM3OTY2LTM2ZmMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qHSJDzmcr3FE2IZlaHlX3xBL1qCHxCLl1q318hsUTOQ=)

clean_body: | Hey Peter, it’s Congressman Jamaal Bowman. I just want to make one thing clear: In her press conference in front of countless reporters Marjorie Taylor Greene said something incredibly dangerous — calling me “aggressive” and saying she feels “threatened” by me. Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters. It echoes what happened with Emmett Till and with Mike Brown, and unfortunately this country has a history of characterizing Black men who are outspoken, who stand their ground, or who push back as being “threatening” or “intimidating.” Marjorie Taylor Greene is a white supremacist. Describing somebody’s beliefs – which are clear for everybody to see — isn’t “like calling a person of color the n word,” no matter what false equivalencies she might draw. This behavior is dangerous and reckless — but we can’t let it stop our movement for progressive change. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jamaal Bowman and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you for being on our side in this fight. body:
Peter, As if Bud Light's recent parody of an ad campaign wasn't bad enough, it's almost as if Target wanted to out-woke all o
|

| Peter, As if Bud Light's recent parody of an ad campaign wasn't bad enough, **it's almost as if Target wanted to out-woke all of the other brands and out-disgust anyone with common sense.**
The retail giant released a transgender-themed clothing line with pieces designed for CHILDREN, which included:
* LGBT clothing for kids and infants
* Chest binders for girls
* "Tuck friendly" swimwear

Target also announced a partnership with Abprallen, an LGBTQ clothing company run by a woman who now calls herself a “gay trans man.” The brand features products with ridiculous taglines like "Satan Respects Pronouns". **On top of pushing gender mutilation on children, Target has aligned itself with a company that celebrates Satanism and demonizes families, children, and members of the community with faith.**
## _**But as with Bud Light's woke advertising failure****, the joke ended up on them.**_
## **Target has lost $9 BILLION (yes, with a B) in market value as a direct result of its disgusting woke antics.**
---
| The sheer panic of losing a whopping 12% of its market capitalization did cause the retailer to remove some items from stores and make some changes to its merchandise. Our voices are being heard and the pressure on corporate wokeness continues! There's a big chance you've heard of the Common Sense Club by now—we are an organization of like-minded Americans fighting to restore common sense to New Jersey and beyond. Needless to say, it's common sense that corporate wokism is a complete joke, and retailers who embrace it will lose billions.

* Invitations to exclusive member-only events **which you can participate in to make sure conservative voices are heard loud and clear**
* Networking with like-minded individuals **so you can meet and befriend fellow patriots who are fighting the good fight alongside you**

* VIP access to our annual gala, where you can rub shoulders with key community leaders and decision-makers **who are fighting tirelessly to restore common sense to our nation and end wokism for good**

[**Claim your membership here now.**](https://xtz223.keap-link014.com/v2/click/b32fda0876bad2b8cd96244ff6764cc2/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnC11TRJvIRFidYg6x6ZTbum6rFP2gf-9tcJTQdd3nnmGdx5AKLmkOIMQrnRnzAMLNKZCCZQUVZJ4-poyf-R6rgWFkKeZrs4KwsfX5R7oYtfxAwvoptAg69UkSuLlbDuPl4khFdfmxl-eYOz0muliEs-hbX96sRQ0vRh1DSHpM3aFMmFK0UYXhs-JVB3adtM0w2MlJOW4F4ecmMO8YVqVdhcOsOSiGOyMjyuFMvv8IsHb29o-AZu8Z1M=) I can't stress enough how corporations like Target have no place to rewrite history and deny DNA and Biology. They have no place to normalize gender mutilation in advertising campaigns that are meant to confuse and damage the younger generations. Coming together will ensure that going woke will never benefit any corporation's bottom line. Together we will win this fight. Bill

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Biden Corruption Secrets
body:
Memorial Day – Why We Fight!

[INSIDE JW]

Judicial Watch Sues National Archives for Biden Family Business
Records

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63529&L=29596&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmlkZW9zL21vcmUtYmlkZW4tY29ycnVwdGlvbi1zZWNyZXRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=1e25ce5b63f33ac40766bef51ecc62ea648bf15a1271eea3084e88e26da5f133]

Joe Biden is hiding his shady business dealings abroad behind his
National Archives. So we’ve filed a Freedom of Information Act
(FOIA) suit against the agency for Biden family’s records and
communications regarding travel and finance transactions, as well as
communications between the Bidens and several known business
associates (_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. National Archives_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63529&L=29587&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtbmF0aW9uYWwtYXJjaGl2ZXMtYmlkZW4tZmFtaWx5LWNvbXBsYWludC0wMTQzMi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=804670007417aaa30f3a612bee5601c40e5041b71fe0feb0d88fefe7d6eb8ad6]
(No. 1:23-cv-01432).

We had to sue because the National Archives has yet to produce any
records in response to our February 2023 FOIA request for:

Records and/or communications from former Vice President Joseph R.
Biden regarding:

* Any communication with Robert Hunter Biden, James Brian Biden,
Francis William “Frank” Biden or Sara Jones Biden between January
20, 2009, and January 20, 2017, regarding:

> a) any international or domestic travel
> b) any international or domestic financial activity, including but
> not limited to banking and financial institutions, overseas bank
> accounts, credit card companies, bills, invoices, fees, agreements,
> financial arrangements, payments, wire transfers, contracts,
> QuickBooks, financial spreadsheets, business proposals, office or
> residential leases, rent payments, real estate transactions

* Any communication with Robert Hunter Bid en, James Brian Biden,
Francis William "Frank" Biden or Sara Jones Biden between January 20,
2009, and January 20, 2017, regarding the following individuals or
companies:

> a) Devon Archer;
> b) JiaQi Bao;
> c) Tony Bobulinski;
> d) Jeffrey Cooper;
> e) Catherine Dodge;
> f) Gongwen Dong;
> g) James Gilliar;
> h) Patrick Ho Chi-ping;
> i) Vuk Jeremie;
> j) Zang Jianjun;
> k) Ye Jianming;
> l) Jonathan Li;
> m) Joan Mayer or Joan Peugh;
> n) Francis Person;
> o) Vadim Pozharskyi;
> p) Eric Schwerin;
> q) Robert Walker;
> r) Mervyn Yan;
> s) Nita Madhav;
> t) Maiy Guttieri
> u) Any Metabiota entity or company;
> v) Any Rosemont Seneca entity or company;
> w) Any Hudson West entity or company;
> x) Any Owasco entity or company;
> y) Any Bohai Harvest entity or company;
> z) Skaneateles LLC;
> aa) Eudora Global LLC;
> bb) Coldharbour Capital LLC;
> cc) Lion Hall Group LLC;
> dd) Any CEFC entity or company; and
> ee) Burisma.

* Any communication, between January 20, 2009, and January 20, 2017,
between or among former Vice President Joseph R. Biden and the
individuals or entities set forth in Items 2(a)-(ee) above.
* All records and documents including paper or electronic calendars
such as (Outlook or Gmail) regarding former Vice President Joseph R.
Biden and the individuals or entities set forth in Items 2(a)-(ee)
above.

We explained to the court that in a March letter the National
Archives acknowledged receiving the FOIA request, assigned it a case
number and claimed it had identified “approximately 1,567 emails,
2,501 electronic files, and 445 pages of potentially responsive
records that must be processed in order to respond to your request.”

The Archives also stated that, according to the Code of Federal
Regulations
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63529&L=29588&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZWNmci5nb3YvY3VycmVudC90aXRsZS0zNi9jaGFwdGVyLVhJSS9zdWJjaGFwdGVyLUUvcGFydC0xMjcwL3N1YnBhcnQtRC9zZWN0aW9uLTEyNzAuNDY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=4ab8e190ec7c094dcb247146272f45fb500daa358cdf6de06d89011b38ba2e3d],
it is required to “notify representatives of the former President
and the incumbent President and the former Vice President prior to the
release of any Vice Presidential records.” The letter did not say
when or even whether any such notice had been given or would be given.
On information and belief, no such notice has been given.

On May 10, House Committee on Oversight and Accountability Chairman
James Comer (R-KY.) released
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63529&L=29589&F=T&&hash=ab1007c621d7c596d4306f70ba6cab6f597c49fd3ee0c56fa9f320257dd2e384]
financial records of the Biden family’s business dealings showing
that millions of dollars flowed from China and other foreign sources
through a labyrinth of Biden family companies:

[The] financial records reveal the Biden family and associates’
complicated network of companies set up during Joe Biden’s vice
presidency and the millions the Bidens received from foreign sources.
The financial records also reveal how the Bidens used complicated
transactions to hide payments from foreign nationals, including
CCP-linked associates, and provide clear indications of
influence-peddling schemes during then-Vice President Biden’s
tenure.

Clearly, the Biden National Archives agency is stonewalling the
release of thousands of records that could go to the heart of Biden
family corruption allegations.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES TREASURY DEPARTMENT FOR COMMUNICATIONS WITH FAILED
BANKS

We’re going to court to uncover the details of Biden administration
actions that could cost billions of dollars.

Your Judicial Watch filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) suit
against the U.S. Department of the Treasury for all communications
between Treasury components Financial Stability Oversight Council
(FSOC) and the Office of Financial Research (OFR) and the failed
Silicon Valley and Signature banks (_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department
of the Treasury_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63529&L=29581&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdHJlYXN1cnktc2lsaWNvbi12YWxsZXktYmFuay1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDEzOTcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=d15e0ce0a44dc09573e0f42e89310139808b5f4fc791f5cfee6b033e7a73f839]
(No. 1:23-cv-01397)).

Both banks were forced into failure by the Biden administration in
March.

The Biden administration’s actions in attempting to resolve the bank
failures will cost tens of billions of dollars, the Federal Deposit
Insurance Corporation (FDIC) estimated
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63529&L=29582&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvYmlkZW4tcHJlc2lkZWQtdGhyZWUtZm91ci13b3JzdC1iYW5rLWZhaWx1cmVzLXVzLWhpc3Rvcnk/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=38d92c38d1fcf0bdc23d88ef84a125bc36015a7edacc5cf91d6a134e86393f86].

We sued after Treasury failed to respond to March 14, 2023, FOIA
requests.

The Financial Stability Oversight Council
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63529&L=29583&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ob21lLnRyZWFzdXJ5Lmdvdi9wb2xpY3ktaXNzdWVzL2ZpbmFuY2lhbC1tYXJrZXRzLWZpbmFuY2lhbC1pbnN0aXR1dGlvbnMtYW5kLWZpc2NhbC1zZXJ2aWNlL2Zzb2M/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=df4447061d02e5badc5cf42106a5f635a949b17641d5a1708bb7dbba6df5307b],
established by Title I of the Dodd–Frank Wall Street Reform and
Consumer Protection Act and signed into law by President Barack Obama
on July 21, 2010, is tasked with monitoring the stability of the U.S.
financial system. However, former Judicial Watch client Vern McKinley
and I previously warned
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63529&L=29584&F=T&&hash=95c703f467c72ebc2c213fe9f0d3c0d822c340e21b8b313a5b6abadc82c8c541],
“[T]he Financial Stability Oversight Council clearly is incapable of
providing either financial stability or oversight. It should be
eliminated.”

(On April 26, House Financial Services Committee Chairman Patrick
McHenry, along with Oversight and Investigations Subcommittee Chairman
Bill Huizenga, and Financial Institutions and Monetary Policy
Subcommittee Chairman Andy Barr sent a letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63529&L=29585&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9maW5hbmNpYWxzZXJ2aWNlcy5ob3VzZS5nb3YvdXBsb2FkZWRmaWxlcy8yMDIzLjA0LjI2X2xldHRlcl90b190cmVhc3VyeV9zZWNyZXRhcnkucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2b4811d3e50f2b9759163eeb02381647c3c878b9066bca3c3b80c65abd9122f2]
to Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen in her capacity as Chair of the
Oversight Council, demanding it provide information previously
requested more than a month prior from its meetings immediately
following the collapse of Silicon Valley Bank.)

The Office of Financial Research was created, according to its website
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63529&L=29586&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmluYW5jaWFscmVzZWFyY2guZ292Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=a3fb0b54dbfec9f265b5a405cb9702b496fd9d4d0ce3176588ae5655fb6904b6],
to promote “financial
stability by delivering high-quality financial data, standards and
analysis” in support of the FSOC and its member agencies.

In its 2022 report to Congress, the Office of Financial Research
states that it found “overall threats to U.S. financial stability
were elevated compared to last year. The 2022 report discussed how the
systemic risk landscape was elevated as financial institutions faced
more uncertainty from rising inflation, tight credit conditions, and
the geopolitical landscape.”

Massive bank failures induced by the Biden administration have rocked
our economic system. The American people deserve to know the details
of the costly interventions and government takeovers of Silicon Valley
and Signature Banks.

That we had to sue for basic information about this banking crisis
suggests the Biden administration has something to hide.

CRIMES

MEMORIAL DAY – WHY WE FIGHT

Memorial Day helps our nation focus on the ultimate sacrifice of
untold numbers of fellow Americans – Americans who gave their lives
to preserve and defend our God-given freedoms and our constitutional
republic.

As we honor those heroes next week, I’d like to draw your attention
again to the Veterans Day speech
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63529&L=7909&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudmEuZ292L29wYS92ZXRzZGF5L3NwZWFrZXJzLzE5ODVyZW1hcmtzLmFzcD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=bae5d92113148d9814314288e5f49e982e0e8332fe9f1b22ef2ca9b525913680]
given in
1985 by then-President Ronald Reagan. Much of his speech applies to
Memorial Day, especially this portion, which remains timely today:

> And the living have a responsibility to remember the conditions that
> led to the wars in which our heroes died. Perhaps we can start by
> remembering this: that all of those who died for us and our country
> were, in one way or another, victims of a peace process that failed;
> victims of a decision to forget certain things; to forget, for
> instance, that the surest way to keep a peace going is to stay
> strong.
>
> Weakness, after all, is a temptation — it tempts the pugnacious to
> assert themselves — but strength is a declaration that cannot be
> misunderstood. Strength is a condition that declares actions have
> consequences. Strength is a prudent warning to the belligerent that
> aggression need not go unanswered.
>
> Peace fails when we forget what we stand for. It fails when we
> forget that our Republic is based on firm principles, principles
> that have real meaning, that with them, we are the last, best hope
> of man on Earth; without them, we’re little more than the crust of
> a continent. Peace also fails when we forget to bring to the
> bargaining table God’s first intellectual gift to man: common
> sense. Common sense gives us a realistic knowledge of human beings
> and how they think, how they live in the world, what motivates them.
> Common sense tells us that man has magic in him, but also clay.
> Common sense can tell the difference between right and wrong. Common
> sense forgives error, but it always recognizes it to be error first.
>
> We endanger the peace and confuse all issues when we obscure the
> truth; when we refuse to name an act for what it is; when we refuse
> to see the obvious and seek safety in Almighty. Peace is only
> maintained and won by those who have clear eyes and brave minds.
>
> I’d like to think many Americans have “clear eyes and brave
> minds” and these patriots desire the same qualities in our
> political and judicial leaders. It certainly reflects Judicial
> Watch’s modest approach to our efforts.
Have a safe and blessed Memorial Day!

Until next week...

clean_body: Memorial Day – Why We Fight! [INSIDE JW] Judicial Watch Sues National Archives for Biden Family Business Records [] Joe Biden is hiding his shady business dealings abroad behind his National Archives. So we’ve filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) suit against the agency for Biden family’s records and communications regarding travel and finance transactions, as well as communications between the Bidens and several known business associates (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. National Archives [] (No. 1:23-cv-01432). We had to sue because the National Archives has yet to produce any records in response to our February 2023 FOIA request for: Records and/or communications from former Vice President Joseph R. Biden regarding: Any communication with Robert Hunter Biden, James Brian Biden, Francis William “Frank” Biden or Sara Jones Biden between January 20, 2009, and January 20, 2017, regarding: a) any international or domestic travel b) any international or domestic financial activity, including but not limited to banking and financial institutions, overseas bank accounts, credit card companies, bills, invoices, fees, agreements, financial arrangements, payments, wire transfers, contracts, QuickBooks, financial spreadsheets, business proposals, office or residential leases, rent payments, real estate transactions Any communication with Robert Hunter Bid en, James Brian Biden, Francis William "Frank" Biden or Sara Jones Biden between January 20, 2009, and January 20, 2017, regarding the following individuals or companies: a) Devon Archer; b) JiaQi Bao; c) Tony Bobulinski; d) Jeffrey Cooper; e) Catherine Dodge; f) Gongwen Dong; g) James Gilliar; h) Patrick Ho Chi-ping; i) Vuk Jeremie; j) Zang Jianjun; k) Ye Jianming; l) Jonathan Li; m) Joan Mayer or Joan Peugh; n) Francis Person; o) Vadim Pozharskyi; p) Eric Schwerin; q) Robert Walker; r) Mervyn Yan; s) Nita Madhav; t) Maiy Guttieri u) Any Metabiota entity or company; v) Any Rosemont Seneca entity or company; w) Any Hudson West entity or company; x) Any Owasco entity or company; y) Any Bohai Harvest entity or company; z) Skaneateles LLC; aa) Eudora Global LLC; bb) Coldharbour Capital LLC; cc) Lion Hall Group LLC; dd) Any CEFC entity or company; and ee) Burisma. Any communication, between January 20, 2009, and January 20, 2017, between or among former Vice President Joseph R. Biden and the individuals or entities set forth in Items 2(a)-(ee) above. All records and documents including paper or electronic calendars such as (Outlook or Gmail) regarding former Vice President Joseph R. Biden and the individuals or entities set forth in Items 2(a)-(ee) above. We explained to the court that in a March letter the National Archives acknowledged receiving the FOIA request, assigned it a case number and claimed it had identified “approximately 1,567 emails, 2,501 electronic files, and 445 pages of potentially responsive records that must be processed in order to respond to your request.” The Archives also stated that, according to the Code of Federal Regulations [], it is required to “notify representatives of the former President and the incumbent President and the former Vice President prior to the release of any Vice Presidential records.” The letter did not say when or even whether any such notice had been given or would be given. On information and belief, no such notice has been given. On May 10, House Committee on Oversight and Accountability Chairman James Comer (R-KY.) released [] financial records of the Biden family’s business dealings showing that millions of dollars flowed from China and other foreign sources through a labyrinth of Biden family companies: [The] financial records reveal the Biden family and associates’ complicated network of companies set up during Joe Biden’s vice presidency and the millions the Bidens received from foreign sources. The financial records also reveal how the Bidens used complicated transactions to hide payments from foreign nationals, including CCP-linked associates, and provide clear indications of influence-peddling schemes during then-Vice President Biden’s tenure. Clearly, the Biden National Archives agency is stonewalling the release of thousands of records that could go to the heart of Biden family corruption allegations. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES TREASURY DEPARTMENT FOR COMMUNICATIONS WITH FAILED BANKS We’re going to court to uncover the details of Biden administration actions that could cost billions of dollars. Your Judicial Watch filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) suit against the U.S. Department of the Treasury for all communications between Treasury components Financial Stability Oversight Council (FSOC) and the Office of Financial Research (OFR) and the failed Silicon Valley and Signature banks (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of the Treasury [] (No. 1:23-cv-01397)). Both banks were forced into failure by the Biden administration in March. The Biden administration’s actions in attempting to resolve the bank failures will cost tens of billions of dollars, the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) estimated []. We sued after Treasury failed to respond to March 14, 2023, FOIA requests. The Financial Stability Oversight Council [], established by Title I of the Dodd–Frank Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act and signed into law by President Barack Obama on July 21, 2010, is tasked with monitoring the stability of the U.S. financial system. However, former Judicial Watch client Vern McKinley and I previously warned [], “[T]he Financial Stability Oversight Council clearly is incapable of providing either financial stability or oversight. It should be eliminated.” (On April 26, House Financial Services Committee Chairman Patrick McHenry, along with Oversight and Investigations Subcommittee Chairman Bill Huizenga, and Financial Institutions and Monetary Policy Subcommittee Chairman Andy Barr sent a letter [] to Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen in her capacity as Chair of the Oversight Council, demanding it provide information previously requested more than a month prior from its meetings immediately following the collapse of Silicon Valley Bank.) The Office of Financial Research was created, according to its website [], to promote “financial stability by delivering high-quality financial data, standards and analysis” in support of the FSOC and its member agencies. In its 2022 report to Congress, the Office of Financial Research states that it found “overall threats to U.S. financial stability were elevated compared to last year. The 2022 report discussed how the systemic risk landscape was elevated as financial institutions faced more uncertainty from rising inflation, tight credit conditions, and the geopolitical landscape.” Massive bank failures induced by the Biden administration have rocked our economic system. The American people deserve to know the details of the costly interventions and government takeovers of Silicon Valley and Signature Banks. That we had to sue for basic information about this banking crisis suggests the Biden administration has something to hide. ANOTHER ILLEGAL ALIEN PROTECTED BY SANCTUARY LAWS CHARGED WITH VIOLENT CRIMES Jurisdictions that grant illegal aliens sanctuary are putting their citizens at risk of violent crimes, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports []. In yet another disturbing example of the devastation caused by open border policies, an illegal immigrant who entered the U.S. as a child a decade ago has been charged with first-degree rape, kidnapping and armed robbery [] in a county that proudly offers migrants sanctuary. The 20-year-old, Jose Roberto Hernandez-Penal, is accused of raping a woman and robbing her friend this month at a Maryland park after threatening the woman with a machete. Days earlier police say he raped a 15-year-old girl at the same park in Montgomery County, which has long protected illegal aliens from federal authorities. The illegal immigrant lives in Hyattsville, which sits in another Maryland county—Prince George’s—famous for its sanctuary policies. The measures protect illegal aliens by, among other things, releasing even the most dangerous criminals from jail to shield them from deportation. Hernandez-Penal, a native of El Salvador, entered the country illegally in 2013, Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) told a local media outlet, and was “ordered removed in absentia by an immigration judge” [] about a year later and again approximately seven months after that. Nevertheless, he remained in the country and committed heinous crimes against unsuspecting residents. Police say at approximately 2:40 p.m. on May 16 Hernandez-Penal approached two adult females on the Northwest Branch Trail of Burnt Mills East Special Park, displayed a machete, stole their property and sexually assaulted one of the victims. Upon leaving the scene, the illegal immigrant assaulted an adult male. Officials told several local news outlets that Hernandez-Penal is also suspected of raping a 15-year-old girl on the same trail of the two-acre facility a week earlier. The park is one of the hundreds operated by Montgomery County along with other recreational facilities such as basketball courts, campsites, tennis courts and playgrounds. Detectives handling the case for the Montgomery County Police Department believe there may be additional victims of sexual assault by Hernandez-Penal that have not contacted authorities. The agency reveals that the illegal immigrant “made statements of involvement” during interviews with detectives after his recent arrest. He was then transported to the Montgomery County Central Processing Unit where he was charged with first degree rape, first degree assault, second degree assault, armed robbery, kidnapping, and weapons-related crimes. In its news release detectives urge anyone who may have been a victim of Hernandez-Penal to contact the agency’s Special Victims Investigations Division (SVID). It is important to note that this is the same law enforcement agency that regularly releases dangerous criminals like Hernandez-Penal from jail to protect them from federal authorities. For example, a few years ago an illegal immigrant from El Salvador who raped a seven-year-old girl multiple times was released [] because under Montgomery County’s sanctuary law police are banned from cooperating with the feds. Rather than honor a detainer issued by ICE under a partnership known as 287(g) that notifies the federal agency of inmates in the country illegally so that they can be deported, local officials freed the child rapist on bond. Not surprisingly, the rapist vanished. Prince George’s County, where Hernandez-Penal lives, practices the same sanctuary measures. In fact, ICE has resorted to unconventional methods to capture criminals in both jurisdictions. In one instance the agency preempted Montgomery and Prince George’s counties’ imminent release of a batch of illegal immigrant offenders by publicly disclosing [] their identity, complete with mug shots. Most were incarcerated for sexual crimes involving children, including rape and serious physical abuse that resulted in death. A couple were jailed for murder and assault. The Maryland cases are part of a national crisis generated by local governments around the country that offer violent illegal immigrants sanctuary. Under 287(g) [], ICE is notified of jail inmates in the country illegally so that they can be deported after serving time for state crimes or making bail. Unfortunately, a growing number of city and county law enforcement agencies are instead releasing the illegal aliens—many with serious convictions such as child sex offenses, rape and murder—rather than turn them over to federal authorities for removal. MEMORIAL DAY – WHY WE FIGHT Memorial Day helps our nation focus on the ultimate sacrifice of untold numbers of fellow Americans – Americans who gave their lives to preserve and defend our God-given freedoms and our constitutional republic. As we honor those heroes next week, I’d like to draw your attention again to the Veterans Day speech [] given in 1985 by then-President Ronald Reagan. Much of his speech applies to Memorial Day, especially this portion, which remains timely today: And the living have a responsibility to remember the conditions that led to the wars in which our heroes died. Perhaps we can start by remembering this: that all of those who died for us and our country were, in one way or another, victims of a peace process that failed; victims of a decision to forget certain things; to forget, for instance, that the surest way to keep a peace going is to stay strong. Weakness, after all, is a temptation — it tempts the pugnacious to assert themselves — but strength is a declaration that cannot be misunderstood. Strength is a condition that declares actions have consequences. Strength is a prudent warning to the belligerent that aggression need not go unanswered. Peace fails when we forget what we stand for. It fails when we forget that our Republic is based on firm principles, principles that have real meaning, that with them, we are the last, best hope of man on Earth; without them, we’re little more than the crust of a continent. Peace also fails when we forget to bring to the bargaining table God’s first intellectual gift to man: common sense. Common sense gives us a realistic knowledge of human beings and how they think, how they live in the world, what motivates them. Common sense tells us that man has magic in him, but also clay. Common sense can tell the difference between right and wrong. Common sense forgives error, but it always recognizes it to be error first. We endanger the peace and confuse all issues when we obscure the truth; when we refuse to name an act for what it is; when we refuse to see the obvious and seek safety in Almighty. Peace is only maintained and won by those who have clear eyes and brave minds. I’d like to think many Americans have “clear eyes and brave minds” and these patriots desire the same qualities in our political and judicial leaders. It certainly reflects Judicial Watch’s modest approach to our efforts. Have a safe and blessed Memorial Day! Until next week... [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2023, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Introducing... the Colorado Kids Unleashed! Summer Challenge
body:
Episode #10 of Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl is LIVE!
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alijhll-ttjjilthht-r/) Hi Peter, I'm excited that this week's episode celebrates our children and, of course, SUMMER break! I decided to challenge our family, really to challenge myself, to be intentional about the next three months. I thought it might be fun if we do this together!Introducing... the _**Colorado Kids Unleashed! Summer Challenge**_ 😎⛱️👙🍉We'll focus on FOUR things together:
1\. We'll Wean From SCREENS
2\. Let's Fuel Up and Get PHYSICAL
3\. Stay FAR Away From Substances
4\. Find Time to Jump for Joy and BE HAPPY**If you 'd like to join in, we have a [fun tracker](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alijhll-ttjjilthht-y/) you can print and use with your family.** Listen to [this week's episode](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alijhll-ttjjilthht-j/) of Unleashed for more info on the challenge and a special interview with Rob Krecak, an expert on technology mindfulness and founder of [Humans First](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alijhll-ttjjilthht-t/).Are you ready to make the summer of 2023 the best ever?! Let's do it!
### **Episode #10 - SCHOOL'S OUT FOR SUMMER:
COLORADO KIDS UNLEASHED**
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alijhll-ttjjilthht-i/) [WATCH ON YOUTUBE](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alijhll-ttjjilthht-d/) [WATCH ON RUMBLE](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alijhll-ttjjilthht-h/) [LISTEN HERE](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alijhll-ttjjilthht-k/) _Not into podcasts? I post transcripts of my monologues and full episode breakdowns every week on my Substack.[You can subscribe here!](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alijhll-ttjjilthht-b/)_
## **Call-to-Action Amid Target Disaster:**
**Support America-First Brands & Products**
I don't know about you guys, but I am SO TIRED of companies going woke and promoting values that don't align with HALF of our country. Haven't they learned by now? Disney, then Bud Light... Now Target. The best way we can fight this is to VOTE with our dollar, STOP shopping there, and START putting your money towards America-first brands and products.I'm partnering with some amazing people to build a team of dedicated individuals who share our vision. Join me for a 30-minute Zoom call on Saturday, the 27th at 9 a.m. Mountain Time to learn more about this new project!Reply to this email with "AMERICA FIRST" below or send me a direct message on social media, and I'll provide you with the Zoom call details. Together, we can create a brighter future for all. Let's UNLEASH our power and make a change. [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alijhll-ttjjilthht-n/)
### **Happy Memorial Day weekend, may we remember those who made the ultimate sacrifice for us.**
If you've been liking the podcast so far, [here are the ways you can help us grow](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alijhll-ttjjilthht-p/)!Have a GREAT first week of summer and a wonderful Memorial Day weekend. Heidi [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alijhll-ttjjilthht-x/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alijhll-ttjjilthht-m/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alijhll-ttjjilthht-c/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alijhll-ttjjilthht-q/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alijhll-ttjjilthht-a/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alijhll-ttjjilthht-f/) | Heidi GanahlLone Tree, CO [Preferences](https://heidi4gov.updatemyprofile.com/i-alijhll-E8C3E4FD-ttjjilthht-z) | [Unsubscribe](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-u-alijhll-ttjjilthht-v/)
---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: Join me in powerful worship and prayer
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
Fellow American I gave my life to Christ when I was in fifth grade. But fifth graders today are facing a cultural, political, and social climate that is stacked against Christians. Public schools are teaching sex education to fourth graders, telling kindergarteners to choose their gender, and writing curriculum based on critical race theory. As Christians, we have a strong sense of right and wrong, good and bad, true and false. Yet, our nation's children are being shaped by an education system that vehemently disagrees with our beliefs. **_America needs Christians who have the Holy Spirit working in their lives to stand up for what they believe and let the light of truth into our schools, communities, and culture._** That's exactly why **TPUSA Faith** launched **Kingdom to the Capitol** \- a series of live worship events in **_ALL FIFTY state capitals_** to ignite the flame of REVIVAL all across our country. **As a fellow believer in Christ, I want to invite you to attend Kingdom to the Capitol when we're in your state capital.** [**But whether or not you're able to attend, I hope you'll support TPUSA Faith with your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100 to enable us to bring hundreds more people to each of our FIFTY worship events.**](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[Support Kingdom to the Capitol](http://trk.readactnews._IKV7ZfQTE0slg)
---
Our educational system should illuminate the world around us, helping us to see things as they truly are... revealing what's right, good, true, and beautiful. TPUSA Faith is on a mission to empower Christians who care about our nation's children and public education to go to school boards, classrooms, and city councils to boldly ask our leaders to do what is right. Right now, we have **Kingdom to the Capitol** events scheduled in Texas, Wisconsin, Virginia, and more, and we are planning future events in additional state capitals. These important events, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible by your generous partnership, have the potential to bring the hope of the Gospel to every state capital in America. [**Will you please pray for the success of our REVIVAL tour and support this mission for the glory of God, for the good of our nation's children, and the future of our nation?**](http://trk.readactnews._lytORHCQ) I believe this is a season for revival for our nation. These are desperate times in America. Whether we're talking about public education, the spread of socialism, gender ideology, or abortion, you don't have to look far to see the darkness plaguing our country when it drifts from the truth of scripture. With the generous partnership of followers of Jesus - like you - TPUSA Faith will promote these powerful worship events far and wide, fill local church buildings with worshipers, and send an army of believers back into their communities. I pray that by coming together as believers in Christ, we will renew the hope of Christians and bring much-needed revival to our nation. [**As Christians, it often feels like we are being ganged up upon, which is why it's critical that we come together in powerful worship and prayer in EVERY state capital. But we can't do that without you. Will you please make a much-needed gift right now?**](http://trk.readactnews.) Our educational system should be filled with the Spirit as it teaches our children how to discern God's will, how to live in society, and how to be wise. But you and I both know that our current public education system has strayed as far as possible from this purpose. TPUSA Faith is working to engage, equip, and empower Christians to change the trajectory of public education - and our nation - for the future of our children. **Kingdom to the Capitol** is our most ambitious and historic revival tour yet, visiting every single state capital in America with the hope of restoring American Biblical values in schools and communities across our nation. [**Whether the Lord leads you to give $35, $50, $100, or some other amount, I hope you can support our FIFTY worship events during a desperate - and dark - time for America. In order to reach EVERY state capital, and save our nation, it's critical that we have your support today.**](http://trk.readactnews._zs3fKGOJYbJKjg)
---
[Support Kingdom to the Capitol](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
Together, Fellow American, we can spark REVIVAL in our beloved nation. God bless you,
---
Charlie KirkTPUSA Faith
---
[](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[Support TPUSA Faith](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxNDctNmZlZmZkN2VkNDM4NDBiYWI0MDg4MGI5OTA3NDE1YTMiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/B28aP654HiN7-una9jwl3A) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Gary Sinise
subject: These heroes are counting on you
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here.

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667354%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ImFR0dpjxekmK%2b3b53rR3Q&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ -- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667365%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gnYc%2b%2f8S1c2dJ1K2wXGkRA&sysid=1)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667366%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oEexSit79meHWeyJ8b4WsQ&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667354%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ImFR0dpjxekmK%2b3b53rR3Q&sysid=1)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country -- the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ -- as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667367%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DJHua3UtYe8UWtfUlUNU5g&sysid=1)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667366%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oEexSit79meHWeyJ8b4WsQ&sysid=1)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667368%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZK8YDTWnxbS6Z0TeBPzvyA&sysid=1) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please -- [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667369%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bzfkC0gwsw2ZlwT2xipQjQ&sysid=1)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667354%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ImFR0dpjxekmK%2b3b53rR3Q&sysid=1)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667366%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oEexSit79meHWeyJ8b4WsQ&sysid=1)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1032%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=TXX6ktVr51cnv3aj3uknlA&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667360%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n2cnb2a57uDFTTDhkDH4Tg&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667361%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QtyChcGQ3Z94oaFaHAoyRQ&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1032%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=TXX6ktVr51cnv3aj3uknlA&sysid=1)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi928cie6rkqlp4mhdmgq2s9vpu46gmrmqre2mjo_rp22sh2s8i66o75chge8or2chh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9k4rleib56lgtnq0kcp58auqshjg408lo06bodo_rp22sh2s8i66o75chge8or2chh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z39shba0en90gam64ent1lpprsgtoe08q5nv7d2g_rp22sh2s8i66o75chge8or2chh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf0117aipbdu6v9kpog81o5c2893uf672si6rsgg_rp22sh2s8i66o75chge8or2chh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pro Life Update
---

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Banking Nightmare
body:
Now, I have a new warning.

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, During and after the Great Financial Crisis of 2008, 485 U.S. banks went under. We warned about 484 -- an accuracy rate of 99.8% Now, I have a new warning. But this time, it's not just about a few hundred banks. It's about nearly every single bank in America, whether large or small. A veritable banking nightmare! name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: More Biden Corruption Exposed (New Documents)
body:
We have major news to share with you...

| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zje89dqh29qmcpb90ba1e0c8di18mhotnk2jobr0_rp22sh2s8i66o75chge8or1c1h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot,We have major news to share with you... The corporate mainstream media, of course, **REFUSES** to cover it.The Biden family is utterly corrupt – it is more than perfectly clear now that they've been engaged in high-level influence peddling for years upon years. And now my team at America First Legal has uncovered more evidence they tried to hide. _**We’re exposing the**_ _**BIDEN FAMILY GRIFT**_ _**and we’re not going to let up!**_[**_You can support the work of America First Legal HERE >>>_**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg35cvb3k2ll0q9orqp6gltjs75el538nse3qdt8_rp22sh2s8i66o75chge8or1c1h2bs)**Background:** On March 3, we filed a Foreign Agents Registration Act (FARA) Complaint against Hunter Biden, based on information we found in the first set of documents we obtained after we sued the National Archives and Records Administration for its refusal to release Joe Biden’s Vice Presidential records._And earlier this month, we released a third tranche of emails we uncovered._**These provide yet more clear evidence that _Hunter Biden’s shady overseas business activities were completely commingled with Joe Biden’s official business_ all the way back in 2009, his first year in the White House. **
**Here is what is revealed in this latest batch of emails:** · Vice President Biden’s closest advisors held confidential discussions about Hunter Biden’s consulting firm, Seneca Global Advisors;· Hunter’s foreign travel and personal business and financial matters involved discussions with White House staff and other Obama administration appointees;· On the same day that a CCP official was addressing allegations of political retaliation against an Anglo-Australian mining company, Hunter’s business partner involved with CCP-backed mining deals was reaching out to the Vice President’s advisor about that CCP official’s upcoming visit;· And the National Archives continues to unlawfully withhold records through improper and partisan applications of the Presidential Records Act.This is obviously only scratching the bare surface of this scandal. And we intend to aggressively and thoroughly challenge the National Archives’ improper concealment of evidence that reveals the full extent of the Biden family’s influence peddling.**Joe Biden’s exploitation of his position of power to enrich his family and associates is wrong and is truly a National disgrace...** __They viewed the Office of the Vice President as an ATM!__ The Biden family grift was brazen. They _must_ be held accountable.[**Please rush a secure donation today to fuel our fight >>>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrl5olofp1am8edch1onusdqv7ei6ibqas1c9am8_rp22sh2s8i66o75chge8or1c1h2bs) _Thank you so much for all your support,_ Stephen Miller President, America First Legal
|

name: Ron DeSantis for President
subject: How our campaign is doing things differently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
This campaign is around the principle that our donors are a part of this team.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdr5m453j7k2qek0kavhfk076shuggl9tuogeehg_rp22sh2s8i66o75chge8or5cth2bs)
---

Hello Friend,

A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They're probably making you feel terrible if you don't contribute too, aren't they?

At Team DeSantis we're taking a different approach.

Our entire fundraising & digital program's foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank.

Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can't afford it.

You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating.

No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.

That's what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House.

If that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of today then **_[please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqo02n3vi04md41p3d4qr2hgbojs2bo25ebn7q3o_rp22sh2s8i66o75chge8or5cth2bs "please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford.")_**

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znuddp109r14jcln6ptbnselbmubbfgiv41d6lfo_rp22sh2s8i66o75chge8or5cth2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: I've listed it out for you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
As a critical member of my team I need to loop you in

| |
---
| | | As a critical member of my team I need to loop you in on the bill my colleagues and I just passed to secure our southern border - so my team has bulleted it out for you below:

---

_**HOUSE REPUBLICANS SECURE THE BORDER ACT**_
* SLASHES illegal immigration
* Resumes border wall construction
* ENDs the failed policy of catch-and-release
* And INCREASES the number of Border Patrol agents

---
| | | [ENDORSE OUR BILL](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1tkjrsgo46ieghu050h821o8v5t0dbg3da8cih8_rp22sh2s8i66o75chge8or1c1h2bs)

The answer to ending Biden's Border Crisis is right in front of you. All I ask for is your written endorsement to stand with House Republicans and _**[SECURE OUR BORDER:](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znrreu25na119ausu2qof2ib9h4hpo2p594qimcg_rp22sh2s8i66o75chge8or1c1h2bs "SECURE OUR BORDER:")**_

body:
We would all have a Merry Christmas!

| |
---
| | | **THE 1ST ANNUAL SPEAKER'S SURVEY
MAY 2023**
---

Patriot,

I thought I'd see a HUGE response to my first annual GOP Speaker's Survey, but it hasn't happened.

This input is desperately needed to shape the party's strategy for this MUST-WIN election. Joe Biden and the liberal media hate that we are so closely involved with our grassroots base. This survey is the type of thing that gives him nightmares.

You don't have to write anything fancy, just tell me what matters to you.

So, I'm inviting you one LAST time today.

---
| **OFFICIAL INVITATION**

**Will you participate in my first annual GOP Speaker's Survey?

DEADLINE: MAY 2023
GOP PARTY ID: 01891
EMAIL: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4c1nde1kip11je58mcebkfuhlofmbh8ppuim14g_rp22sh2s8i66o75chge8or7c5h2bs "dpwillis67@gmail.com")**

-Speaker McCarthy

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: THIS IS IT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I wanted you to be one of the first people to know about this.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79417%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6tv%2baGC2pTgTzWotTa6Byg&sysid=1)
---
Friend,

It's official: I'M IN.

**I'm running for President of the United States. **
---
| | [JOIN ME](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79418%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WH8xt%2fJWrLH0Zc%2f1D%2fDh3A&sysid=1)
---
Have you ever noticed how often Joe Biden tries to take potshots at Florida?

It’s because he HATES what we’re doing in the Sunshine State.

While he pushes the woke agenda, we’re fighting back with freedom.

Joe Biden is taking the country in the wrong direction. But I know I can turn it around.

The American people know it, too. That’s why they are ALREADY voting with their feet. Our population is booming in the free state of Florida.

Now, I want to put that choice on the ballot--but I need your support. ** **
---
| [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79419%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lr%2bH8V694OZWjADBO7RFzA&sysid=1)
---
We sometimes take freedom for granted. You should not do that after the last few years. It is contested, and we have seen it wither on the vine in many places in our country.

But Florida was different. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose law and order over rioting and disorder. Florida was a refuge of sanity when the world went mad.

We held the line when freedom hung in the balance.

We showed that we can -- and must -- revitalize America.

**I believe freedom is worth fighting for, and as your next President I promise I will never stop fighting for your freedom.** **[Will you fight alongside me?](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79410%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4E%2bn1SflWnIK4UwPR%2bWw4A&sysid=1 "Will you fight alongside
me?")**
---
| | [YES, I’M READY TO WIN](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79411%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EN1kQMBcSI7f5B0%2f7E3sQA&sysid=1)
---
And we can win, Friend.

I'll make sure we have an economy that works for working families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much more. The battle won’t be easy and will require a lot of toil and sweat to get it all done. I’m excited to share my agenda for America with you over the course of this campaign.

**But here’s why I’m writing you today, Friend:[I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first team tele-townhall.](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79412%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7YCDNUgcOSQfa%2bEjFvRUrA&sysid=1 "I want to ask you to
become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first Team
Teletownhall.")**

I promise you, unlike other campaigns, our grassroots fundraising program is built on the principle that our donors are a part of our team, not our personal piggybank.

**_[I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79413%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zFZUWfnvprBgE652gSTv5Q&sysid=1 "I vow to treat you with
respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.")_**

Can I count on you?
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79414%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r73X0QPrir2ajTZRrH5BjQ&sysid=1)
---
| [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79419%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lr%2bH8V694OZWjADBO7RFzA&sysid=1)
---
In Freedom,

Ron DeSantis
---
_P.S I want to show you my appreciation for standing with me from Day 1 of this campaign. It’s why my team prepared gifts to thank our Day 1 donors.

If you chip in $47 by midnight on 5/25, we’ll send you a limited-edition Day 1 membership card and an invite to our first-ever team tele-townhall.

Make sure you get yours now at this secure link: **[https://dsnts.com/aexHpu](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79425%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JVftIZkUvydANHTLgCiJ9w&sysid=1)**_
---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79419%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lr%2bH8V694OZWjADBO7RFzA&sysid=1)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America’s veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
---
| This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President
PO Box 3696
Tallahassee, FL 32315

---

Great American Update
