During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America’s veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 Great American Update 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314 |

name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | Fellow American, Did you get Gary Sinise's email? The National Memorial Day Parade is just a few days away, and we need your help to salute our nation's heroes with the honor they deserve! [**Click here to donate while there's still time.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzkzMDcifQ/e_Bh_VAl_JrWfBBBpf2U_w) Thank you! − Tim Holbert, President
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzkzMDcifQ/uPojzWJrSHESvIrHN_axTg)
---
Fellow American, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ \- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzkzMDcifQ/Aj8DlDELzfnBsluLdaRqVQ)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzkzMDcifQ/Qndj1beeaebjblCTHoKTKg)
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzkzMDcifQ/HLmPV5ntBKkGzlRoTZMwqg)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they're bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our "Greatest Generation" heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country - the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ \- as this year's event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation's heroes deserve.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzkzMDcifQ/yMlnTJlG-yLyOaTkWe8TJw)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzkzMDcifQ/k0WZWxPh22j3UtoZvJ6sWA)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzkzMDcifQ/KlnJoL0ElptvGoo2q-Ojug) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day - this year and every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzkzMDcifQ/H6kJmmwE671fmISFKOkXyw)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzkzMDcifQ/ga2kFxcOHkCm7dy4h6MrWg)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.secureandprosper.-5w3xB_caM4flQ)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---
Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTQ3LTZjNTJjNWRlOGU5YjRmZjBhMWFhNDliMWRlODRiYmUxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/J1wrt3VacV7v5cWlJIS-vA) to unsubscribe.
---

Friend,

TIM. IS IN.

Today in North Charleston, South Carolina, Senator Tim Scott officially announced his candidacy for President of the United States.

Our party and our nation are at a time for choosing. And Tim is the candidate the far Left fears most.

**Will you join the team and help Tim Scott replace Joe Biden?_[Please make an Inaugural Donation of any amount to become a Founding Member of Tim's campaign today!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6j166kju7fn6v8utihuf09uhk2lm47kch4psql8_rp22sh2s8i66o75chge8or1c1h2bs "Please make an Inaugural Donation of any amount to become a Founding Member of Tim’s campaign today!")_**

It's time for conservatives to rise up and stop the Left's attacks on our American values.
It's time to choose freedom, hope, and opportunity over grievance and victimhood.
It's time to elect a President who believes in the greatness of our country.
It's time to restore faith in America.
**_It 's time for Tim Scott._**

Thank You and God Bless,

Tim Scott for America

**PS -** Can you forward this email to 5 friends or family members to help spread the word and grow our team nationwide? Thanks!

Friend, I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That's why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu2c6660i5qicoteg28ppaj9lstj51p9i4bo0q08_rp22sh2s8i66o75chge8or1c1h2bs "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream _because I have lived it._ My family went from cotton to congress in a **single lifetime.**

**This isn 't going to be easy.** I'll need your help to win.

Thank you for your support!

-Tim

subject: List of everyone guilty in the Durham Report
body:
The FBI launched the investigation with ZERO justification.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znbmt6u8qn8fjrls4j12rdnga99m0fsrfs2m81p0_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgecob2cph2bs)

Hello Friend,

The Durham Report reveals what we knew all along - **Russiagate is a political crime syndicate, the FBI rigged our elections, and they unlawfully targeted President Trump.**

_The FBI launched the investigation with**ZERO justification**._ Even CNN has to report that on their fake news website.

It was 5 years ago that I led the House investigation into Russiagate with Devin Nunes. Our report from then says the exact same thing as the Durham Report. The FBI had ZERO justification for going after President Trump. But for 5 years, the fake news media lied to the American public.

**Make no mistake:** The DOJ and FBI conspired with the fake news media to bury the truth.

America cannot let this happen again.

After serving under President Trump, I created the Kash Foundation. **The Kash Foundation provides legal aid to veterans, American-first patriots, and whistle-blowers fighting to expose the Deep State corruption.** We fund litigation grants for individuals who have been wronged, release documentation exposing government corruption, and call out each government operator that betrayed their oath of office.

I am on a mission to _**defeat**_ the Government Gangsters who robbed the American people of justice.

Now more than ever, I am counting on your support.

[Can you help me raise $45,000 for the Kash Foundation? Your support will aid those fighting the Deep State corruption. Please send an urgent donation of $250, $100, $35, or even $10 today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztf9c1dfj334asspjosfc7jqo5evvd2m0c4g6thg_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgecob2cph2bs)

It has to stop. We are going to put an end to it.

[Please rush your support to the Kash Foundation and help us defeat the government gangsters weaponizing our DOJ >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhki1nlggvlu394vtt98s8ngc7g79s4t6vph711g_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgecob2cph2bs)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: let me be 100% honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If you know anything about me, you know I don’t beat around the bush.

| |

---
| | | This is Jim Jordan.

If you know anything about me, you know I don’t beat around the bush. If I’m worried about something, you’ll hear about it. Immediately.

So let me be 100% honest with you right now.

I just spoke with Majority Leader Steve Scalise and he told me we’re in quite a bind: **1)** _Inside Elections_ released their first set of House Ratings and they have us TIED with the Democrats for control of the House **2)** The latest FEC reports show Democrats OUTRAISED Republicans by $12,000,000+... **3)** _**[We still need fifteen-hundred strong Conservatives to make a small donation right away or our Republican Majority will be in SERIOUS JEOPARDY.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667375%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3Eqvq9MZzHxnCPzE0koi%2bA&sysid=1 "We still need
fifteen-hundred strong Conservatives to make a small donation right away or our
Republican Majority will be in SERIOUS JEOPARDY.")**_
---
| | | [I’M PERSONALLY ASKING: CAN YOU HELP?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667376%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lqKJc%2btecrW%2fFFgTlO0X1Q&sysid=1 "I’M PERSONALLY ASKING: CAN YOU HELP?")
---
Listen, House Democrats exploited every ounce of their power to cover for Joe Biden and misled the public during every crisis they created together.

_If they outraise us and manage to destroy our Majority, the American People will never get ..._
* **ANSWERS** on Biden’s weak response to Chinese aggression
* **ANSWERS** on President Trump’s corrupt indictment
* **ANSWERS** on how Big Tech interfered with our elections
* **ANSWERS** on Democrats colluding with Big Tech to silence critics
* **ANSWERS** on Biden officials treating parents as domestic terrorists

The American People deserve answers, but getting them depends entirely on Republicans holding the House Majority. If we lose our Majority, we will lose all of the progress we made.

We need the support of our grassroots donors to prevail. **Without it, we might as well throw in the towel.**

_**[As I write this, we’re falling critically behind the Democrats’ fundraising efforts. I’m counting on you to make a small donation to help us catch up before our critical deadline.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667377%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4ZeeyIB9seWEvCFn6QwK7g&sysid=1 "As I write this, we’re
falling critically behind the Democrats’ fundraising efforts. I’m counting on you
to make a small donation to help us catch up before our critical deadline.")**_

Time is of the essence and I’m really counting on you.

For America,

Jim Jordan

America cannot let this happen again.

subject: More Biden Corruption Exposed (New Documents)
body:
We have major news to share with you...

| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1fot9s3i72iinruc8jvd3hfe0utm0rmav0abcl8_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgeaoj1chh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot,We have major news to share with you... The corporate mainstream media, of course, **REFUSES** to cover it.The Biden family is utterly corrupt – it is more than perfectly clear now that they've been engaged in high-level influence peddling for years upon years. And now my team at America First Legal has uncovered more evidence they tried to hide. _**We’re exposing the**_ _**BIDEN FAMILY GRIFT**_ _**and we’re not going to let up!**_[**_You can support the work of America First Legal HERE >>>_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhm72uu9hfrhf5vjpdk8js60ch79g8egc6d1vqro_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgeaoj1chh2bs)**Background:** On March 3, we filed a Foreign Agents Registration Act (FARA) Complaint against Hunter Biden, based on information we found in the first set of documents we obtained after we sued the National Archives and Records Administration for its refusal to release Joe Biden’s Vice Presidential records._And earlier this month, we released a third tranche of emails we uncovered._**These provide yet more clear evidence that _Hunter Biden’s shady overseas business activities were completely commingled with Joe Biden’s official business_ all the way back in 2009, his first year in the White House. **
**Here is what is revealed in this latest batch of emails:** · Vice President Biden’s closest advisors held confidential discussions about Hunter Biden’s consulting firm, Seneca Global Advisors;· Hunter’s foreign travel and personal business and financial matters involved discussions with White House staff and other Obama administration appointees;· On the same day that a CCP official was addressing allegations of political retaliation against an Anglo-Australian mining company, Hunter’s business partner involved with CCP-backed mining deals was reaching out to the Vice President’s advisor about that CCP official’s upcoming visit;· And the National Archives continues to unlawfully withhold records through improper and partisan applications of the Presidential Records Act.This is obviously only scratching the bare surface of this scandal. And we intend to aggressively and thoroughly challenge the National Archives’ improper concealment of evidence that reveals the full extent of the Biden family’s influence peddling.**Joe Biden’s exploitation of his position of power to enrich his family and associates is wrong and is truly a National disgrace...** __They viewed the Office of the Vice President as an ATM!__ The Biden family grift was brazen. They _must_ be held accountable.[**Please rush a secure donation today to fuel our fight >>>**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z139igg03jb940f7gn1brp982psrmcfo6ftlj520_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgeaoj1chh2bs) _Thank you so much for all your support,_ Stephen Miller President, America First Legal

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: They should be ashamed…but I know theyaren’t
body:
The New York Times decided to publish an article directly attacking 18-year-old Chloe Cole for bravely telling her story

| |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgsvcdb4d24ii6csp1q3u0ha1i0clp12eakg4ra0_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgeeo31c5h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7j84ncg0ku177caibgd8efeev9ok5b4qinhqb1g_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgeeo31c5h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot,The _New York Times_ decided to publish an article directly attacking 18-year-old Chloe Cole for bravely telling her story about de-transitioning and fighting to protect children from the lies and coercion that leftist medical professionals are peddling.That’s right. **The _New York Times_ published a hit piece on an 18-year-old girl who was lied to, coerced into surgically “transitioning” before she was old enough to buy tickets to an R-rated movie.**Physicians at Kaiser Permanente put Chloe on puberty blockers and testosterone when she was just 13 years old. Then they performed a radical double mastectomy on her when she was just 15 years old. And we’re suing Kaiser as well as the individual doctors that did this to her – but we won’t win without patriots like you.
---
| | |
---
**Will you consider making a generous, tax-deductible gift to set a precedent nationwide holding doctors responsible for experimenting on vulnerable kids?**
---
[**MAKE THEM PAY**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpibjkou1frsubnr9bbnjgm1nd53lnsstuoph0f8_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgeeo31c5h2bs)
---
|
---
| | Chloe dared to take on one of the most powerful and profitable institutions in our country, knowing what a steep, uphill battle was before her.Instead of offering a modicum of compassion—a scintilla of humanity—the _New York Times_ belittled and smeared this brave young woman dismissing her experience as rare or “few.” But Chloe’s story is becoming less rare by the day as more and more de-transitioners, inspired by her courage, are now speaking out too._I can’t tell you how many calls I get from de-transitioners like Chloe._ But because of relatively short statutes of limitations across the country, very few de-transitioners can file a lawsuit against the doctors and hospitals who “treated” them as minors—a nuance notably missing from the drivel published by the _New York Times_.The _New York Times_ would like you to believe that our clients Chloe Cole and Layla Jane are just two isolated incidents. **But this is pure gaslighting by the _New York Times_ because whether it is one child or one thousand, no child deserves to have their body permanently mutilated by medical professionals they should have been able to trust. **That’s why we’re suing Kaiser – and why we have to win. ...Because we believe in the dignity of every person, including those despised by the radical leftists in legacy media.**...And because we have the opportunity to put a stop to the performance of these barbaric medical procedures on children today.** We need to set an example and show doctors and hospitals in every state that there are consequences for misleading minors and their families.But as one of the largest providers in the country, Kaiser has millions of dollars to throw at this lawsuit, and we know this victory won’t be easily won.
---
| | |
---
**Will you consider making a generous, tax-deductible gift to set a precedent nationwide holding doctors responsible for experimenting on vulnerable kids?**
---
[**MAKE THEM PAY**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znqbda82hh2cges16l8pmg6t3q8h78kbbsi7tr28_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgeeo31c5h2bs)
---
|
---
My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I founded the Center for American Liberty to protect our constitutional rights and to fight for people just like Chloe Cole and Layla Jane. You may think we don’t stand a chance against a big corporation like Kaiser, with more money on hand than we’ve raised in the history of our organization, but you couldn’t be more wrong.We’ve taken on case after case that no one thought we could win, and we did.In fact, in the last two years we’ve won THREE cases at the United States Supreme Court against California Governor Gavin Newsom.I know we can declare another crucial victory in Chloe Cole’s case too, but we don’t stand a chance without you.Every dollar helps!We don’t get a dime from the federal government, and we take on some of the most powerful and connected entities in the country. We depend on a grassroots movement of patriots giving what they can when they can, and rest assured every dollar makes a difference.
---
|
---
**Which is why I’m asking you to join the fight with a donation of $25, $50, or more right now.**
---
[**MAKE THEM PAY**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc72v6rsvpo2q7lbmd558i8fg8ujdkbvuj22i0q8_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgeeo31c5h2bs)
---
|
---
We can’t change what happened to Chloe, but we can make sure it never happens to another child again.And with your help, we can make that victory a reality.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. DhillonFounder & CEO
---
|
---
| | P.S. The New York Times published a hit piece aimed directly at Chloe Cole because she’s been brave enough to speak out and fight back. We cannot allow the radical Left and its allies in legacy media to silence women like Chloe and Layla Jane who are trying to sound the alarm about the dangers of “gender-affirming care” for minors. That’s why our lawsuits against Kaiser Permanente and the doctors who coerced Chloe and Layla are so important. **Please consider joining the fight with a generous, tax-deductible gift of $25 or more today.**
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs8fn6cric6vap9tljll9utvcc5lh33p42em4a7g_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgeeo31c5h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znlmogks2a3d61add3nvhr7rcghp58hbe195kff8_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgeeo31c5h2bs)
---

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr8o5qckman61a9mp4me921q537ner5j6nf1svjg_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgeeo31c5h2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcscr89mv26aff62mheq6fek1tcbri7j0rsr2n6o_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgeeo31c5h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0ho9a3s1e0hsac333hh81boh63qrch1mad2jqj8_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgeeo31c5h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztkdm1amj3ocp4t3bk0cqch7ii8hli0o1i0mkkro_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgeeo31c5h2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8ogl06e6cvi7noggc1oj7us1cukm6pulk69qk08_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgeeo31c5h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z14jukk0a1n5tj3htqdcq5v8p06e46qutst40fvg_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgeeo31c5h2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo73lnb50baav48osatpsj17i6anmf1e2resf9l0_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgeeo31c5h2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc4mrpp5h90ui67fuaobviga9hi7cn0upqbpipf0_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgeeo31c5h2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaunus1182anqtutvk5vn8g3pnet3lnbsop7tsh0_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgeeo31c5h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfe8d0c3k8paqhehpqqgkch2t68lbqknpqkp8rag_rp22sh2s8i66o75chgeeo31c5h2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlujl60559cm54rvp5kd2au4qfuvt71gbsp04jf8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or0sli61pr0c5gm49fg)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: $200 million plot against me

Friend,
A report just came across my desk: _**corrupt special interests are planning to spend $200 MILLION to stop me from winning the Republican primary.**_
Could you imagine if that money was spent on beating BIDEN instead? That money could easily be used to counter Soros’ millions.
But sadly, RINOs would rather let Biden get 4 more years in the White House so long as it means that I’m not the President in 2025.
_The reason they hate me so much is that I cannot be bought, bullied, or bribed._
At my 2017 Inauguration, I declared that _**“What truly matters is not which party controls our government, but whether our government is controlled by the people.”**_
My presidency is all about putting the American people first, which is why the corrupt special interests who’ve made a fortune off of putting you dead last are out to “stop” me.
I don’t have mega-donors giving $200 million. But I do have millions of MAGA patriots like YOU giving $1, $5, $10, $24.
_Even $1 from you today can mean the difference between saving America or letting special interests buy the White House yet again._

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: June 20th may determine if abortion remains legal in Virginia
body:
Will abortion still be legal in VA next year?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T175fe32d-1cf5-4714-aee6-efa47abe5ff3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **June 20th may determine if abortion remains legal in Virginia.**_ _ _We only have a slim one vote pro-choice majority in the State Senate because_ _ __one of 2 Democrats who make up our majority, Joe Morrissey, is a "pro-life" Democrat who'll sign any awful anti-choice Republican garbage._ [**_But we have the perfect solution!__ __If you join us, in less than 4 weeks we'll replace the anti-choicer with progressive champion & former State Delegate. Laschrecse Aird, who's challenging Morrissey in the June 20th primary._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08ab3cdd-663b-4c38-8926-36ff4226dccf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Aird is exactly the kind of candidate we must get behind. She grew up impoverished to a teenage mother and father who worked multiple jobs to get by. __This motivated Aird to run for the VA House of Delegates. _ _In 2021, she was named Legislator of the Year by the Virginia Education Association. __Aird was also lauded by the Virginia Chamber of Commerce for job creation. Two very different groups--both seeing Aird's __accomplishment_ _ and integrity. Now that's someone who can bring people together._ _Not surprisingly, when comparing Aird to Morrissey, this was the result:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0d9227b2-d1bd-4f58-a71c-84742dc9b22b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Aird has made abortion rights the centerpiece of her campaign, running for "Roe Not Joe." __She'll be taking that fight all the way to June 20th, but early voting has begun, so we must **SUPPORT AIRD** **NOW** or risk an anti-choice majority! _ [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action's own "Roe Not Joe," fundraiser, and support Lashrecse Aird with $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3c27c273-0c85-4ca8-bdef-b157c29833bc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you and have a great long weekend! Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T54c5ab8a-77ae-4b53-ac4e-3a12bf564921/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | or

name: Ron DeSantis for President
subject: How our campaign is doing things differently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
This campaign is around the principle that our donors are a part of this team.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhh1npt3j17htd7pcl69a55oldjsthmi1q8euqag_rp22sh2s8i66o75chie4ob5cth2bs)
---

Hello Friend,

A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They're probably making you feel terrible if you don't contribute too, aren't they?

At Team DeSantis we're taking a different approach.

Our entire fundraising & digital program's foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank.

Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can't afford it.

You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating.

No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.

That's what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House.

If that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of today then **_[please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvknk1iaep1cj9s3qquaeo0jicvd4l8883edeks0_rp22sh2s8i66o75chie4ob5cth2bs "please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford.")_**

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrmca8jrd49qcgg3a4ptba7n1to1djcts147rrg8_rp22sh2s8i66o75chie4ob5cth2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

clean_body: This campaign is around the principle that our donors are a part of this team. | | | | | | | | | | Hello Friend, A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They're probably making you feel terrible if you don't contribute too, aren't they? At Team DeSantis we're taking a different approach. Our entire fundraising & digital program's foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank. Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can't afford it. You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating. No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies. That's what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House. If that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of today then "please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford." | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Let's show the country we love that we're willing to fight for it. Chip in today to join Team DeSantis. Yours in freedom, | Ron DeSantis | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=695ca06f20894ea4a80ff8505d36acd7&_e=Erz_eYJnm_OVghYUEkUBFN4BlXx_womvq8VhISs1ka3ZtLScR_obwM0STfYWWr5n7rtfgth8EvL3yGiSMR-K6xrvjmV8yV3ZXB8rEPZPU5c8A2i5o43PDGyffMLiF3GTZkOT3uLafz7aU6dsixDcMM0Go1GpMBWAL5MLSiQM7XrYIPQ5w59xjC42UyDIy0glx0Igx2ML4MkPtwbYet52fWZyq_DyEfeIuJu1mXc8i15GXSSwS2rhqD9P4KL_6-9AYeUPbIIbq08s_U9ctVe5Nqw4AJ4P8ge0_fcDlYoalMw%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=695ca06f20894ea4a80ff8505d36acd7&_e=Erz_eYJnm_OVghYUEkUBFN4BlXx_womvq8VhISs1ka3ZtLScR_obwM0STfYWWr5n7rtfgth8EvL3yGiSMR-K6xrvjmV8yV3ZXB8rEPZPU5c8A2i5o43PDGyffMLiF3GTZkOT3uLafz7aU6dsixDcMC2Qkc2-z6UpWR8-ahqyCX__6OjQIUnK9It059aapJR6etYdleaFAzTEJhAm9L4t6kDQ1MXL2m6TD5eopf8dny6TQSDhEYs88lSWPF3PJXW8Oq5PTwQ1cN31vjYemG33C6tAfkbtfdGVU0Pcd2YssKo%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=695ca06f20894ea4a80ff8505d36acd7&_e=Erz_eYJnm_OVghYUEkUBFN4BlXx_womvq8VhISs1ka3ZtLScR_obwM0STfYWWr5n7rtfgth8EvL3yGiSMR-K6xrvjmV8yV3ZXB8rEPZPU5c8A2i5o43PDGyffMLiF3GTZkOT3uLafz7aU6dsixDcMJ3imFRXbypJ9JFRnQJ2qtN5u0l7CbhZ8bULOs3ZhGqPWLHl5WL6H1_L8aAxtJA3HHN4nRxBlpjT6W6jPzta7Egkp-fGVSSWF9dbRooO633G8J_O7EvffSxgpGwp9gY7nTHbTdQuV1GB-1gNVNKn9k0%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=695ca06f20894ea4a80ff8505d36acd7&_e=Erz_eYJnm_OVghYUEkUBFN4BlXx_womvq8VhISs1ka3ZtLScR_obwM0STfYWWr5n7rtfgth8EvL3yGiSMR-K6xrvjmV8yV3ZXB8rEPZPU5c8A2i5o43PDGyffMLiF3GTZkOT3uLafz7aU6dsixDcMF948cVxIJ4mv_NMqdIBFzJF_CpyVFLevl-cIED0uzUVWXzMmm6YSVzI0E1aSgAkPZK3df5sDuON_wiRz34wIvNjEeQtojc_KTJaNp_VbFHk8ZrAvta4oDvigavOsISiCKCKeRiR1E21hFGBohQ48k0%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=695ca06f20894ea4a80ff8505d36acd7&_e=Erz_eYJnm_OVghYUEkUBFN4BlXx_womvq8VhISs1ka3ZtLScR_obwM0STfYWWr5n7rtfgth8EvL3yGiSMR-K6xrvjmV8yV3ZXB8rEPZPU5c8A2i5o43PDGyffMLiF3GTZkOT3uLafz7aU6dsixDcMCvW-h-ZkpILV1G6cQUftRXZ8ETN28wtkx2_Im6eHyQAsBsGKrQuyaqIqyqFODBNIGAJ3OvLfudNOFFJHSg3ZiOFdlwI5fPPNhXBaA73qF9crOpWGEyj2n8SromsA14BU-CCOlJ5R3y_JaGxbivbKpU%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=695ca06f20894ea4a80ff8505d36acd7&_e=Erz_eYJnm_OVghYUEkUBFN4BlXx_womvq8VhISs1ka3ZtLScR_obwM0STfYWWr5n7rtfgth8EvL3yGiSMR-K6xrvjmV8yV3ZXB8rEPZPU5c8A2i5o43PDGyffMLiF3GTZkOT3uLafz7aU6dsixDcMC_WodgSJgu9hR74oX7TYabzFAjopzP1HRQuk-rTe4wPLqFLsNZ9RERAcvRXXYTl25VKWcR_-7LiXfo0_urJNZFfZfXwL16s12s7BDX8hIut5Pqx4tsyHuVkvOGKyRFcpq2j26CTeoxjfn0DEmyQMlc%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=695ca06f20894ea4a80ff8505d36acd7&_e=Erz_eYJnm_OVghYUEkUBFN4BlXx_womvq8VhISs1ka3ZtLScR_obwM0STfYWWr5n7rtfgth8EvL3yGiSMR-K6xrvjmV8yV3ZXB8rEPZPU5c8A2i5o43PDGyffMLiF3GTZkOT3uLafz7aU6dsixDcMOCCbYSkrtaNOAm9U_s5phwc8lPyjJUmy4ZfnS03FbTBdzdjm49wiyjlu9i5bMcFcZBd316J9osW0s350Z5_ltlOln8fCm2b_kDYzHp5maJYNJlzlN5BZvWmJupnWwkTkYDFGl6kOvPOcSPq96-basM%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=695ca06f20894ea4a80ff8505d36acd7&_e=Erz_eYJnm_OVghYUEkUBFN4BlXx_womvq8VhISs1ka3ZtLScR_obwM0STfYWWr5n7rtfgth8EvL3yGiSMR-K6xrvjmV8yV3ZXB8rEPZPU5c8A2i5o43PDGyffMLiF3GTZkOT3uLafz7aU6dsixDcMIS8DuZdIBKJe5B85n2q7DMNhrMGZ68RHymbzr7-Bd8RdCNt2R6gnKwi0vSbAU3Y0FW8hdalgB5B4i6vMBMTEll5uHrs6lDAKDSERzlZfo1eC8toWRrVMTkLehcRMl1yfFgbLfoyxtDyk9z0QNv8PTM%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=695ca06f20894ea4a80ff8505d36acd7&_e=Erz_eYJnm_OVghYUEkUBFN4BlXx_womvq8VhISs1ka3ZtLScR_obwM0STfYWWr5n7rtfgth8EvL3yGiSMR-K6xrvjmV8yV3ZXB8rEPZPU5c8A2i5o43PDGyffMLiF3GTYeTyxFzKhqk58-GQgl2SDPqEP680kCVqBjtLKxPftrP265mpzVNm3supVHF8X58bqOUbjEj8u6Spia5oOxOA5qy_-C3m27DjSN3X_QF4RgbaEAN392YdL15lZoqZiRhdCZFbFWui8JXgdQkaokXdU4EFkAo_dthy0fC7_o3BbNQ%3D)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=695ca06f20894ea4a80ff8505d36acd7&_e=Erz_eYJnm_OVghYUEkUBFN4BlXx_womvq8VhISs1ka3ZtLScR_obwM0STfYWWr5n7rtfgth8EvL3yGiSMR-K6xrvjmV8yV3ZXB8rEPZPU5c8A2i5o43PDGyffMLiF3GTse-zKsb7in6TJWoj56BcSbS1ET8ZaPtP909NNqZ1eIyyDZRH-dJqaYaXlBdjiilYZNtv4pXk8VVOuCt69oRpgKEVi-OkLzDwl74ii9VdSrhyG9m-Un6LgqZ3KM9gGfUw7j6r_Zph5J9JDrGukY8zTbrciRo3SJtk3Ihp215-4aY%3D)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=695ca06f20894ea4a80ff8505d36acd7&_e=Erz_eYJnm_OVghYUEkUBFN4BlXx_womvq8VhISs1ka3ZtLScR_obwM0STfYWWr5n7rtfgth8EvL3yGiSMR-K6xrvjmV8yV3ZXB8rEPZPU5c8A2i5o43PDGyffMLiF3GTZkOT3uLafz7aU6dsixDcMB8eWWITkEkMYqCDcsmHNaBRn5g3NBvxyOZwpWEET4JEJCLVmjkvl6w43YBiURGct6Xy8rbdhZu2B6Xf-FHHJdM9SwDHI82PMHrf2fHCaHtLLEttHMptqTRipX3B1DuLAAwBfp7zHrsC9R_-F2UjSfA%3D)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

Reclaiming American Freedom

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: David Horowitz
subject: Investigate Biden
body:
Joe Biden may be coming after you next...

| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Joe Biden may be coming after you next... He's weaponized the federal government to attack his political enemies and I need your help to stop him. [**That 's****why I 'm asking you to sign the SELECT COMMITTEE TO INVESTIGATE BIDEN'S ABUSES OF POWER Petition right now.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=98de946289424626b8f802911b51b5aa&_e=vIfVhMdtwoW-hWiLIOC0lQpgVCR0E3W4oOwqojDZuq98mTc1mvOELO_veE-aP7DbBvWX8R-fyevm_-1Om50bEhP7kUGqPV4UP7xXNeilGtWZB8kZoTJrN3np03PsJX_GFU84f6qNLqZaIby8xScyGpsEZYFiXGCsbVlOdg8KmZ22FGQiJBSQonUh-CkFrCnxg6C3PEn1aaq-o8Q1Rp1AHrH3Gt3JOMr0dt5LVEi7J6h-9dhVgV2efOlciHtdxEVL6bgAdhuB4_umK7V4BX0h5XLD-xz4E5lC7gXoszcqxx9w8xB4tfHL2sOVg0pvtO1-B0GsslogPa9MP5D7DC9MMoLABpocrLsNKkrMIewBpTkCyAHcVk16QZRhvyrCiaH0T7oFtq-l3jBggwFR9_1kNA%3D%3D) Just look at what's happened in the past few months:
---
* Biden's FBI used the Counterterrorism Division to conduct investigations into innocent parents protesting at school board meetings.
* Biden's IRS is continuing to target and attack conservatives while allowing liberal groups like BLM to break the law.
* Biden's Attorney General "personally approved" the unprecedented raid on President Trump's home. And now he's been indicted and arrested on bogus charges in New York City.
* Biden's full-armed SWAT units are being used to arrest peaceful pro-life supporters.

---
These kinds of abuses of power are usually only seen in third-world dictatorships... But this is an organized effort across the government to intimidate Biden's political opponents and silence anyone who disagrees with them. And we have to stop it. [**That 's why I'm asking you to sign the SELECT COMMITTEE TO INVESTIGATE BIDEN'S ABUSES OF POWER Petition.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=98de946289424626b8f802911b51b5aa&_e=vIfVhMdtwoW-hWiLIOC0lQpgVCR0E3W4oOwqojDZuq98mTc1mvOELO_veE-aP7DbBvWX8R-fyevm_-1Om50bEhP7kUGqPV4UP7xXNeilGtWZB8kZoTJrN3np03PsJX_GFU84f6qNLqZaIby8xScyGpsEZYFiXGCsbVlOdg8KmZ22FGQiJBSQonUh-CkFrCnxg6C3PEn1aaq-o8Q1Rp1AHrH3Gt3JOMr0dt5LVEi7J6h-9dhVgV2efOlciHtdxEVLs24C5QerCCUfURzUgYvpnsG7ZaQLl0ux-YdNmPF5wNkUNerrd5gd4HbsJnUt9aMedhL8HXa5O2TAGAXPDq1BPY2nLQ3R-TMcrAH3obtfl4xOeVErdysgZS7q__A6LoQrGAuzaniS_7SExW-CfQb5DA%3D%3D) Biden has declared war on America's conservatives. He's taken neutral law enforcement organizations and turned them into weapons of partisan politics. Only in Biden's America can people who burn down police stations, attack courthouses and destroy statues walk free... ... While elderly pro-life activists are surrounded and arrested by dozens of fully-armed FBI agents. It's insanity. I never thought I'd see something like that here in America... But this is where we are. Biden is weaponizing the government and if we don't fight back NOW, it's only going to get worse - [**so****please follow this link to sign the Petition right now.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=98de946289424626b8f802911b51b5aa&_e=vIfVhMdtwoW-hWiLIOC0lQpgVCR0E3W4oOwqojDZuq98mTc1mvOELO_veE-aP7DbBvWX8R-fyevm_-1Om50bEhP7kUGqPV4UP7xXNeilGtWZB8kZoTJrN3np03PsJX_GFU84f6qNLqZaIby8xScyGpsEZYFiXGCsbVlOdg8KmZ22FGQiJBSQonUh-CkFrCnxg6C3PEn1aaq-o8Q1Rp1AHrH3Gt3JOMr0dt5LVEi7J6h-9dhVgV2efOlciHtdxEVLWI_VFEOI5-XBOZefq5BX2BMZqZEQYWrXocqtTZ-k-BBlm49F7y7N-YUtKrUjeIWVOl53kBYiGWu4KEiIZ0GKdY_1wy09yfoP3ANDAdOSfe4rYOgdvIFAyTcLC3Ts6xQBOm0KKyyRdxiBHyO98nQ5Og%3D%3D) My friend, the Left will not stop. If they can't win debating the message - they destroy the messenger. So, they attack. And attack. And attack. We must force Biden to answer for his crimes -- and a House Select Committee investigation is the best way for his abuses to see the light of day and hold him accountable. [**So****please sign the SELECT COMMITTEE TO INVESTIGATE BIDEN 'S ABUSES OF POWER Petition right now.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=98de946289424626b8f802911b51b5aa&_e=vIfVhMdtwoW-hWiLIOC0lQpgVCR0E3W4oOwqojDZuq98mTc1mvOELO_veE-aP7DbBvWX8R-fyevm_-1Om50bEhP7kUGqPV4UP7xXNeilGtWZB8kZoTJrN3np03PsJX_GFU84f6qNLqZaIby8xScyGpsEZYFiXGCsbVlOdg8KmZ22FGQiJBSQonUh-CkFrCnxg6C3PEn1aaq-o8Q1Rp1AHrH3Gt3JOMr0dt5LVEi7J6h-9dhVgV2efOlciHtdxEVLRWiBku2FzTDNQpxcBzPAdOuLY8Twzi_XDCA5psfM0-OBwUPqDyHiUIJ2dUZwxSnoUjED5d0jyS4piAW2lolRNTQ8xJ2ogrvMt8IDaaur4IJ4Emuo2t_9eiQcKPfuWwsq9w-_tP15cvEpLxyj8yZfEg%3D%3D) There isn't a better group than the Freedom Center to lead this fight. You see, I was a leader in the radical Left movement in the 1960's and 1970's. I know their playbook - because I helped write it. Now I'm working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left's tactics against them - we fight fire with fire - and we win. And because of our success, they hate us. Like President Trump, we've faced countless attacks from the Left:
---
* They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on).
* We had to find a new bank after the local bank we've been at for years suddenly closed our accounts.
* The hotel we've held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly decided not to renew our contract.

---
No other group has faced these kinds of attacks because the radical Left fears us and our work. You see, we NEVER back down and we hit them where it hurts... but to stop Biden's abuses of power I need your help. That's why I'm asking you to do two things for me. [**The****first is to sign the SELECT COMMITTEE TO INVESTIGATE BIDEN 'S ABUSES OF POWER Petition.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=98de946289424626b8f802911b51b5aa&_e=vIfVhMdtwoW-hWiLIOC0lQpgVCR0E3W4oOwqojDZuq98mTc1mvOELO_veE-aP7DbBvWX8R-fyevm_-1Om50bEhP7kUGqPV4UP7xXNeilGtWZB8kZoTJrN3np03PsJX_GFU84f6qNLqZaIby8xScyGpsEZYFiXGCsbVlOdg8KmZ22FGQiJBSQonUh-CkFrCnxg6C3PEn1aaq-o8Q1Rp1AHrH3Gt3JOMr0dt5LVEi7J6h-9dhVgV2efOlciHtdxEVLjh2so2sUIhq8cr_iOVxAWU1fLWtf6XMgAGUFAvZ7urQkS_yyqDphGBOErg-te3Y6ZTOKTEyxdKHrpWlXB4NDGKGL_1MQRHeVKwXBds86aQmMgLXRxrHIVwAfVyyVg_KI2kVUXX4i2Y7geWk3vwVeLA%3D%3D) Your name will be sent along with one million others and sent to Republican Caucus leader Kevin McCarthy demanding he creates a Select Committee to Investigate Biden's abuses of power. [**The****second favor I 'm asking of you today is to make an urgent one-time donation of $23 with your signed Petition.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=98de946289424626b8f802911b51b5aa&_e=vIfVhMdtwoW-hWiLIOC0lQpgVCR0E3W4oOwqojDZuq98mTc1mvOELO_veE-aP7DbBvWX8R-fyevm_-1Om50bEhP7kUGqPV4UP7xXNeilGtWZB8kZoTJrN3np03PsJX_GFU84f6qNLqZaIby8xScyGpsEZYFiXGCsbVlOdg8KmZ22FGQiJBSQonUh-CkFrCnxg6C3PEn1aaq-o8Q1Rp1AHrH3Gt3JOMr0dt5LVEi7J6h-9dhVgV2efOlciHtdxEVLKiAhvREA0UeHbgn0zYbSEPo-DMorh2EuVn5PHlRAWo3vtQklncVsKnMvRyNYvJOGIdoQ8lq87_WUOhIVBv-zlVs9jDwGeNmfJsOQUdk3FmEMA9zj76s-yrccobQb8Hl_c9BsqshJUbSsuUGKyIpVBQ%3D%3D) Your $23 one-time donation will be used to send an additional 44 **SELECT COMMITTEE TO INVESTIGATE BIDEN 'S ABUSES OF POWER **Petitions to like-minded patriots across the country. The only way we're going to stop Joe Biden is with an overwhelming campaign across America. That's why your $23 donation is so critical. We must bring more people to our cause and get them to join our fight. And I'm sorry, but we cannot wait or delay -- we must act now. [**That 's****why if you 're blessed enough to make a larger donation of $35, $50, $100 or more I would be eternally grateful.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=98de946289424626b8f802911b51b5aa&_e=vIfVhMdtwoW-hWiLIOC0lQpgVCR0E3W4oOwqojDZuq98mTc1mvOELO_veE-aP7DbBvWX8R-fyevm_-1Om50bEhP7kUGqPV4UP7xXNeilGtWZB8kZoTJrN3np03PsJX_GFU84f6qNLqZaIby8xScyGpsEZYFiXGCsbVlOdg8KmZ22FGQiJBSQonUh-CkFrCnxg6C3PEn1aaq-o8Q1Rp1AHrH3Gt3JOMr0dt5LVEi7J6h-9dhVgV2efOlciHtdxEVL9pbcb4wZsyGVALx2g0Rs7BA1Mh2qz8r4a_n94rw1tnEJfCDmSm7EDz4z0wgUZgCRcy-dS_8dnyR8E7rAS9VXADtT4TuxWom8X1xqMtFkn8DGXDTYslEUZORL-lqnaXx8J3-EsvHlv4Xq1RX2h67Rgw%3D%3D) Just know that your one-time donation of $23, $50, $100 or more will be put to immediate use stopping Joe Biden's abuses of power, because nothing is more important... If they can go after a former President and a peaceful pro-life father who have done nothing wrong - you could be next, so please rush back your signed Petition right away.
---
| | For America,
---
---
David Horowitz
---

clean_body: Joe Biden may be coming after you next... | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Joe Biden may be coming after you next... He's weaponized the federal government to attack his political enemies and I need your help to stop him. Just look at what's happened in the past few months: Biden's FBI used the Counterterrorism Division to conduct investigations into innocent parents protesting at school board meetings. Biden's IRS is continuing to target and attack conservatives while allowing liberal groups like BLM to break the law. Biden's Attorney General "personally approved" the unprecedented raid on President Trump's home. And now he's been indicted and arrested on bogus charges in New York City. Biden's full-armed SWAT units are being used to arrest peaceful pro-life supporters. These kinds of abuses of power are usually only seen in third-world dictatorships... But this is an organized effort across the government to intimidate Biden's political opponents and silence anyone who disagrees with them. And we have to stop it. Biden has declared war on America's conservatives. He's taken neutral law enforcement organizations and turned them into weapons of partisan politics. Only in Biden's America can people who burn down police stations, attack courthouses and destroy statues walk free... ... While elderly pro-life activists are surrounded and arrested by dozens of fully-armed FBI agents. It's insanity. I never thought I'd see something like that here in America... But this is where we are. Biden is weaponizing the government and if we don't fight back NOW, it's only going to get worse - My friend, the Left will not stop. If they can't win debating the message - they destroy the messenger. So, they attack. And attack. And attack. We must force Biden to answer for his crimes -- and a House Select Committee investigation is the best way for his abuses to see the light of day and hold him accountable. There isn't a better group than the Freedom Center to lead this fight. You see, I was a leader in the radical Left movement in the 1960's and 1970's. I know their playbook - because I helped write it. Now I'm working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left's tactics against them - we fight fire with fire - and we win. And because of our success, they hate us. Like President Trump, we've faced countless attacks from the Left: They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on). We had to find a new bank after the local bank we've been at for years suddenly closed our accounts. The hotel we've held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly decided not to renew our contract. No other group has faced these kinds of attacks because the radical Left fears us and our work. You see, we NEVER back down and we hit them where it hurts... but to stop Biden's abuses of power I need your help. That's why I'm asking you to do two things for me. Your name will be sent along with one million others and sent to Republican Caucus leader Kevin McCarthy demanding he creates a Select Committee to Investigate Biden's abuses of power. Your $23 one-time donation will be used to send an additional 44 SELECT COMMITTEE TO INVESTIGATE BIDEN 'S ABUSES OF POWER Petitions to like-minded patriots across the country. The only way we're going to stop Joe Biden is with an overwhelming campaign across America. That's why your $23 donation is so critical. We must bring more people to our cause and get them to join our fight. And I'm sorry, but we cannot wait or delay -- we must act now. Just know that your one-time donation of $23, $50, $100 or more will be put to immediate use stopping Joe Biden's abuses of power, because nothing is more important... If they can go after a former President and a peaceful pro-life father who have done nothing wrong - you could be next, so please rush back your signed Petition right away. | | For America, David Horowitz | | P.S. Joe Biden has weaponized our government and is using it as a tool to attack and destroy his political enemies. With your support today we can use Congress to make him pay for his constant abuses of power.
