name: Ron DeSantis for President
subject: Here’s How I Defeat Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWTvq9JDNm

I wanted you to be one of the first people to know about this.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWTvq9JDNm

Friend,

It's official: I'M IN.

I'm
running for President of the United States.

JOIN ME

Have you ever noticed how often Joe Biden tries to take potshots
at Florida?

It's because he HATES what we're doing in the Sunshine State.

While he pushes the woke agenda, we're fighting back with
freedom.

Joe
Biden is taking the country in the wrong direction. But I know I
can turn it around.

The
American people know it, too. That's why they are ALREADY voting
with their feet. Our population is booming in the free state of
Florida.

Now, I want to put that choice on the ballot-but I need your
support.

We
sometimes take freedom for granted. You should not do that after
the last few years. It is contested, and we have seen it wither
on the vine in many places in our country.

But
Florida was different. We chose facts over fear. We chose
education over indoctrination. We chose law and order over
rioting and disorder. Florida was a refuge of sanity when the
world went mad.

We
held the line when freedom hung in the balance.

We
showed that we can - and must - revitalize America.

I
believe freedom is worth fighting for, and as your next President
I promise I will never stop fighting for your freedom. Will you
fight alongside me?

YES, I'M READY TO WIN

And
we can win, friend.

I'll make sure we have an economy that works for working
families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much
more. The battle won't be easy and will require a lot of toil and
sweat to get it all done. I'm excited to share my agenda for
America with you over the course of this campaign.

But
here's why I'm writing you today, friend: I want to ask you to
become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join
our first team tele-townhall.

I
promise you, unlike other campaigns, our grassroots fundraising
program is built on the principle that our donors are a part of
our team, not our personal piggybank.

I
vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake
matches, and no lies.

Can
I count on you?

DONATE NOW

In
Freedom,

Ron
DeSantis

Meet Ron DeSantis

A native Floridian with
blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked
his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors
and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also
graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard,
he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During
his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a
U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in
Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military
decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service
and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron
also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and
convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and
advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget
amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose
malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their
authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion
conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading
champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the
VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron
is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television
host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters,
Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

name: Darcy Draeger, Executive Director
subject: I’d like to introduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
Hey there,I’m Darcy Draeger and I’m the Executive Director of Districts for Democracy.

A few months ago, when Tom Malinowski founded D4D to fight rising extremism and protect New Jersey’s public schools, he asked if I would help. I immediately said yes because I can’t imagine a more important fight and one that we absolutely must win.

I’ve never been one for half-measures. At UBS, I took on my first independent analysis project and over the next decade grew it into an award-winning database managing regulatory implementation for the firm’s Global Equities research division.

I loved my career, and between that and my family, had little bandwidth for anything else. The 2016 election changed my priorities. Before, I assumed “someone” was working “somewhere” to make the world better. After, I realized that person needed to be me.

So I got involved. I restarted our local Democratic municipal committee; I ran for office (and lost, then did it again two more times); and in 2018 I met Tom, who was thinking about running for Congress. And as they say, the rest is history.

Working as the Morris County chair for Tom’s congressional campaigns gave me the chance to spend hundreds of hours in the field, knocking on doors in communities all over New Jersey. I know the best way to represent folks and address their concerns is to start by asking questions and then listening to what they say.

In 2022, one issue that kept cropping up was a growing concern about extremist school boards, whose members were working in opposition to teachers, and using national culture wars to divide our communities. Even Tom’s opponent climbed on board this disinformation train and went on Fox News to claim that second grade teachers in New Jersey were exposing their students to pornography.

It’s inexcusable. But the reality is that people really care about kids and schools, and are thus extraordinarily vulnerable to misinformation and manipulation.

I saw it happen in my own town, where candidates endorsed by the national right-wing group “Moms for Liberty” went door to door mischaracterizing NJ health curriculum standards and ginning up all sorts of fear and anger. They won, and now our school board meetings include discussions of installing “kill boxes” and bulletproof glass at the middle school, while some members of the regional high school board support removing books from the advanced English program that center on LGBTQ+ protagonists.

I’ve seen first-hand that living in a “blue state” will not shield us from national groups bent on weakening our truly excellent public schools, destabilizing our communities, and turning us against one another.

School board elections have been and must remain non-partisan exercises. We need candidates who support our teachers, who defend freedom of expression, and who will ensure our schools are not for one, or some, but for all kids, all families, everywhere.

Over the coming weeks and months, Districts for Democracy will be sharing information with you all about local schools that need your support, candidates we’re working to help, and ways you can get involved.

I look forward to working together on this mission. The stakes couldn’t be higher, but I know that together this is a fight we can — and will —win.

Thank you for joining me on this journey.

Darcy Draeger
Executive Director

P.S. Missions like this one are funded by the generosity of grassroots donors like you who care about the work that we’re doing to protect our schools and children from extremist agenda. If you can, would you consider chipping in a few dollars to help out today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfd-2305]
Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States.

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/districts-for-democracy-email?recurring=true] DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/districts-for-democracy-email?recurring=true]

Ringoes, NJ 08851-0001
United States

**JUST** REAL **NEWS**

---

The corporate news media wants your attention, and they'll do unscrupulous things to get it.

We don't work for them. We work for you (for free*).

^ more on that in a minute

**First, Ask yourself:**
1. | Wouldn't it be nice to trust the news I'm reading?
---|---
2. | Wouldn't it be even better if trustworthy news came straight to me instead of sifting the internet for a nugget or two of un-biased information??
3. | How much time have I wasted digging through an avalanche of stories across the Internet to figure out what's true and important?

[There is a better way!](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14655%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zSDph8S3jIjA0k%2fOc6jI%2bA&sysid=1)

Without the hidden agenda, slant, or bias, our talented team of editors dig through hundreds of sources and pull out the most important news of the day - so you don't have to. You know it's bad when half of the American people decided national news organizations simply want to mislead, misinform, and push biased opinions on the American public.

This massive shift happening in the American Media is a good thing. The corporate elite news media has lost the trust of the American people.

subject: It’s going to be a long fight, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
(If you are with us, then you will understand why we can’t let up now)
#

| | | **[DONATE $10](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/2102?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.nsqsEc&refcode=em230527-1-f&t=1&akid=660%2E734936%2Ej1NbXy)**
---
****
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.79Akcp&refcode=em230527-1-f&t=2&akid=660%2E734936%2Ej1NbXy)**
---
Peter - Our end of month deadline is in just 4 days. We are quickly running out of time to reach our fundraising goals.

We know you are receiving a lot of emails. Trust us, we don’t like to send this many, but we need to ask for your help again today.

Senate races are notoriously expensive. The thing that sets Ruben apart is that our campaign is powered by small dollar donations, mostly $5, $10, or $20, from working Arizonans and other Americans who want to fight to keep the Senate blue.

Because make no mistake, it will be a fight, Peter. All the way to the bitter end. And at the finish line is a vote to protect abortion rights, voting rights and uplift our veterans.

**_If we are going to keep up with Kari Lake and Kyrsten Sinema, we need to keep our momentum. And that’s where you come in, Peter._**

[**What do you say? Can you make a $3 donation to our grassroots campaign before our May deadline? Use this link or the buttons below to donate today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.79Akcp&refcode=em230527-1-f&t=3&akid=660%2E734936%2Ej1NbXy)

Thank you - Ruben Gallego for Senate

name: Andrew Wexton
subject: A happy birthday (and anniversary!) to my incredible wife
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63900533/408358526/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230527BD_N_AW_FULL_7_G_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTJkMzVjZS04ZmZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c2udDN6c9ZqkUnpSWhYnS2vEuzA6ERVvATeAQAPY-8w=)
---
Today is very special:

**It's Jennifer's birthday, and it's also our 22nd wedding anniversary.** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63900534/408358527/-2052572658?ms=EM_PET_230527BD_N_AW_FULL_7_G_N_P1&refcode=EM_PET_230527BD_N_AW_FULL_7_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTJkMzVjZS04ZmZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c2udDN6c9ZqkUnpSWhYnS2vEuzA6ERVvATeAQAPY-8w=&emci=3c1c20a8-d8fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b52d35ce-8ffc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) Simple words cannot express the joy it's been to spend my life and raise a family with Jennifer. Her kindness, warmth, tenacity, and integrity are always on display — no matter what challenges she faces.

I want to surprise her later today with an e-card signed by her strongest supporters – to show her just how appreciated she is by all the people in Northern Virginia that she works for tirelessly. [**Please, will you add your name to wish Jennifer a happy birthday?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63900535/408358528/-2052572658?ms=EM_PET_230527BD_N_AW_FULL_7_G_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230527BD_N_AW_FULL_7_G_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTJkMzVjZS04ZmZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c2udDN6c9ZqkUnpSWhYnS2vEuzA6ERVvATeAQAPY-8w=&emci=3c1c20a8-d8fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b52d35ce-8ffc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63900536/408358529/-2052572658?ms=EM_PET_230527BD_N_AW_FULL_7_G_N_P2&refcode=EM_PET_230527BD_N_AW_FULL_7_G_N_P2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTJkMzVjZS04ZmZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c2udDN6c9ZqkUnpSWhYnS2vEuzA6ERVvATeAQAPY-8w=&emci=3c1c20a8-d8fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b52d35ce-8ffc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) Jennifer fights so hard for so many. She proudly defends our democratic institutions, champions equality and freedom, and stands for policies that provide relief and opportunity for the families who need it. And through it all, she continues to be an amazing mother to our boys and the best life partner I could ask for. I can only hope our next 22 years together are as wonderful as the last 22.

I'm so glad that the people of VA-10 have been able to see how incredible Jennifer is for the past few years — the same incredible person who I'm blessed to call the love of my life.

I know she'll be so overjoyed to see the well-wishes of her grassroots supporters, so if you have a second, [**please click here to sign your name and wish Jennifer a happy birthday!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63900537/408358530/-2052572658?ms=EM_PET_230527BD_N_AW_FULL_7_G_N_L2&refcode=EM_PET_230527BD_N_AW_FULL_7_G_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTJkMzVjZS04ZmZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c2udDN6c9ZqkUnpSWhYnS2vEuzA6ERVvATeAQAPY-8w=&emci=3c1c20a8-d8fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b52d35ce-8ffc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)

Thank you,

Andrew Wexton | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63900538/408358531/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230527BD_N_AW_FULL_7_G_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTJkMzVjZS04ZmZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c2udDN6c9ZqkUnpSWhYnS2vEuzA6ERVvATeAQAPY-8w=)****

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ron=20DeSantis?=
subject: Trust me when I say that you are not our piggybank
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I hate how some politicians are treating their supporters. That’s why I’m changing the narrative with this campaign.

https://secure.winred.com/desantis/great-american-comeback-av?utm_source=_&utm_medium=em_p&utm_campaign=2023-05-26__AdVict_ha_rd_AdVictorium_HowWereDifferent_HowWereDifferent_greatamericancomebackav_fr_

Hello Peter,

A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They’re probably making you feel terrible if you don’t contribute too, aren’t they?

At Team DeSantis we’re taking a different approach.

Our entire fundraising & digital program’s foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank.

Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can’t afford it.

You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating.

No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.

That’s what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House.

If that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of today then please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford. (https://secure.winred.com/desantis/great-american-comeback-av?utm_source=_&utm_medium=em_p&utm_campaign=2023-05-26__AdVict_ha_rd_AdVictorium_HowWereDifferent_HowWereDifferent_greatamericancomebackav_fr_)
Chip in $15 (https://secure.winred.com/desantis/great-american-comeback-av?utm_source=_&utm_medium=em_p&utm_campaign=2023-05-26__AdVict_ha_rd_AdVictorium_HowWereDifferent_HowWereDifferent_greatamericancomebackav_fr_)
Chip in $25 (https://secure.winred.com/desantis/great-american-comeback-av?utm_source=_&utm_medium=em_p&utm_campaign=2023-05-26__AdVict_ha_rd_AdVictorium_HowWereDifferent_HowWereDifferent_greatamericancomebackav_fr_)
Chip in $47 (https://secure.winred.com/desantis/great-american-comeback-av?utm_source=_&utm_medium=em_p&utm_campaign=2023-05-26__AdVict_ha_rd_AdVictorium_HowWereDifferent_HowWereDifferent_greatamericancomebackav_fr_)
Chip in $75 (https://secure.winred.com/desantis/great-american-comeback-av?utm_source=_&utm_medium=em_p&utm_campaign=2023-05-26__AdVict_ha_rd_AdVictorium_HowWereDifferent_HowWereDifferent_greatamericancomebackav_fr_)
Chip in $100 (https://secure.winred.com/desantis/great-american-comeback-av?utm_source=_&utm_medium=em_p&utm_campaign=2023-05-26__AdVict_ha_rd_AdVictorium_HowWereDifferent_HowWereDifferent_greatamericancomebackav_fr_)
Chip in $250 (https://secure.winred.com/desantis/great-american-comeback-av?utm_source=_&utm_medium=em_p&utm_campaign=2023-05-26__AdVict_ha_rd_AdVictorium_HowWereDifferent_HowWereDifferent_greatamericancomebackav_fr_)
Chip in ANY AMOUNT to join Team DeSantis (https://secure.winred.com/desantis/great-american-comeback-av?utm_source=_&utm_medium=em_p&utm_campaign=2023-05-26__AdVict_ha_rd_AdVictorium_HowWereDifferent_HowWereDifferent_greatamericancomebackav_fr_)
Let’s show the country we love that we’re willing to fight for it.

Chip in today to join Team DeSantis.

Yours in freedom,
https://secure.winred.com/desantis/great-american-comeback-av?utm_source=_&utm_medium=em_p&utm_campaign=2023-05-26__AdVict_ha_rd_AdVictorium_HowWereDifferent_HowWereDifferent_greatamericancomebackav_fr_
Ron DeSantis

Meet Ron DeSantis
https://secure.winred.com/desantis/great-american-comeback-av?utm_source=_&utm_medium=em_p&utm_campaign=2023-05-26__AdVict_ha_rd_AdVictorium_HowWereDifferent_HowWereDifferent_greatamericancomebackav_fr_
A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America’s veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President
PO Box 3696
Tallahassee, FL 32315

body:
One by one, residents of this district are joining Callie’s fight for the First. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63902897/408368165/1201310784?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230527eom1_kp_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmFjYzcwNGMtOTNmYy1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4ZlJJ9S2Bfp9SJPZjsEwGAtIIJ0r2ka2HReVfPoTr4I=&emci=f1fea62f-ddfb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6acc704c-93fc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9697413)

Hey Peter, Nearly two months into this race, **Callie is surprising folks with the strength of the campaign she’s running.** People across the district are moved by Callie’s story as a young military spouse turned advocate for those left behind. They’re inspired by her dedication to this district — the very community in which she was born and raised (and, yes, ran track in high school!). And they’re motivated by her passion to deliver real representation in Washington after six years of Jack Bergman. **One by one, residents of this district are joining Callie’s fight for the First.** I know it might seem early to talk about the election, but one of the most important things we can do now is build Callie’s war chest so she can compete next November. The funds we raise now help us build our campaign so that we can get our positive message out to voters and help turnout the vote. **Taking on an incumbent is a tough challenge — but you and I know Callie is up for anything. And she needs you on her side now.** **[Could you chip in whatever you’re able — $5, $10, or $25 — before we close the books on this month? We need all hands on deck to stay on track with our ambitious fundraising goals.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63902898/408368166/-621152178?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230527eom1_kp_full_xx_li&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmFjYzcwNGMtOTNmYy1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4ZlJJ9S2Bfp9SJPZjsEwGAtIIJ0r2ka2HReVfPoTr4I=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: One by one, residents of this district are joining Callie’s fight for the First. | Hey Peter, Nearly two months into this race, Callie is surprising folks with the strength of the campaign she’s running. People across the district are moved by Callie’s story as a young military spouse turned advocate for those left behind. They’re inspired by her dedication to this district — the very community in which she was born and raised (and, yes, ran track in high school!). And they’re motivated by her passion to deliver real representation in Washington after six years of Jack Bergman. One by one, residents of this district are joining Callie’s fight for the First. I know it might seem early to talk about the election, but one of the most important things we can do now is build Callie’s war chest so she can compete next November. The funds we raise now help us build our campaign so that we can get our positive message out to voters and help turnout the vote. Taking on an incumbent is a tough challenge — but you and I know Callie is up for anything. And she needs you on her side now. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for all you're doing to flip this seat and have Callie's back, Kristy with Callie Barr for Congress | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. name: Emily Busch
subject: So excited to have Ben on board
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS
body:
Did you get a chance to meet Ben? I couldn’t be more thrilled to have him aboard, and I know with his proven experience and leadership, he can help keep this campaign on track to defeat John James. | | | Peter,Did you get a chance to meet Ben? I couldn’t be more thrilled to have him aboard, and I know with his proven experience and leadership, he can help keep this campaign on track to defeat John James.Running for office is tough, but having someone like Ben on board takes a huge weight off of my shoulders, and I cannot wait for you all to hear from him more!**[The first deadline with Ben on the campaign is coming up next wednesday, so chip in $30 now to help him and Team Emily hit this goal!](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=152e7a2e94cd4d4c944b06539272ac74&_e=3yaEq8LEuVziX9LS9Fxhdzg7KsYIBLzDMweivjMF-a0XdNcAV4EtcO93fJFfXVmdn3pRkFULvaguOd1yUjqlnNNB9My760V1x9sJOLObUegS7IM-cVtnJTQe1DQh3nhyyLoveMCYFSizv9_IAe4XfznkM-B5Ifwz3rkTvrSBwM4bDA4LjCVJxKwH3nPlRF_bxhzCjESskeDqIpBRb-BCFD3oMTNK5Zf1UNw0LEHNzKPmGhhezLl4bc3ewmLR1vfv7G-tK30oRJVHm3OLwc8WqvEMD-HOl8DQH-sMeWM2SnkhgxxmNCpQprrzH_prM6v0Gz5xjvcjKdSWZuOnoDQNB3U0B5QtHdhjXCkfGYKnMgrPuOuov3Lk6bjEjy3rhufafJmYRb2PQzvu--Jz9mEZ-vDV1XGVc09MHOsf7YaVj-TKYq43aV844V7EtW7iWV2J)** – Emily\------ Original Message ------ [](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=152e7a2e94cd4d4c944b06539272ac74&_e=3yaEq8LEuVziX9LS9Fxhdzg7KsYIBLzDMweivjMF-a0XdNcAV4EtcO93fJFfXVmdn3pRkFULvaguOd1yUjqlnNNB9My760V1x9sJOLObUegS7IM-cVtnJTQe1DQh3nhyyLoveMCYFSizv9_IAe4XfznkM-B5Ifwz3rkTvrSBwM4bDA4LjCVJxKwH3nPlRF_bxhzCjESskeDqIpBRb-BCFD3oMTNK5Zf1UNw0LEHNzKPmGhhezLl4bc3ewmLR1vfvXUtfpzUss1dO8K_3UPThU0LoKKYarF1FAwNGzy0oylOzyBcR8W3VngdQPuM7JjiJvK7ohsamdc1H_l2l5_xoV4fpQV6yjV9ezwEiA5sKEbzVOiAWWLXW0VSQz494kuMxSPPK1VmnXkPwqKHaLRzd4FYe4mriRP4_FdVQlVuEVK0%3D) Hey Peter – my name is Ben, and I am happy to a part of #TeamEmily as the Finance Director!Before I introduce myself, we have a $5,000 end-of-month goal to hit by May 31st, and it’s my FIRST deadline working on the campaign! **[Can you chip in whatever you can to help us reach this goal?](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=152e7a2e94cd4d4c944b06539272ac74&_e=3yaEq8LEuVziX9LS9Fxhdzg7KsYIBLzDMweivjMF-a0XdNcAV4EtcO93fJFfXVmdn3pRkFULvaguOd1yUjqlnNNB9My760V1x9sJOLObUegS7IM-cVtnJTQe1DQh3nhyyLoveMCYFSizv9_IAe4XfznkM-B5Ifwz3rkTvrSBwM4bDA4LjCVJxKwH3nPlRF_bxhzCjESskeDqIpBRb-BCFD3oMTNK5Zf1UNw0LEHNzKPmGhhezLl4bc3ewmLR1vfvXUtfpzUss1dO8K_3UPThUzTgorlYZqFOHeQ4asqPoQMkwVvl8dMD7PcqYKYFIY7FtEJhjx_mDdX2p7jvCIoXBjW1HvQ20bOO_WT7se4g6U-X_Lo1kpIEzjZEySWRWeMDrGuczuVCKw9SFdTINg_W6EwRIHL8pkYfotpNwiR5bag%3D)** I could not be more grateful to be a part of this campaign. Emily’s message is a powerful one, and I have no doubt in my mind that she will be one of the loudest voices in Congress when it comes to gun safety and reform once elected.Now that I’m on board, I cannot wait to get started! I’m determined to hit this month’s fundraising goal, and every goal that follows.**[We must hit this $5,000 goal by Wednesday to ensure we are in a good position for the rest of the quarter. name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: holding the line (3 min update)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Holding the line on debt limit, holding the FBI and DOJ accountable, securing the border, combatting fentanyl | |
---
| | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a82f2bc679&e=1050d051da)
---
| Friend,

It's Jake LaTurner here. On Monday, our nation will pause to honor the men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedom. God Bless our servicemembers, past and present, for risking everything to preserve our American values.

I spent this week holding the line on the debt limit negotiations, pushing back on the left's dangerous open-border policies, working to get politics out of the DOJ and FBI, and passing legislation to combat the fentanyl epidemic.

Thanks to all your help, we are **FINALLY** getting America back on track. I am so grateful for your trust and support.

Yours in the fight,
Jake
---
|
---
| **HOLDING THE LINE ON THE DEBT LIMIT**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=1b066a7dfe&e=1050d051da)
---
| _CLICK[HERE](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=c0c8c7f2a5&e=1050d051da) TO WATCH THE FULL INTERVIEW_
---
| For over 100 days, Joe Biden refused to negotiate with Republicans on the debt limit. Joe Biden, Hakeem Jeffries, and Chuck Schumer **NEVER** thought Speaker McCarthy would be able to pass a commonsense, conservative plan out of the House of Representatives—but we proved the liberals wrong. House Republicans passed a package to responsibly raise the debt ceiling and end the far-left's reckless spending addiction.

_Now the White House wants to raise taxes as part of the deal._**That's NOT going to happen.**__

I am standing strong and holding the line. If we are going to raise the debt limit, we need a deal that cuts federal spending and includes conservative policies to unleash the American economy. [**[WATCH MY INTERVIEW ON FOX BUSINESS HERE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f4d2d5796e&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **DEMANDING THE FBI COMPLY WITH HOUSE OVERSIGHT SUBPOENA**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=c066f96a81&e=1050d051da)
---
| _CLICK [HERE](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=5c47e69927&e=1050d051da) TO WATCH THE FULL INTERVIEW_
---
| The Oversight Committee has uncovered bank records that show the Biden family used over **20 shell companies** to hide **$10 million** of payments from foreign nationals to **9 Biden family members.**

**My colleagues and I have one question: What did these foreign actors get in return for their investment?**

A whistleblower recently came to Chairman Comer and Senator Grassley to let us know that there is an unclassified FBI document that alleges Joe Biden engaged in a pay-to-play bribery scheme with a foreign national. **When we subpoenaed the document, Director Wray REFUSED to hand it over.**

This is unacceptable. Republicans are committed to using every tool in the toolbox to force the FBI to hand over this crucial document. [**[WATCH HERE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=cc08ae1bf6&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **TAXPAYER DOLLARS SHOULD NEVER BE USED TO FACILITATE ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=877305bd00&e=1050d051da)
---
| Over **5 MILLION** illegal immigrants have been caught trying to cross the southern border since Joe Biden took office. That's **NOT** including the 1.3 million gotaways that evaded law enforcement at the border and crossed into America undetected.

_**Joe Biden not only turned his back on this worsening crisis—the liberals in his administration are actually incentivizing illegal immigration!**_

After the Red Cross was caught handing out maps to migrants outlining how to cross into America illegally, I launched an investigation into FEMA to ensure unelected bureaucrats are not letting liberal NGOs use our taxpayer dollars to facilitate illegal immigration. [**[LEARN MORE HERE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=93b96302c8&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **WE NEED TO GET POLITICS OUT OF THE FBI AND DOJ**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=044ff73877&e=1050d051da)
---
| _CLICK [HERE](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=d4e18760c2&e=1050d051da) TO WATCH THE FULL INTERVIEW_
---
| Trust in American institutions is at an all-time low and it’s because of crap like the fake Trump-Russia collusion.

_**We need to get politics out of the FBI and DOJ.**_ Americans do not want the FBI to carry the company line for Joe Biden and the liberal Democrats in Washington. The FBI and DOJ should be investigating the facts and calling balls and strikes—that’s not what happened in this witchhunt. We need to eliminate politics at the Department of Justice. That means firing unelected bureaucrats and holding them accountable. I joined Newsmax to talk about the Durham Report. [**[WATCH HERE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=8e09b3cd70&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **COMBATING THE FENTANYL EPIDEMIC**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=bb1450530a&e=1050d051da)
---
| The fentanyl epidemic has impacted countless families across America. Mexican Cartels have taken advantage of Joe Biden's lack of leadership at the border and ramped up their smuggling efforts. A record amount of fentanyl is pouring across the southern border and into our communities—overwhelming local law enforcement.

**House Republicans once again did something this week that Joe Biden refuses to do: Take Action. **

This week I voted for legislation to strengthen penalties for fentanyl traffickers and ensure our brave law enforcement officers have the resources they need to keep this deadly drug off our streets. [**[READ MORE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=aaebf76bdf&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **HOUSE REPUBLICAN LEGISLATIVE UPDATE**
---
| I am proud to have voted in favor of legislation on the House Floor that **REVERSES** Joe Biden's far-left policies and puts **AMERICA FIRST** :

✅ Defund Joe Biden’s IRS army
✅ Protect parents' rights
✅ Block gov't officials from colluding with Big Tech to censor speech
✅ Declassify all info relating to the COVID-19 lab leak
✅ Rein in Biden's reckless federal spending
✅ Strengthen penalties for violent crimes
✅ Protect women's sports
✅ Combat the fentanyl epidemic
✅ Create a committee to hold Communist China accountable
✅ Stop Joe Biden's student loan bailout
✅ Push back on Democrats' extreme pro-abortion agenda
✅ Unleash domestic energy production
✅ Officially end the COVID-19 national emergency

---
| [DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=3f65a63b4a&e=1050d051da "DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY")
---
| | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
---

You can [update your preferences](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/profile?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&e=1050d051da&c=44eb11df3d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&e=1050d051da&c=44eb11df3d).
---

name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: The quickest way you can help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
We created this personal link for you.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=87%2E552475%2EhrEu-A)
Peter,
Hitting our fundraising goals consistently, especially at the start of a campaign, is important.
At the end of each month, we total our numbers in order to prepare for our end-of-quarter filings (which will happen next month!). These FEC reports are public, and every campaign is required to show what they’ve raised.
We know Mitch McConnell and his dark-money PACs will be looking at our filings to determine the strength of our campaign, so we need to hit every goal we set.
We’re looking to raise $25,000 by May 31st to reach our goal, and we won’t get there without your help. **To make it easy, we created a personal link for you to donate, Peter. Will you make a contribution of $5 with your personal link today?**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230527-1?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230527-1?refcode=em20230527-1&refcode2=87_552475_hrEu-A&akid=87%2E552475%2EhrEu-A)**
The other side is going to have corporate special interests with deep pockets in their corner — we’re grateful to have you in ours.
But reaching our next goal won’t be easy. We can’t afford to fall short — especially not ahead of our end-of-month deadline, and not when Senate control is on the line.
**With your support, we can reach our $25,000 May fundraising goal, build a strong campaign statewide, and defend this seat. Will you use your personal link today to chip in? Here it is one more time:**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230527-1?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230527-1?refcode=em20230527-1&refcode2=87_552475_hrEu-A&akid=87%2E552475%2EhrEu-A)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230527-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230527-1&refcode2=87_552475_hrEu-A&akid=87%2E552475%2EhrEu-A)**
Thank you for supporting our campaign,
Team Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=87%2E552475%2EhrEu-A)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=87%2E552475%2EhrEu-A)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Respectfully asking you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I know we ask a lot of you, but one of the main ways we are able to fund our work is when people like you chip in to emails like these.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230527-1-30-nor&refcode2=5785.3935704.Vdbzy0&t=1&akid=5785%2E3935704%2EVdbzy0)
---
Hi there, it’s Gabby Giffords.
I hope that you’ll allow me to take a few minutes out of your Saturday to explain why I’m asking for your support today.
It’s hard to believe, but we’re rapidly approaching the end of May. And right now, we’re unfortunately pacing behind where we need to be to reach our online fundraising goals.
The goals we set are very important. They are real benchmarks we’ve set to ensure we have the resources to keep up our work to elect gun safety champions, help pass lifesaving legislation, and stand up to gun lobby and their dangerous “guns everywhere” agenda.
I know we ask a lot of you, but one of the main ways we are able to fund our work is when people like you chip in to emails like these.
[**So what do you say? Can I count on you to chip in $3 or any amount that makes sense for you to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us close the gap and reach our May fundraising goals?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230527-1-30-nor&t=2&akid=5785%2E3935704%2EVdbzy0)

Just this month alone, we’ve experienced the horror of multiple gun violence-related tragedies across our nation—including the mall shooting in Allen, TX. This week marked one year since the unfathomable mass shooting at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde, TX.
While we’ve made undeniable progress in the movement to end gun violence in our country, there are still far too many innocent lives stolen every day from preventable violence. We must continue our work together to create a safer future.
[**Please, make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC to help fuel our work and close our fundraising gap as we rapidly approach the end of the month.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230527-1-30-nor&t=27&akid=5785%2E3935704%2EVdbzy0)

Gabby Giffords

I hope that you’ll allow me to take a few minutes out of your Saturday to explain why I’m asking for your support today. It’s hard to believe, but we’re rapidly approaching the end of May. And right now, we’re unfortunately pacing behind where we need to be to reach our online fundraising goals. The goals we set are very important. They are real benchmarks we’ve set to ensure we have the resources to keep up our work to elect gun safety champions, help pass lifesaving legislation, and stand up to gun lobby and their dangerous “guns everywhere” agenda. name: Daniel Cameron
subject: We don't have to wait for 2024 to DEFEAT DEMOCRATS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The battle lines are drawn in the BIGGEST ELECTION THIS YEAR!

| |
---
| | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62733808:J2XlwAIYN:m:1:3299561967:C50D3CCBEF5508B41ABDFB4416B55A83:r "Daniel Cameron")
---
Patriot, this is Daniel Cameron.

I have good news:

_**[We don't have to wait for 2024 to DEFEAT DEMOCRATS - they control the Kentucky Governorship, and the election is THIS YEAR!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62733808:J2XlwAIYN:m:1:3299561967:C50D3CCBEF5508B41ABDFB4416B55A83:r "We don’t have to wait for 2024 to DEFEAT DEMOCRATS – they control the Kentucky Governorship, and
the election is THIS YEAR!")**_

Democrats were over the moon when they won the Governor's race in the ruby-red Commonwealth of Kentucky.

This is our **ONE AND ONLY CHANCE** to defeat the Democrat in the Governor's mansion, win key races like this up and down the ballot, and save our country. Now that I'm the Republican nominee, I'm humbly asking you to make a small contribution to our efforts.

Even if it's just five or ten bucks, it can make a world of difference.

Why? Because Democrats are laser-focused on keeping this seat. Since it's one of the ONLY big races in 2023, Liberal megadonors and special interests are cutting huge checks to defeat us.

_**[We need an army of grassroots supporters to compete and win. Can I count on you to join our fight to take back our country?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62733808:J2XlwAIYN:m:1:3299561967:C50D3CCBEF5508B41ABDFB4416B55A83:r "We need
an army of grassroots supporters to compete and win. Can I count on you to join our fight to take back our country?")**_
---
**[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62733808:J2XlwAIYN:m:1:3299561967:C50D3CCBEF5508B41ABDFB4416B55A83:r)[**YES >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62733808:J2XlwAIYN:m:1:3299561967:C50D3CCBEF5508B41ABDFB4416B55A83:r)_[**NO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62733808:J2XlwAIYN:m:1:3299561967:C50D3CCBEF5508B41ABDFB4416B55A83:r)**
---
I will be completely honest with you:

It will be a slog from now until election day in November. Democrats across the country are watching this race like a hawk - they see it as their HOLY GRAIL. If they keep their foothold in this ruby-red state, they'll think they can win anywhere, and no Republican race will be safe.

They're putting together a deep network of Super PACs and megadonors as you're reading this email. A barrage of dishonest attack ads is on the way, and the pressure is on!

Time is of the essence, so I'll wrap this up, but I really need your help.

_**[Will you please consider chipping in so Republicans can win this seat and take back our country?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62733808:J2XlwAIYN:m:1:3299561967:C50D3CCBEF5508B41ABDFB4416B55A83:r "Will you please consider
chipping in so Republicans can win this seat and take back our country? ")**_
---
**[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62733808:J2XlwAIYN:m:1:3299561967:C50D3CCBEF5508B41ABDFB4416B55A83:r)[**YES >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62733808:J2XlwAIYN:m:1:3299561967:C50D3CCBEF5508B41ABDFB4416B55A83:r)_[**NO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62733808:J2XlwAIYN:m:1:3299561967:C50D3CCBEF5508B41ABDFB4416B55A83:r)**
---
God bless you,
Daniel Cameron

---
* * *
---
|
---
| Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

subject: What I’ve seen since I joined Team Sharice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hi,

I’m reaching out on a Saturday because I’ve been looking at the numbers and we still have spots to fill on Team Sharice for our 2024 Digital Membership Drive. **[Rush $20 or any amount today to support our campaign before our big deadline at the end of the month.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63908425/408389613/-951952754?amount=20&contactdata=Q4d1tc+8/LAqtXcorRCTKW+/6VJOtHbonpydEp1f7FfKdeYlATQuNhPmUemvGmnA8McpIZKjGzRkLcoGwDwzZ/rEhcvYUqwTV+0GGetdqsC0M5QZb+i1AGUzN4paSMhU1CpmHWmBn2Rfeo+X1SJ1fQ==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230527_FR_eom.1.3_0_6MO_cm_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmY5MGZhZS05YmZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kEypo-icS3J2RXXRk3vG9nqEvlhw-c1VrMgowr4iCsE=)**

Since joining the team as campaign manager earlier this year, I’ve seen firsthand how powerful this grassroots movement is. Last year, you helped defeat an extreme anti-abortion ballot measure and Sharice’s anti-abortion opponent.

But the fight for reproductive rights is still ongoing. There are pending cases right now that could lead to Mifepristone, the leading abortion medication in the country, being banned nationwide.

**That’s why we must do everything we can to protect pro-choice leaders like Sharice and defeat every extremist politician who wants to insert themselves into our private decisions.**

**[Claim your spot as an official 2024 Team Sharice Digital Member by chipping in $20 or any amount right away. Spots are filling up fast and our membership drive ends at the end of the month!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63908426/408389614/-951952754?amount=20&contactdata=Q4d1tc+8/LAqtXcorRCTKW+/6VJOtHbonpydEp1f7FfKdeYlATQuNhPmUemvGmnA8McpIZKjGzRkLcoGwDwzZ/rEhcvYUqwTV+0GGetdqsC0M5QZb+i1AGUzN4paSMhU1CpmHWmBn2Rfeo+X1SJ1fQ==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230527_FR_eom.1.3_0_6MO_cm_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmY5MGZhZS05YmZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kEypo-icS3J2RXXRk3vG9nqEvlhw-c1VrMgowr4iCsE=)**

Early investment in our campaign is one of the most effective ways to ensure Abigail can continue being our strong advocate in Congress.

| Peter,

Did you read Abigail’s note from last week?

Early investment in our campaign is one of the most effective ways to ensure Abigail can continue being our strong advocate in Congress. Between her calls to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law and her leadership in the push to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks, she’s looking out for our community and country.

But the road ahead will be challenging, [_**which is why we need support from committed people like you. Fellow American,

The Senate map that is in play next year shows that if Republicans don't win back control of the Senate in the 2024 election, we will be in the minority for _at least_ 10 years.

**_The only thing standing between the Democrats and a DECADE of control is the 2024 election._**

**[We cannot afford to wait until next year to start this battle, we need Republican grassroots supporters across the country to invest in this fight TODAY.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7c470ecbaa0d41ffb1400be64c013cb9&_e=nIMjAwwh-WEsYub2-FoJCNhpx1DZ6r3iCmGOtNMe69-LmPPIIzYK7tIjMkdKvV1qaPSCYJfmAO_p0fMDSiq2O9iTgdqBCTjv9mK5u7558l7Lc8ju_Kf_5MnevLrUbNEAokbQVpomDaZKpaGwMtmYN2zntLF3SiwlG4oNCTCTr9eVMPDhtSoJmEU_G0r2yDUJ7DhmYXp4YBf-sMy9kEgplu0jFag4X0QT-Yxy1s4Gnwk--jHnTOXWi_zcC9LMhpbKfu_czcwBuoyXndHSURNnKAe78lScX3zcpvpwb9fgUz7XR-i90gXMlxXT81z_zHJ0TkKfUPkO18K1N9-nho93Q6rYFNGR8KDKpFWozrw_A77y-_WuUCVXlps7Pis0H7g9bfEYBQXiFZ9JYOpMiYF9JJUWaNqOQU2UoIiZqeS7cxKBlI0u_6JfuIwhraVjrDLE)**

_Just look at the past couple of years with Democrats in the Senate Majority:_

They’ve **tanked** our economy, **ruined** our education system, **WEAPONIZED** our justice system, declared war on American energy, and opened our borders to five million illegal immigrants, record human and child trafficking and the **deadliest** drug crisis in our history. _And that’s just the start of the damage they’ve done..._

**We can’t sit idly by and see what the Democrats do if they stay in power for ANOTHER DECADE.** The 2024 election will be one of the most consequential political battles of our lifetime, so the question is...

_**Will you stand up and fight or watch as the Democrats destroy America?**_ **[My Republican colleagues and I going to fight with every fiber in our being , Fellow American, and I’m asking you to join us.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7c470ecbaa0d41ffb1400be64c013cb9&_e=nIMjAwwh-WEsYub2-FoJCNhpx1DZ6r3iCmGOtNMe69-LmPPIIzYK7tIjMkdKvV1qaPSCYJfmAO_p0fMDSiq2O9iTgdqBCTjv9mK5u7558l7Lc8ju_Kf_5MnevLrUbNEAokbQVpomDaZKpaGwMtmYN2zntLF3SiwlG4oNCTCTr9eVMPDhtSoJmEU_G0r2yDUJ7DhmYXp4YBf-sMy9kEgplu0jFag4X0QT-Yxy1s4Gnwk--jHnTOXWi_zcC9LMhpbKfu_czcwBuoyXndHSURNnKAe78lScX3zcpvpwb9fgUz4to9q0WE2f1pEo9wQp9i7EVEOPU8tSJVfTapAY8c4pcjDLPyQ5h-7Qk-Ojz8Sep2ob_ZNoaTs-pZhnsNmTePntAU2kXnE6CW_8bp2FWpEjGqbkupNWtwUV8_jRE7_pEPsBnoWOQvmE4laJDx6Kr2SD)**

Katie Britt

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz._ I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $25 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Democrats Win Seats to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63909106/408392390/-320404881?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230527_FR_EOM.1.3_0_6MO_splitAllred_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTA0MTAxMi05ZGZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pk8-Camb3WpMkxqlS2MJ-9kBT3LckEnF3sknDJIo_pQ=)**

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred

clean_body: | Peter, I can’t even begin to tell you how grateful I am right now. The grassroots response to my campaign launch has been incredible, and every single penny we’ve raised puts us one step closer to defeating Ted Cruz and flipping Texas Blue! Democrats from across the country are donating in droves to launch this campaign and power us to victory. We’re so close to hitting our $150,000 daily goal! = | ****=** \---------Forwarded Message--------- Sender: Colin Allred Date: Sat, May 13, 2023 at 11:37 AM Subject: I’m running = Peter, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas. Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country! That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you split $25 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Democrats Win Seats to help reach my ambitious daily goal of $150,000?= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Colin Allred and Democrats Win Seats. | = | = | = I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL. But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family. I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018. Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone: = Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing. Let’s do this, Colin Allred | = | = | = ** Paid for by Democrats Win Seats PAC Democrats Win Seats PAC 315 INSPIRATION LANE GAITHERSBURG, MD 20878 United States **

**Peter , it's going to take every corner of Mississippi to win this November. That's why Brandon is hitting the road and speaking to voters in all 82 counties.

[But we can’t do it without your help. Will you chip in right now to fuel our 82 county tour?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63909637/408394924/960250762?refcode=ea.9cba2c2c-9ffc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.9cba2c2c-9ffc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWNiYTJjMmMtOWZmYy1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9iLSRJ5U3FnBjG5ONyPVVvJZyy0Hf6VZGq5lD-uf4mM=)**

Brandon is reaching out to those who've been brushed aside by the good ole boys in Jackson. And he’s ready to show them how we can move Mississippi forward together.

Politicians from both parties have written too much of our state off — there are countless rural communities that haven’t seen a candidate for governor in years.

You’d be surprised how many Republicans will vote with us if given a chance to hear from Brandon. Mississippians are fed up with the good ole boy status quo that leaves them ignored.

But here's the deal: this only works if we can raise enough to organize, advertise, and travel to all 82 counties in the state.

**That’s why it’s critical that we hit our $30,000 online goal before our public filing deadline in just 4 days![Can we count on you to rush a donation toward our 82 Counties Fund to help Brandon make clean_body: Buckle up. | = Marion County. Lawrence County. Wilkinson County. Rankin County. Jasper County. And 77 more. Peter , it's going to take every corner of Mississippi to win this November. That's why Brandon is hitting the road and speaking to voters in all 82 counties. = Brandon is reaching out to those who've been brushed aside by the good ole boys in Jackson. And he’s ready to show them how we can move Mississippi forward together. Politicians from both parties have written too much of our state off — there are countless rural communities that haven’t seen a candidate for governor in years. You’d be surprised how many Republicans will vote with us if given a chance to hear from Brandon. Mississippians are fed up with the good ole boy status quo that leaves them ignored. But here's the deal: this only works if we can raise enough to organize, advertise, and travel to all 82 counties in the state. That’s why it’s critical that we hit our $30,000 online goal before our public filing deadline in just 4 days | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks, Team Brandon | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: We aren’t afraid to say what others think - but I need your help. | | Fellow American, I need your help to put us in a good position going into the summer. We only have a few days until the end of May and I need your help: | Give a dollar. Give whatever is comfortable for you. I don't care about the amount we raised between now and May 31st - I care about the number of donations we can secure before midnight on Wednesday. This is a unique grassroots movement. We aren't afraid to say what others think - but I need your help to cut through the BS. Please don't wait until May 31st - Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Team, In a couple of days, we’re going to wrap up our monthly fundraising campaign. Unfortunately, our current fundraising numbers aren’t as high as we hoped, so we wanted to give you a quick update on why these monthly deadlines are so critically important, **then ask you to[pitch in $10 towards our goal to keep our work on track.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63909821/408395351/-210462503?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_EOM_AC60_20230527_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmJhMmMyYy05ZmZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uxwshdoarFOE1LmAltaVl8cb321T6DAIekrOz-KYZcs=)** 🚀 **Momentum Matters:** **Tina’s leadership serving in the Senate as a progressive voice for justice, equal rights, and democracy for all thrives on continuous momentum.** Standing up to the special interests is a marathon, not a sprint, and monthly fundraising deadlines serve as key milestones that propel our progress. Grassroots donations allow us to secure essential resources, reach a broader audience, and advance Tina’s message. 🧩 **Building Blocks of Success:** **Each month's fundraising target represents a vital building block in our path to protecting the Democratic Senate majority.** As the Vice Chair of Senate Democrats’ campaign arm, Tina is deeply involved in the work required to strengthen nationwide grassroots operations, develop innovative strategies, and engage with voters on a deeper level. Each monthly goal is one stepping stone on the larger path to victory — which is why we email so much about them! 🤝 **Unity in Action:** **Grassroots organizing is about building power together.** Even something as small as a fundraising goal can help foster a sense of shared purpose and solidarity. That’s important in the era of MAGA extremists doing everything they can to divide us and wear us down. Hitting our grassroots fundraising goals sends a powerful message to everyone from billionaire mega donors to Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell that we aren’t giving up the fight. Here’s the hard truth: Mitch McConnell and MAGA Republicans’ shady dark money groups have hundreds of millions of dollars to spend on flipping the Senate, and they’re already spending money attacking vulnerable Democrats. But we’ve got something they don’t: grassroots energy. We’ve worked for years to build a coalition strong enough to take on whatever our opponents throw our way, and our game plan is to focus on what we do best — organizing, knocking on doors, and sharing Tina’s progressive vision of the future to as many people as possible. **[Tina is counting on grassroots support from this incredible team to help power the work required to protect our Senate majority. name: Roy Cooper
subject: I need you to understand the stakes:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We had to increase our goal for May.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63909805/408395331/823540626?refcode=ea.a5ba2c2c-9ffc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.a5ba2c2c-9ffc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWJhMmMyYy05ZmZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gs21Vot7NkTpBp6cJ7GS74dvZpOxkEjmatGGDamrg7E=&emci=b470a201-12fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a5ba2c2c-9ffc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
**Hello Peter, this is a longer email that needs your attention. I hope you’ll read it to the end.** But first, I have to ask for your help. The fight to defeat the radical NC GOP agenda is more critical than ever, and I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you to power it. **[Please, click here to donate what you can before our end-of-month fundraising deadline on Wednesday.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63909806/408395332/435245919?refcode=ea.a5ba2c2c-9ffc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.a5ba2c2c-9ffc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWJhMmMyYy05ZmZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gs21Vot7NkTpBp6cJ7GS74dvZpOxkEjmatGGDamrg7E=)** Earlier this month, radical Republican legislators — aided by a former Democrat who abandoned her party and her long-held progressive positions — enacted a cruel ban on most abortion care in our state. **And they’ve said clearly they aren’t finished destroying women’s reproductive freedom.** Republicans believe that their ill-gotten supermajorities will allow them complete control over our state — the freedom to ignore what the people want while radically transforming North Carolina into a far-right image. **We will prove them wrong, but I need you to help me do it.** I will use every resource available to power Democratic candidates we can count on to victory in 2024. We will break the legislative supermajorities. We will secure statewide offices from extremist GOP politicians. We will show the Republican Party that North Carolina _does not accept_ their agenda. And they’ve said clearly they aren’t finished destroying women’s reproductive freedom. Republicans believe that their ill-gotten supermajorities will allow them complete control over our state — the freedom to ignore what the people want while radically transforming North Carolina into a far-right image. We will prove them wrong, but I need you to help me do it. I will use every resource available to power Democratic candidates we can count on to victory in 2024. name: Tara McGowan
subject: Got a minute?
body:
If you’re short on time, here’s the gist:
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1034%2E120351%2EbfeWG-)
Hey Peter, it’s Tara — Founder and Publisher of Courier Newsroom.
In a moment, I’m going to share how you can help us fight back against our country’s bad information crisis.
**But if you’re short on time, here’s the gist:**
Our local newsrooms in eight battleground states are debunking misinformation with factual journalism and meaningful stories — covering everything from state and local elections to holding bad actors like Fox News and Donald Trump accountable.
But to keep these important stories **free and accessible** for anyone who wants them, we need your help to reach our May fundraising goal.
**The issue is this: our fundraising has slowed down a lot — at the same time that our work is picking up.**
[**That means donations to emails like this are critical to closing our $15,000 gap so we can power the work of our newsrooms, expand into new states, and stop the spread of bad information. Can I count on you to chip in $5 now to help us get there?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3719?refcode=em-20230527&t=2&akid=1034%2E120351%2EbfeWG-)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3719?refcode=em-20230527&t=3&akid=1034%2E120351%2EbfeWG-)**
I founded Courier Newsroom because the way Americans get their news has changed.
Local newsrooms keep closing, leaving millions of Americans to rely on social media feeds and inboxes to learn about important local issues and news.
The problem is, these online spaces are also where dangerous disinformation thrives. We’ve seen the toll these kinds of claims can have — whether it’s dividing our communities, or even stoking political violence like we saw on January 6th.
**At Courier Newsroom, we believe the best antidote to bad information is good information.** For us, that means providing factual, relevant local journalism to the communities and online spaces where disinformation spreads.
To accomplish that, we do things a little differently. For example, **we do NOT:**
* Hide our stories behind paywalls — and we never will.
* Publish sensational stories — instead, we focus on the issues that actually matter like what’s going on in your state and local government.
* Let profit drive our reporting — because of our grassroots supporters, we’re free to cover stories that actually matter to our readers.

And while major news groups like _The Washington Post_ , _Buzzfeed_ , and _CNN_ are announcing massive layoffs, **we’re not**.
Because of support from grassroots donors like you, we’re able to retain our talented reporters and stay true to our values.
**Right now, our reporters have their work cut out for them** — with Ron DeSantis joining the race for president and important state and local elections just around the corner.
**To ensure they have the resources they need, we have to reach our $15,000 fundraising goal before we wrap up May.** We’re behind where we need to be — but I know how dedicated this grassroots team is. So I’m asking one more time:
[**Will you chip in $5 to support our newsrooms and fight back against disinformation?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3719?refcode=em-20230527&t=4&akid=1034%2E120351%2EbfeWG-)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3719?refcode=em-20230527&t=5&akid=1034%2E120351%2EbfeWG-)**
Thanks so much,
Tara McGowan
_Founder & Publisher_
_Courier Newsroom_
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=1034_120351_bfeWG-&akid=1034%2E120351%2EbfeWG-)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1034%2E120351%2EbfeWG-)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

body:
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17487?t=6&akid=1824%2E564421%2EYkdfKe) Team,

In a moment, I’m going to ask if you can [**pitch in to support Ron Be Gone and my campaign for U.S. Senate**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17489?t=8&akid=1824%2E564421%2EYkdfKe) ahead of tonight's fundraising deadline. But first, can I explain why this deadline is so important?

Just hours before I announced my campaign, Kevin McCarthy removed me from the Intelligence Committee, where I’ve served as Chairman and top Democrat for years. All because I held Trump and MAGA Republicans accountable.

As it turned out, that was just the beginning. Ever since I started running to serve Californians in the Senate, McCarthy, Matt Gaetz, Tucker Carlson, and the entire Fox News machine have attacked me nearly every day.

Just last month, McCarthy claimed that a Republican could win this Senate race in California and also said they needed to make sure I didn’t win.

**It’s clear that McCarthy and his right-wing allies are going to do everything they can to prevent me from becoming California’s next Senator. That’s why it’s so important we hit tonight's fundraising goal and send a powerful message: I’m not going anywhere.

Pitch in now to help:** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Ron Be Gone and Adam Schiff will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17495?t=14&akid=1824%2E564421%2EYkdfKe)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17496?t=15&akid=1824%2E564421%2EYkdfKe)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17497?t=16&akid=1824%2E564421%2EYkdfKe)
Investing _now_ and building the campaign infrastructure to break through the Republicans’ noise and reach voters across California is going to be the key to success in this race. Thanks for anything you can contribute to help.

— Adam
| | Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc.
(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

MAGA Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst Governor in America and an utter nightmare for Floridians. He is relentless in his praise for Donald Trump, he completely botched Florida's pandemic response and put lives at risk, and he gave scarce COVID vaccines to his major campaign donors instead of the most vulnerable Floridians. He MUST be defeated in the next election. We know for sure that Donald Trump is going to go ALL OUT to help DeSantis win, so we need to start fighting back today by building a massive coalition of good Democratic supporters.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution to beat Ron DeSantis by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/118?t=1&akid=1824%2E564421%2EYkdfKe). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and ensure that we can implement our entire strategy to crush Ron DeSantis, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/119?t=2&akid=1824%2E564421%2EYkdfKe).**
