clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | A quick Senate 2024 Update: 1\. Texas is a battleground state — Ted Cruz can lose — Colin Allred can do it 2\. Delaware is an open seat where Republicans will spend BIG 3\. Maryland is an open seat where Republicans will spend BIG What do these all have in common? Black Democrats can ensure these seats stay or flip blue — boosting our majority in the Senate — even if DeSantis or Trump win the presidency — the country will have a wall of defense in the Senate (if we elect Black Democrats!) The Collective PAC is dedicated to making our Senate majority stronger so we don’t have to pray on the sensitivities of Joe Manchin, Kyrsten Sinema, or any Senate Republican. This is the work we will put in, like we did in Georgia in 2020 and 2022. We know how to win, we know how to leverage our resources to ensure victory and we simply...can't do it without you. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | h | | | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | h | | Peter, we can knock these villains out of power — but this starts with hitting our vital end-of-month fundraising goal. Here at The Collective PAC, our dollars go right to work investing in the next generation of Black Democratic elected officials and voters. Missing our goal means fewer folks get registered to vote, fewer folks get access to polls, and our candidates lose out on the resources they need to compete. All of which means fewer Black Democrats are elected into office. [ $63,000 may seem like an arbitrary amount of money, but we know what it takes to invest early, invest intelligently, and ensure Democrats like Colin Allred WIN. If just [5] people from 18326 give $10 TODAY — we can hit our goal in no time, Peter.]() If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | h | | | Thank you for your effort and support — we really appreciate it. — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2343%2E5257348%2EVOdlYd ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, catching up on emails after a busy week? Same.

Let me quickly explain where our campaign stands:

* I’m meeting with voters and activists from across the Golden State all
weekend at the California Democratic Party convention
* We’re facing increasing Republican attacks from Kevin McCarthy and a
new House resolution to censure me and fine me $16 MILLION — all
because I chose to stand up to MAGA extremists and hold Donald Trump
accountable
* We’re just four days away from our May fundraising deadline — and I
need your help

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=may2023_abs_em.TpLEiB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC60_20230527_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2343%2E5257348%2EVOdlYd ]So Derek, can you chip in a few bucks before getting on with
your Saturday? I’m not taking corporate PAC money in this campaign, so
every dollar of grassroots support goes a long way.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=may2023_abs_em.zFhEHH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC60_20230527_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2343%2E5257348%2EVOdlYd ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

I hope I caught you at a good time. Thanks again for everything you’re
doing to stay up to date on this important race.

— Adam

It’s worried about them heading to Florida’s .. **[Read More...](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0MzQ1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTQ3LTgzYmNkMjg5NmZhNjRkM2RiYWQ5M2VkY2E2NGY4M2Q2IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZmlyZWJyYW5kLm5ld3MvYmxhY2stYW1lcmljYW5zLWVtYnJhY2UtZmxvcmlkYS8_c2V5aWQ9NjgxMzcifQ/kk6o76gGq29k_-1avpA5Dw)** | |

name: Conservative Intel
subject: The history of capitalism and socialism
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsEG5tJDUN

Over the last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have
provided the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions,
of political and...

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osEG5tJDUN

Dear
Friend,
Over the
last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided
the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of
political and economic freedom. In the past few years, we've seen
a growing trend among young Americans in favor of socialism and
against capitalism.

But do
they truly understand the history and outcomes of socialism and
capitalism?

This is
precisely why we put together this brand new eBook, The History
Of Socialism And Capitalism, from Hoover Institution senior
fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This
eBook consists of two papers-one from each scholar-written in
conjunction with The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and
Free-Market Capitalism. This project provides objective and
scholarly analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and
hybrid systems and provides evidence on the effectiveness of the
various systems on outcomes that affect prosperity and
well-being.

I think
you will find this new eBook particularly important and timely,
given the recent interest in policies that are radical from a US
historical perspective, some of which are advocated by political
leaders.

Simply
click here to request your free copy of The History Of Socialism
And Capitalism.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

body:
I’m proud to fight for Medicare for All. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvXfjOP8KWeTiWuVCHRbgi_JdOv7x-JvrLhq_15nsPD9iibXT9cvtPsmewAuUzEFIWuB2yGkKLneo-uVZoo0c1q-A0WlC7tZ_eYJOwfOgbfhbLUDIFD_Z5y2yGZ_SS8Rl1_L4E2Y3A7ppcJ39uJz_XWfIBYJw11ZGdlYasFnoN43e8r3Xin0f5ff3MrB4MEfdp/3wj/y1ZGBjOLT7qsrAtbc_CBXA/h0/qS60OqphWwQVLDvNylX08Jytl0o59uqMpnFLjUDTpwE)

Friend, It’s outrageous that the wealthiest country in the history of the world cannot guarantee health care for its people. **Health care is a human right, not a privilege. That’s why we just reintroduced Medicare for All, to ensure that everyone can access the care they need.** **[Please sign now to tell Congress: Pass Medicare for All!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/1XQbiUZqIgkFRQxQopJGKcyDIgFY0YNF1KFW7DPf0w_BsCvPGRNPZTiJjwOtPRueehMKdhoZtVYlO3CxmFPK0_X9uqe1y0AiuV62hUxhKGBhriXp3USPVeFSIbBP5L8wHPDWfAkkrKkTrTrBeAmNbEYT521WTseXTze6qUn1WiiGYYDjak--kUM0hV9HB3p8HuMwrfwQFbDn0Miga5d0VyM0aIlIqAa7VRpfoFS7S0W6A1uv15BQKiaU6WKo24t4ypTiMiFLHu_wLMi5ndMkupsmBvaCnIzIFzubvw8k7VjNgZ6_CHleD-U1IsEqj3r087yfL2IqR_H2bSjZwapkMX1fqL_hc4IBBb21dPuaLQvezvoTWzP-5yPAPgtmHtEAg9nsT0OchAGRm1BysB32DUpCgwlxH7Lr-VV1ZRnbZWZM41V_NTJsnBVQyvxWohTTdxSvi_GhDyiXdndx5kuS2g/3wj/y1ZGBjOLT7qsrAtbc_CBXA/h1/ZUGeCzgrLQldbH1yh5-NvVoDngEFtmkJtWeUpJ-2Wfw)** | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/1XQbiUZqIgkFRQxQopJGKcyDIgFY0YNF1KFW7DPf0w_BsCvPGRNPZTiJjwOtPRueehMKdhoZtVYlO3CxmFPK0_X9uqe1y0AiuV62hUxhKGBhriXp3USPVeFSIbBP5L8wHPDWfAkkrKkTrTrBeAmNbEYT521WTseXTze6qUn1WiiGYYDjak--kUM0hV9HB3p8HuMwrfwQFbDn0Miga5d0VyM0aIlIqAa7VRpfoFS7S0VA0CkvrlDG6UD5rqGtSrQ4pFs6PqhLPc8hsXft4v8m_ZcvAYKCwythgGckh1WXquOoOH6wmenw1AZvrMWUicwd3LVp-FVfkbidqhgV-rI9KXWnJJdK7Nr9t6BQyRq2feJokZUVepBzifP1DhtdlGE2TqCHA7NYL3Uk90y8lmZAqWGLPcWFVBNm9gc6adC8R1beMyQ6ymzwNIv51BOE33uRsaHrkIMNQ-tDeJQhwZM19A/3wj/y1ZGBjOLT7qsrAtbc_CBXA/h2/Zu0Y-r8ikgQbLpeFP8mngvtoGPWYX204uzEMPQGBHNw)
---
In the richest country on earth, thousands of people die each year because they are unable to afford the care they need.
No one should have to die because they can’t afford care. No one should be forced to choose between putting food on the table or receiving life-saving treatment.
No family should ever face financial ruin because they got sick. But 20% of families are weighed down by medical debt in this country, and it’s one of the major reasons people file for bankruptcy.
Our profit-driven health care system is killing us while enriching Big Pharma and health insurance CEOs. We urgently need to take the profit motive out of health care by passing Medicare for All.
[**Add your name to tell Congress: Support Medicare for All and ensure that everyone is guaranteed free, quality health care.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/1XQbiUZqIgkFRQxQopJGKcyDIgFY0YNF1KFW7DPf0w_BsCvPGRNPZTiJjwOtPRueehMKdhoZtVYlO3CxmFPK0_X9uqe1y0AiuV62hUxhKGBhriXp3USPVeFSIbBP5L8wHPDWfAkkrKkTrTrBeAmNbEYT521WTseXTze6qUn1WiiGYYDjak--kUM0hV9HB3p8HuMwrfwQFbDn0Miga5d0VyM0aIlIqAa7VRpfoFS7S0XRCwC6xNCARQgTgM2dXGGlbfy6Ue7b1_gyVep2VbPytvoHALWcXNQILTwj8pURFayMefi-TIHyoNYkLsMbr_9kYdaoFrtGXC_vnb7uFeBNuBzllT7-XaR6_f459a3Mefj7-yu8XEVsOdPq1FflNTQuq02FQBDo9zGLMv7dOKC2dyL8jFVMK21EYDwMgnKYzcrDw28zNBo470LPNR5i-UaXWoBv5YBjvfPR6ojbh8v7ng/3wj/y1ZGBjOLT7qsrAtbc_CBXA/h3/PH6WfQuFr6T0tqv_8eFY9kOvUK_YptWIjDEynbIyiQI)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/1XQbiUZqIgkFRQxQopJGKcyDIgFY0YNF1KFW7DPf0w_BsCvPGRNPZTiJjwOtPRueehMKdhoZtVYlO3CxmFPK0_X9uqe1y0AiuV62hUxhKGBhriXp3USPVeFSIbBP5L8wHPDWfAkkrKkTrTrBeAmNbEYT521WTseXTze6qUn1WiiGYYDjak--kUM0hV9HB3p8HuMwrfwQFbDn0Miga5d0VyM0aIlIqAa7VRpfoFS7S0XSO8rBLCKQsutoEi1YND142lEeBNJiQAM-7dG5Ap0F9hov2AhisOgznntHReAVuFxZ622uGZE57aysXafyzeONXHlbQP-TU7ccXxm0zvMOTZjpTyNoOQO5CQNqE_NyS-I_keSdOJAk9xI9iHbe8ozPIYiKZRAghZuRFhWBXquA8e6MeoyU5hu649q69kNJcmhyZF_61v8SHYUmx04i4jYVNzJqjK4uVIipfApDM5Jpag/3wj/y1ZGBjOLT7qsrAtbc_CBXA/h4/p7dHXuCOk0C0HyrAepjjT57bXOKQvj4iuKVU5r9b0zI)

clean_body: I’m proud to fight for Medicare for All. | | | Friend, It’s outrageous that the wealthiest country in the history of the world cannot guarantee health care for its people. Health care is a human right, not a privilege. That’s why we just reintroduced Medicare for All, to ensure that everyone can access the care they need. | In the richest country on earth, thousands of people die each year because they are unable to afford the care they need. No one should have to die because they can’t afford care. No one should be forced to choose between putting food on the table or receiving life-saving treatment. No family should ever face financial ruin because they got sick. But 20% of families are weighed down by medical debt in this country, and it’s one of the major reasons people file for bankruptcy. Our profit-driven health care system is killing us while enriching Big Pharma and health insurance CEOs. We urgently need to take the profit motive out of health care by passing Medicare for All. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . body:
It’s up to us to make four more years of progress a reality. | | |
---
Peter, I've seen Joe and Kamala’s commitment to the American people up close over these last few years. They’ve passed once-in-a-generation legislation, the _Inflation Reduction Act_ , which is bringing down costs for working people and combating climate change. They passed the most significant federal gun safety legislation in _decades_ , and they’ve made massive investments in your communities, rebuilding our roads, bridges, highways, ports, internet, and railroads. **The best part of all of that?_They’re just getting started._** What excites me most about our opportunity to win Joe and Kamala a second term is our chance to deliver four more years of progress and results for the American people. **But it will take getting each and every one of you on board to win.** **[Will you help us send a powerful message about the strength of our movement to reelect Joe and Kamala by donating $25 to our campaign before Wednesday’s end-of-month fundraising deadline?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZpti-0hYGO1wbpprT27EYQh68Gizy0OgMVBKM-UIfBSxjFDaokcKM9gjwtnnTuN7G_C_2eqjTpjsM5QmXXK0aqf7daeizqP3TsUbxW1Di2qKOnG3L62n8EyOA7zdSV5iDgU9VN970dXOF8JC-vdeBm85IkhwOqq87GKWBqgR2W3BEX4xcV5DoIozoIJMwjI1Oen1WxPVhTmr1cd7JMw6ISab2AqZptwOqqRgg2JMm0qZO2Shzl_mBFtYDwT4uF4cMdIziKuF8yknTKKLIrxXg6ACH3hX7lCNSGGmvEn_qeTcC3ECWq3TBvVKwsfYqrsDOc7o6feXCgXZInlAoXuZKs3jbM6zbpsgL0Xw9rmEITgktxQQnuL9BPWIVGREMOVGP_bqVLq2IGDytLbJyslRW_lwDPqRvywU5H2b5J7dMBgpuMxYbhNlsx6tGjZBevF36Hlm3trlF08jsjqKifMVGBulnmEsJJLjL5nqYJn2954w/3wj/y1YjWtWqSdSTYapGmq-0mA/h0/nexKTl0SrfJWi6OVst30ZsfxaWtdPmofJmSfdAaKqZg)**

clean_body: It’s up to us to make four more years of progress a reality. | | | Peter, I've seen Joe and Kamala’s commitment to the American people up close over these last few years. They passed the most significant federal gun safety legislation in decades , and they’ve made massive investments in your communities, rebuilding our roads, bridges, highways, ports, internet, and railroads. The best part of all of that?They’re just getting started. What excites me most about our opportunity to win Joe and Kamala a second term is our chance to deliver four more years of progress and results for the American people. But it will take getting each and every one of you on board to win. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | I’m so proud to have you on our team. Hey there,

After the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , I promised I’d do everything within my power to protect access to abortion.

One of the most important ways we can do that is by passing federal legislation to protect people across this country from having their rights stripped away state by state.

I helped pass these protections in Colorado and I won’t stop fighting until we get it done in Congress.

I’d love to hear your thoughts, which is why I’m reaching out to ask you to complete your one-question survey.

name: Team Jayapal
subject: If Congress crashes the global economy, Republicans are at fault.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The time to show up for American people is right now — not June 1.
#
Peter,
Americans deserve to be told the truth about the state of our government and Republicans' role in holding our economy hostage.
Republicans do not want people to know that their unreasonable demands would effectively cut between 20% to 30% in health care, education, child care, and much more.
The truth is: if Congress failed don't raise the debt ceiling and the global economy collapses, Republicans are at fault. If we default on our debt, if we crash the economy, there is only one person to blame: the Speaker of the House, Kevin McCarthy.
Despite McCarthy's intransigence, Pramila has been in Congress speaking truth to power. **And if we want to ensure that Pramila can continue putting pressure on the right, we need to have her back.**
We need as many dedicated activists on our side in this fight as possible if we want to show our opposition that our democracy deserves legislators who truly care about their constituents. [**Can we count on you to make a contribution of $3 or more to support Pramila as she fights for our economy?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42234?source=em20230527-2530&t=1&akid=2530%2E420207%2EqdjZAV)
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42234?refcode=em20230527-2530&t=20&akid=2530%2E420207%2EqdjZAV)**
The time to show up for American people is right now, Peter — not June 1. And we know Pramila is at the forefront of the fight to put working people first.
Lets do this,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230527-2530-footer&t=21&refcode2=2530_420207_qdjZAV&akid=2530%2E420207%2EqdjZAV)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

body:

#
Derek -
We rolled out the "Old Glory" hat last week in the store, and you bought them all. Sold out.
So first, thanks a lot for supporting us.
Now, maybe you’ve been waiting for the right time. Maybe you’re looking for the right one. Or maybe you’re holding out for a sale.
Whatever you’re thinking, here’s the deal: Through Monday night, every shirt in our store is 25% off.

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: My job in a nutshell.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63911525/408401779/-665437442?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWYwZWM3Yi1hMmZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nOa_ahTUTxOoBsJSCwREN25UlWJlqL0bj_V_7XY4qNM=)
Peter,

I want to share a quick story about why I love representing my home district in Congress. At a telephone town hall earlier this week, someone asked me what excited me about this job, and immediately I recalled visiting schools in IL-17 earlier this year. At one visit, a second-grader asked me exactly what it is I do for the district – a straightforward yet important question. To be honest, I was caught off guard.

Off the cuff, I said: _“My job is to make sure you can be whoever you want to be when you grow up.”_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63911526/408401782/-665437442?refcode=em-5.27.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWYwZWM3Yi1hMmZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nOa_ahTUTxOoBsJSCwREN25UlWJlqL0bj_V_7XY4qNM=)
The more I’ve reflected on that spur-of-the-moment response, the more I stand by it. It really is the job of every congressperson to make sure that our home districts are great places for our kids to grow up. **And that’s what excites me most about this job: the chance to help families in IL-17 thrive by creating a safer, more inclusive district.**

This stands in stark contrast to what far-right Republicans are doing to “represent” their constituents. If it were up to them, these kids who grow up with _less_ freedom -- particularly over their own bodies. They also refuse to pass common sense gun safety measures to keep kids and schools safe from gun violence.

So here’s the key: we need to retake the House majority to push back against these dangerous policies – and the fight to retake the House starts in IL-17. **We need to defend this swing seat if we want any chance of winning back the majority.**

**[Frankly, fundraising has taken a back seat in recent days, but with a new opponent in the race and attacks from the right ramping up, we need grassroots support to put us in a strong position to keep IL-17 blue. Will you chip in a contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63911527/408401785/-665437442?refcode=em-5.27.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWYwZWM3Yi1hMmZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nOa_ahTUTxOoBsJSCwREN25UlWJlqL0bj_V_7XY4qNM=)**
| [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63911528/408401786/-665437442?refcode=em-5.27.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWYwZWM3Yi1hMmZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nOa_ahTUTxOoBsJSCwREN25UlWJlqL0bj_V_7XY4qNM=)
---

Thank you, and enjoy your Memorial Day weekend.

-Eric

clean_body: we're fired up, Peter | BREAKING: Ted Cruz worried 2024 race will be a "firefight" = Maybe it's his relentless attacks on our fundamental rights. Or his loyalty to Trump, even as he spewed lies, pushed conspiracy theories and cheered on the mob on Jan. 6. Or the fact that he abandoned our state and flew to Cancun during a deadly winter storm. There are a lot of reasons to vote against Ted Cruz – and he knows it. Polling showed more Texans disapprove of the job he's doing than support him, and CNN ranks him as one of the most vulnerable incumbent senators on the ballot next year. He's already calling this race a "firefight" and launching lie-filled attacks against Colin Allred. We're not scared of Ted Cruz, but we know failing to fight back against his lies could doom our campaign before it even gets off the ground. We have a real chance to defeat Cruz, but only if we have the money we need to compete. So we set a rapid-response goal to raise $250,000 by midnight, and we're urgently asking for your help, Peter: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Thanks for giving what you can to help us defeat Ted Cruz! subject: Setting the bar.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Haley for President
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Peter It was a busy week on the campaign trail as Nikki Haley criss-crossed the Granite State, showing how to campaign “the New Hampshire way.” This week, Nikki wrapped up her fourth swing in New Hampshire and her 28th stop in the state since launching her campaign. It was a jam-packed week with back-to-back events and overflowing rooms of fired up voters who are ready to make America strong and proud again. Nikki is headed back to Iowa next week where she will attend Joni Ernst’s annual https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a7596589d38b6fd01e2ed4e3580caf674c685b3ad98320a0281edcd4518af86d1d970807894e77cd55c8724cd312c614de8532353a31574e Roast and Ride . Nikki will also participate in a CNN presidential town hall on June 4th! Take a look at this week's highlights. NEW HAMPSHIRE RECAP: Goffstown, N.H. – Politics and Eggs Manchester Ink Link: “If Wednesday was any indication, New Hampshire can prepare for a lot of Nikki Haley over the next few months.” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a7596589d38b6fd05bb8afe763193df68aa8b20babc6fbc6c7bc4d648aa9cb7b5ba187634300df18b5ed2f689fe4576526d3efdbb305ad64 Manchester Ink Link , 5/24/23) New Hampshire's Institute of Politics Neil Levesque: “@NikkiHaley⁩ signed every egg and met every NH voter” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a7596589d38b6fd06a71f0609af599c1f01d3acd8ff039843c691ea9bffdb4a5094d39621194fbf23b82e2db928a03dd4346747be6dd9c9b Twitter , 5/24/23) Bedford, N.H. - Women for Nikki The Daily Beast’s Jake Lahut: “Nikki Haley at her 2nd stop of the day (out of 4 or 5 more for the day), kicking off Women for Nikki in NH: ‘There’s nothing I enjoy more than hanging out with some girlfriends, but I see there are some fellas here too!’” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a7596589d38b6fd0b25715ba6afeba1d7f24d2080eecbfc92db5887d02d9a4074b10227b373a254445121655633340f243a2addd5957c308 Twitter , 5/24/23) Concord, N.H. – Veterans for Nikki Washington Examiner: “Republican presidential candidate Nikki Haley unveiled a five-point plan to help veterans and jabbed Congress for failing to address the ‘mess.’” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a7596589d38b6fd0b4aaa905527fd171d8be20069834c53711231a69ff722963d8aca78bbbf5a3aabbbf93995ef81db117e1a40549f62ab1 Washington Examiner , 5/24/23) Washington Post’s Dylan Wells: “Nikki Haley’s new veterans plan would ‘require congressional members to get their healthcare from the VA to increase congressional oversight and hold Congress accountable for problems.’” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a7596589d38b6fd0d97fd010fe7c7f6124fe4dc417d67b313224d7d2d87c93a360d3c847750dbc7b423270cbed3bb7945ca2ee9c0c4fca81 Twitter , 5/24/23) CBS News’ Cristina Corujo: “‘Members of Congress should live with the same VA healthcare as our veterans. They should experience the same delays, get the same bureaucratic runaround, and endure the same frustration as our heroes,’ @NikkiHaley wrote in a Portsmouth Herald piece.” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a7596589d38b6fd04bc4bc58e653fe4d38707076f7ff36f2e1b2a10fe00e7fe667b3eb8ca715999cbf154b670f3a9f0b084af2601e5a73d6 Twitter , 5/24/23) Rye, N.H. – No BS Backyard BBQ Washington Examiner’s Tiana Lowe: “This is Haley’s 5th event pulling at least 100 people within 24 hours in New Hampshire and her 28th NH event of the 2024 cycle.” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a7596589d38b6fd088dc16b33e349057124f2bc6a0b68868e9195c5d19de9cc28e3398ceb7adfeb388ccffaf76341778541a7986f95af827 Twitter , 5/24/23) Sen. Scott Brown: “Thanks to @NikkiHaley for kicking off the No BS Backyard BBQ series tonight in Rye - she is campaigning the New Hampshire way and taking the #FITN seriously #nhpolitics. Over 375 there inside and out, even in the rain.” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a8ddd74b28e357ffb97bc99a1254a89dab69e5bfa79e968c96fb1ff4a9cd612bda458f85d01736e22cf6c97858cfe20b8feb91437d32f463 Twitter , 5/24/23) WHAT GRANITE STATERS ARE SAYING “I thought she was fabulous. She’s a scrappy woman who goes after everything she wants and gets it done.” – Carol Harvey, Portsmouth ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a8ddd74b28e357ff197fdb2b9abca98f559ce0734cfa5eca025d63b8213b6adc90b072a8370ccdc1b29b4bfdcc72aefa11b2e4721811a4b0 NH Journal , 5/24/23) “One thing that’s great about Nikki is that she understands what mothers go through and all of that internal dialogue and stress of being pregnant and having a family and trying to care for your family,” – Danielle Evansic, Bedford ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a8ddd74b28e357ff107c25c541da7ace7554ce7cedd87d948f31909af373387a5b1440e07945f9085a8ab4443d42eb9c4cae3343281946dd USA Today , 5/25/23) “She’s very capable. I have no doubt she could do the job.” – Kathy Powell, Bedford ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a8ddd74b28e357ff107c25c541da7ace7554ce7cedd87d948f31909af373387a5b1440e07945f9085a8ab4443d42eb9c4cae3343281946dd USA Today , 5/25/23) “I see something different in Haley…” – Doug Bianchi, Milford ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a8ddd74b28e357ff107c25c541da7ace7554ce7cedd87d948f31909af373387a5b1440e07945f9085a8ab4443d42eb9c4cae3343281946dd USA Today , 5/25/23) IN THE NEWS https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a8ddd74b28e357ffa4471305e3186d8d78ffe76a2e8701694755560347a2f9c98b32dc4065e2667156dd24d758dc50f0dcd9c300ef75c2bc Breitbart: Nikki Haley Unveils Five-Point Plan to Assist America’s Veterans "Republican presidential candidate Nikki Haley has a five-point policy plan to assist United States veterans, including a vision to require members of Congress to obtain their healthcare through the Department of Veterans of Affairs (VA), Breitbart News has learned. Haley’s campaign exclusively shared her policy plan with Breitbart News ahead of a busy day on the New Hampshire campaign trail on Tuesday, where she will unveil her Veterans for Nikki Coalition." https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a8ddd74b28e357ffe0a3668d4647dae77314df74995770d043e6556a9c6bcda034d220581567a130315ce72603c566320a51ffa02f7acfd8 CONTINUE READING >> https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a8ddd74b28e357ff52f3d86b68f2bb65aabd1c3ac869e2fd9ad34c054c3687520b4001364174047473c35e18c0015a390e313da7eb47fcba Breitbart: Nikki Haley to Sit with CNN at Town Hall in Iowa Next Month “The former South Carolina governor and U.S. ambassador to the U.N. will appear in a town hall during the 8:00 PM ET hour on June 4 with CNN anchor Jake Tapper as the moderator.” https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a8ddd74b28e357ff52f3d86b68f2bb65aabd1c3ac869e2fd9ad34c054c3687520b4001364174047473c35e18c0015a390e313da7eb47fcba CONTINUE READING >> https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a8ddd74b28e357ff0a5cf3d390e27230b6062e56119b58bdbe3dca274a98050c6eefd7e93d5f553d4638f385f3d8113a08db92038d9384ff Washington Examiner: Nikki Haley is the leader we need to fix our debt crisis “Our country has a spending problem — a bipartisan one. For decades, Democrats and Republicans have run up the national tab without a care for who they might hurt. And as a result, American families are paying the price in the form of crippling inflation, and our children and grandchildren will have to pay it all back for decades to come. Instead of getting their spending problem under control, our leaders are asking the bank for a larger limit. In a few weeks, Washington, D.C., will reach a once-unthinkable milestone, hitting the $31.4 trillion limit on the national debt. It’s astounding that we’ve already spent more than $31 trillion. It’s unbelievable that our leaders want to spend even more.” https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a8ddd74b28e357ff0a5cf3d390e27230b6062e56119b58bdbe3dca274a98050c6eefd7e93d5f553d4638f385f3d8113a08db92038d9384ff CONTINUE READING >> https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a8ddd74b28e357ff8d857f4670d72e2bc52be5992a6dba52c914cfe1bbab0b427ab48ac59e67f83eafa0b0c92dd6a657eceda9ede51b4d73 MAYVILLE: Haley Has the Leadership Qualities Our Country Needs “Our country needs a multi-faceted, vibrant leader. My career as a U.S. Air Force officer, professor of nursing, and New Hampshire state legislator has given me the opportunity to work alongside great leaders. Our next president needs to embody the best qualities of a great leader, which I like to call “the four C’s”: character, courage, competence, and communication. Nikki Haley clearly has these qualities, and that is why I’m very proud to support former governor and United Nations Ambassador Nikki Haley for president of the United States of America. Character. Character is who you are as a person—not just in the public spotlight, but in the quiet moments when the cameras are gone. Moral character encompasses behavior that may never personally benefit you but rather exhibits grace, poise, and integrity. Nikki’s character was shaped early in her life story.” https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a8ddd74b28e357ff8d857f4670d72e2bc52be5992a6dba52c914cfe1bbab0b427ab48ac59e67f83eafa0b0c92dd6a657eceda9ede51b4d73 CONTINUE READING >> UPCOMING EVENTS https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a7596589d38b6fd01e2ed4e3580caf674c685b3ad98320a0281edcd4518af86d1d970807894e77cd55c8724cd312c614de8532353a31574e Joni Ernst’s Roast and Ride: Saturday, June 3 CNN Town Hall: Sunday, June 4 at 8 pm If you haven’t followed Nikki Haley on social media yet, make sure to follow her on https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a8ddd74b28e357ff99f72ab9b6f7c38b641d2dbfcfdb875797feb1375d6554b4a4c287e70a6d7e82045c84207bd4b9152780b457c528eaa5 Facebook , https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=a8ddd74b28e357ffa2a7560744764f77cc54fbdd9356f23b972af864c62eed300b54baae0460680caa852a73677603f2bb11d80ca00397d4 Twitter , and https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=28291362cf44ba546dfffaabe7dece87ff89962fc485240c70007e13c02492f2a30a6120c6c8dbc72fd11e01067313526047af55e31d651c Instagram for more of the latest updates. Have a wonderful weekend! -Team Haley https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=28291362cf44ba54038ee3457b6a994d73337152305a86ee2e1a420ef1d05aabae9807e50e3f6a6fbbe42912495d1e8b9ccd5da5f839f8b0 DONATE NIKKI HALEY MERCHANDISE HIGHLIGHT: A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley this summer is with your very own https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=28291362cf44ba54f9ab3f88ec6d0241184aa31fe6d2f5a2708c526ae2f7de92d12f1369846ed033c4a7b6625565b52a4667d7d5700b0622 Strong & Proud not Weak & Woke drink cooler ! All of our merchandise is made in America. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=28291362cf44ba54f9ab3f88ec6d0241184aa31fe6d2f5a2708c526ae2f7de92d12f1369846ed033c4a7b6625565b52a4667d7d5700b0622 ">Contribute now to support Nikki Haley and claim your drink cooler today! > https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=28291362cf44ba54f9ab3f88ec6d0241184aa31fe6d2f5a2708c526ae2f7de92d12f1369846ed033c4a7b6625565b52a4667d7d5700b0622 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=28291362cf44ba54f9ab3f88ec6d0241184aa31fe6d2f5a2708c526ae2f7de92d12f1369846ed033c4a7b6625565b52a4667d7d5700b0622 GET YOURS NOW! NIKKI HALEY’S OFFICIAL CAMPAIGN STORE: https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=28291362cf44ba543464fd563e2d92bf90d67fa50efe902eaf323cc9162b7a6b5900ce890974d4a76b531a3eaaf4672cf557823973a27eef https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=28291362cf44ba543464fd563e2d92bf90d67fa50efe902eaf323cc9162b7a6b5900ce890974d4a76b531a3eaaf4672cf557823973a27eef VISIT STORE → JOIN TEAM HALEY https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=28291362cf44ba5438f41b00b94985493abf8be4f9a85589f9289e5d425c44991402df34c2432b9ff5d5e6714d34becf860dfd0594409256 With Election Day more than a year out, you may be wondering: Does my donation today really make an impact? The answer is, unequivocally, YES! Grassroots support is what Nikki’s fight to save America is built on. In fact, grassroots conservatives like YOU are the reason Nikki has never lost an election before – from her run for the state legislature to governor. It was a jam-packed week with back-to-back events and overflowing rooms of fired up voters who are ready to make America strong and proud again. Nikki is headed back to Iowa next week where she will attend Joni Ernst’s annual Roast and Ride . Nikki will also participate in a CNN presidential town hall on June 4th! Take a look at this week's highlights. NEW HAMPSHIRE RECAP: Goffstown, N.H. – Politics and Eggs Manchester Ink Link: “If Wednesday was any indication, New Hampshire can prepare for a lot of Nikki Haley over the next few months.” ( Manchester Ink Link , 5/24/23) New Hampshire's Institute of Politics Neil Levesque: “@NikkiHaley⁩ signed every egg and met every NH voter” ( Twitter , 5/24/23) Bedford, N.H. - Women for Nikki The Daily Beast’s Jake Lahut: “Nikki Haley at her 2nd stop of the day (out of 4 or 5 more for the day), kicking off Women for Nikki in NH: ‘There’s nothing I enjoy more than hanging out with some girlfriends, but I see there are some fellas here too!’” ( Twitter , 5/24/23) Concord, N.H. – Veterans for Nikki Washington Examiner: “Republican presidential candidate Nikki Haley unveiled a five-point plan to help veterans and jabbed Congress for failing to address the ‘mess.’” ( Washington Examiner , 5/24/23) Washington Post’s Dylan Wells: “Nikki Haley’s new veterans plan would ‘require congressional members to get their healthcare from the VA to increase congressional oversight and hold Congress accountable for problems.’” ( Twitter , 5/24/23) CBS News’ Cristina Corujo: “‘Members of Congress should live with the same VA healthcare as our veterans. They should experience the same delays, get the same bureaucratic runaround, and endure the same frustration as our heroes,’ @NikkiHaley wrote in a Portsmouth Herald piece.” ( Twitter , 5/24/23) Rye, N.H. – No BS Backyard BBQ Washington Examiner’s Tiana Lowe: “This is Haley’s 5th event pulling at least 100 people within 24 hours in New Hampshire and her 28th NH event of the 2024 cycle.” ( Twitter , 5/24/23) Sen. Scott Brown: “Thanks to @NikkiHaley for kicking off the No BS Backyard BBQ series tonight in Rye - she is campaigning the New Hampshire way and taking the #FITN seriously #nhpolitics. Over 375 there inside and out, even in the rain.” ( Twitter , 5/24/23) WHAT GRANITE STATERS ARE SAYING “I thought she was fabulous. She’s a scrappy woman who goes after everything she wants and gets it done.” – Carol Harvey, Portsmouth ( NH Journal , 5/24/23) “One thing that’s great about Nikki is that she understands what mothers go through and all of that internal dialogue and stress of being pregnant and having a family and trying to care for your family,” – Danielle Evansic, Bedford ( USA Today , 5/25/23) “She’s very capable. I have no doubt she could do the job.” – Kathy Powell, Bedford ( USA Today , 5/25/23) “I see something different in Haley…” – Doug Bianchi, Milford ( USA Today , 5/25/23) IN THE NEWS Breitbart: Nikki Haley Unveils Five-Point Plan to Assist America’s Veterans "Republican presidential candidate Nikki Haley has a five-point policy plan to assist United States veterans, including a vision to require members of Congress to obtain their healthcare through the Department of Veterans of Affairs (VA), Breitbart News has learned. Haley’s campaign exclusively shared her policy plan with Breitbart News ahead of a busy day on the New Hampshire campaign trail on Tuesday, where she will unveil her Veterans for Nikki Coalition." CONTINUE READING >> Breitbart: Nikki Haley to Sit with CNN at Town Hall in Iowa Next Month “The former South Carolina governor and U.S. ambassador to the U.N. will appear in a town hall during the 8:00 PM ET hour on June 4 with CNN anchor Jake Tapper as the moderator.” CONTINUE READING >> Washington Examiner: Nikki Haley is the leader we need to fix our debt crisis “Our country has a spending problem — a bipartisan one. For decades, Democrats and Republicans have run up the national tab without a care for who they might hurt. And as a result, American families are paying the price in the form of crippling inflation, and our children and grandchildren will have to pay it all back for decades to come. Instead of getting their spending problem under control, our leaders are asking the bank for a larger limit. In a few weeks, Washington, D.C., will reach a once-unthinkable milestone, hitting the $31.4 trillion limit on the national debt. It’s astounding that we’ve already spent more than $31 trillion. It’s unbelievable that our leaders want to spend even more.” CONTINUE READING >> MAYVILLE: Haley Has the Leadership Qualities Our Country Needs “Our country needs a multi-faceted, vibrant leader. My career as a U.S. Air Force officer, professor of nursing, and New Hampshire state legislator has given me the opportunity to work alongside great leaders. Our next president needs to embody the best qualities of a great leader, which I like to call “the four C’s”: character, courage, competence, and communication. Nikki Haley clearly has these qualities, and that is why I’m very proud to support former governor and United Nations Ambassador Nikki Haley for president of the United States of America. Character. Character is who you are as a person—not just in the public spotlight, but in the quiet moments when the cameras are gone. Moral character encompasses behavior that may never personally benefit you but rather exhibits grace, poise, and integrity. Nikki’s character was shaped early in her life story.” CONTINUE READING >> UPCOMING EVENTS Joni Ernst’s Roast and Ride: Saturday, June 3 CNN Town Hall: Sunday, June 4 at 8 pm If you haven’t followed Nikki Haley on social media yet, make sure to follow her on Facebook , Twitter , and Instagram for more of the latest updates. Have a wonderful weekend! -Team Haley DONATE NIKKI HALEY MERCHANDISE HIGHLIGHT: A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley this summer is with your very own Strong & Proud not Weak & Woke drink cooler ! All of our merchandise is made in America. ">Contribute now to support Nikki Haley and claim your drink cooler today! > GET YOURS NOW! NIKKI HALEY’S OFFICIAL CAMPAIGN STORE: VISIT STORE → JOIN TEAM HALEY With Election Day more than a year out, you may be wondering: Does my donation today really make an impact? The answer is, unequivocally, YES! Grassroots support is what Nikki’s fight to save America is built on. In fact, grassroots conservatives like YOU are the reason Nikki has never lost an election before – from her run for the state legislature to governor. Your generous support today will allow Nikki and our team to host town halls, hold rallies, meet with voters, and spread her conservative message all around the country. We’re just getting started and would love to have you on Team Haley! ">So, if you can spare it, a donation of $1, $10, or ANY amount goes a long way to help Nikki reach more voters! >> P.S. HER Time’s mission is to support women and young people working to make a difference all across the country.
Often, these can be long-shot candidates who have the vision and drive to make lasting change — but don’t have the resources to compete.
That’s where we come in, Peter. Your donations help us mobilize and support a new generation to help break through those glass ceilings — one crack a time.

We cannot afford to fall behind — not when women and vulnerable communities continue to be the victim of far-right attacks. And ESPECIALLY not when extremist Republicans are working to strip women of their reproductive and abortion rights even further. The time to act is now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = HER Time’s mission is to support women and young people working to make a difference all across the country. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Impulsive decisions are out of character for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friends –
Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.
I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my family was dirt poor.
So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.
I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party switch.
I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.
The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there. And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right.
So I am asking:
Can you please use this link to split $5, $10 or whatever you can afford between Serve America and my campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in. So please. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
Thank you, and adiós,
Ruben

subject: Fwd: Are you still there?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
I promise, this will be the last fundraising request you’ll get from my team before we all return to the office. |

Hey there, Wanted to make sure you saw my team’s message yesterday. We only have four more days left to close our $19,980 goal this month to ensure we can continue fighting back against MAGA extremism. Abortion rights, voting rights, and LGBTQ+ rights are constantly under attack and the path to progress is regaining our House majority. There’s no rest when the wicked are at work. I am so grateful for each and every one of you who pitch in to help us hold Republicans accountable under these extraordinary times. So if you can, take 3 minutes to donate $5 or whatever you can do to help us meet our May goal. You can use my personal link here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-May2023-FR-May?refcode=Eric](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63912367/408404961/2141596888?refcode=E21565-20230527-EOM2-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjYzZWEwNC1hNmZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=useGQ7NwuHM8qvL07E6j2CRWEyTr10CoNOiDxfdgEqU=) I promise, this will be the last fundraising request you’ll get from my team before we all return to the office. I am so grateful for each and every one of you who pitch in to help us hold Republicans accountable under these extraordinary times. So if you can, take 3 minutes to donate $5 or whatever you can do to help us meet our May goal. But this weekend also starts our last fundraising push to reach our May goals. And unfortunately, we’re trailing behind. body:
2024 will be here sooner than we think
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63912385/408405118/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBiNDgwMjUtYTZmYy1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mj9yHE_abHIXf-HJGTLtTvA4lRMM0h4zdhWoQeYX3A0=&emci=6147fdfa-effb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=60b48025-a6fc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Peter,

Every day, I am reminded of how proud I am of what we've achieved together for our district and state.

From my days working in economic development to serving in the Washington State Capitol and now as your representative in the U.S. House — **it has been the honor of a lifetime serving the people of our region.**

Just this month **_alone_** , we've: launched the Puget Sound Federal Leadership Task Force, alongside Rep. Marilyn Strickland; introduced the Mental Health Improvement Act to address the mental health crisis within our armed forces; and introduced the Yes In My Backyard Act to help to invest in affordable, safe housing.

And what's more, with you by my side, we've made progress by lowering the costs of prescription drugs, rebuilding our infrastructure (and creating tens of millions of jobs in the process!), protecting our natural resources, securing record funding for salmon restoration and Puget Sound recovery, **and So. Much. More.**

Now, I am more ready than ever to roll up my sleeves as we look ahead to 2024 and prepare to build another winning campaign, powered by grassroots supporters like you, Peter. _That's why today, I'm reaching out to ask you for a quick favor:_

**[My campaign has set an ambitious $20,000 May end-of-month fundraising goal, and I'm counting on this team for support. Will you consider pitching in $5 or more before our deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63912386/408405119/1071353790?refcode=em23_230527_eom1_fndd_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230527_eom1_fndd_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=60b48025-a6fc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBiNDgwMjUtYTZmYy1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mj9yHE_abHIXf-HJGTLtTvA4lRMM0h4zdhWoQeYX3A0=)**

name: Colin Allred for Texas via Blue Amp Action
subject: 🚨 Cook Political Ratings Change >>
body:
Our numbers are up!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5002f8e1-04d5-4482-bff5-3d66d4a79e4a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._

|

| |

| | | | | BREAKING: Cook Political Report INCREASES Democrats' chances of winning in TX after Allred enters race against Cruz This is incredible, Peter: Just hours after Colin entered the race against Ted Cruz, Cook Political Report UPGRADED our chances of flipping this seat! This is a clear sign that we can win. Experts are noticing – but so are Ted Cruz and his billionaire, special-interest supporters. Ted is even already spreading lies about Colin Allred! [That's why we have to ask: Will you split a donation of $10 or more now between Colin and Blue Amp Action to help Colin fight Cruz's attacks and continue this incredible momentum? →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td8e6e347-9a91-4211-81ca-dcc9234aa1fb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We know Ted Cruz is in the pocket of wealthy donors and corporate lobbyists that will be lining up to support him. Colin, on the other hand, isn't taking a dime of corporate money – instead he's building a grassroots movement from the ground up, and we're counting on you to be a part of it. [We're starting this campaign with momentum the state of Texas has never seen before, but we cannot let our foot off the gas. So please, make a split donation between Colin and Blue Amp Action of $5, $10 or whatever you can so we have the resources to send Cruz packing once and for all. Every dollar helps in our fight to flip Texas blue! →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9c2c182c-869f-4801-83b7-a53dccbda946/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Defeating Ted Cruz is going to take all of us. Thanks for giving what you can. Team Allred

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

Colin, on the other hand, isn't taking a dime of corporate money – instead he's building a grassroots movement from the ground up, and we're counting on you to be a part of it. Defeating Ted Cruz is going to take all of us. Thanks for giving what you can. Team Allred | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | or

subject: A $63k difference
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, since we
are a grassroots organization, we want to be really transparent with you
about where our fundraising this month is at, compared to 2021 (the last
year we recruited candidates):

Time Period Amount Raised
May 1-26, 2023: $62,922
May 1-26 2021: $126,568
Difference: –$63,646

We reject all corporate PAC contributions and rely on small-dollar
fundraising, so it’s really important that we notice any dips and do
everything we can to make up the difference.

Unlike the DCCC, we don’t believe in trying to scare or guilt trip you
into donating. There is no reason to kiss all hope goodbye. And we don’t
have any generous donors to “QUADRUPLE MATCH” your donation.

We really do need to get serious about our fundraising as we get even
closer to the mid-point of the year and make up for our unprecedented
slowdown.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134706?refcode=em20230527-29146&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=29146%2E1203867%2E1AsCRN ]Will you donate right now to help us pick up the pace to make up for
our shortfall this month? We’re in a fight for the soul of the Democratic
Party and your support, whether it’s $5 or $100, truly makes a difference
for us.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134706?refcode=em20230527-29146&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=29146%2E1203867%2E1AsCRN ]Contribute $3

We’re so thankful for your support.

More soon,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=29146%2E1203867%2E1AsCRN ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=29146%2E1203867%2E1AsCRN ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230527-29146-footer&t=1023&refcode2=29146_1203867_1AsCRN&akid=29146%2E1203867%2E1AsCRN

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=29146%2E1203867%2E1AsCRN

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! Keith Ellison on George Floyd, police reform, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Medicare for All Rally | Keith Ellison: George Floyd
Murder | OR Activist Attacked by GOP Rep | Regunberg for Congress (RI-1) |
Beckles for CA State Senate | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8418?t=1011&akid=4328%2E5885482%2ENtO8b8 ][IMG]

Our Revolution is the country’s largest grassroots-funded progressive
political group because of you!

Right now, we’re waging campaigns to raise wages, abolish medical debt,
end fossil fuel subsidies, and more. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8693?t=1012&akid=4328%2E5885482%2ENtO8b8 ]If you’re able, we hope you’ll
pitch in an extra donation to help us meet our end-of-month goal of
$10,000 to help fund this work!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Thursday marked the 3rd anniversary of George Floyd’s death, and we sat
down with Minnesota AG and Our Revolution Board Member Keith Ellison, who
put Derek Chauvin - the murderer of George Floyd - behind bars in a rare
conviction for police brutality.

A leader at the forefront of the battle for police reform and true public
safety, Keith joined our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8687?t=1013&akid=4328%2E5885482%2ENtO8b8 ]LIVE Organizing Call on Monday to impart
lessons from the case as told in his new book, “[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8688?t=1014&akid=4328%2E5885482%2ENtO8b8 ]Break the Wheel: Ending
the Cycle of Police Violence.”

“When we stand against police brutality, we’re standing up for the idea
that the government should not be able to use arbitrary violence against
you because you’re the wrong color, the wrong religion, the wrong
politics,” Keith said.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8688?t=1015&akid=4328%2E5885482%2ENtO8b8 ][IMG]

“This is about equal protection under the law. No one is above the law, no
one is beneath the law,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8694?t=1016&akid=4328%2E5885482%2ENtO8b8 ]Keith told us in this clip. “This issue of
police brutality is solvable, we don’t have to live with it.”

Indeed, Congress has not passed the George Floyd Justice and Policing Act
and the number of police-involved incidents doesn’t seem to have stopped,
but we are seeing more police officers being prosecuted for killing
people.

But, when progressive leaders like Keith stand up for what’s right, they
can face massive blowback, and it’s up to us to be there for them when
they do.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8688?t=1017&akid=4328%2E5885482%2ENtO8b8 ][IMG]

Keith faced an onslaught of negative ads from police unions and big money
in his run for re-election in November, but Our Revolution made 500,000
voter contacts and helped him win by 20,000 votes. “Because of Our
Revolution, we prevailed,” he said.

He explained, “some prosecutors who want to hold police accountable and
make sure everyone lives under equal justice, but think ‘if I do this the
police union is going to come around next election and defeat me, then I
won’t be able to do any good for anybody.”

“We’ve got to stand together. It’s way better to win the election, not
just know we fought the good fight,” Keith said. “We’re in it to win it,
and we know most people share our values — we just have to reach them.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8688?t=1018&akid=4328%2E5885482%2ENtO8b8 ][IMG]

While they last, get your signed copy of Keith Ellison’s new Book, “Break
The Wheel: Ending the Cycle of Police Violence” with any donation of $35
or more!

Get an insider’s look at the George Floyd murder trial and the strategy to
win real police reform and true public safety. Each book sold helps fund
this necessary work.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8688?t=1019&akid=4328%2E5885482%2ENtO8b8 ]GET YOUR COPY OF KEITH'S NEW BOOK!

★ ★ ★

THE FIGHT FOR MEDICARE FOR ALL & FREEDOM FROM MEDICAL DEBT

This week, Our Revolution joined Bernie Sanders and US Rep. Pramila
Jayapal for a town hall and rally to reintroduce Medicare for All in
Congress! And, we’re organizing people with medical debt to speak up and
fight for health care justice.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8647?t=1020&akid=4328%2E5885482%2ENtO8b8 ]Join our growing team organizing to build pressure on Congress and the
President to cancel medical debt, end price-gouging, guarantee free care,
and stop predatory collection tactics. Our next meeting is this Wednesday
at 7 pm ET on Zoom.

★ ★ ★

After the Medicare for All rally on Capitol Hill, Our Revolution Howard
County MD leader Jake Burdett was physically attacked by US Rep. Clay
Higgins for asking questions at a MAGA press conference.

“Higgins seemed to forget he had to resign from being a cop for excessive
force years ago,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8695?t=1021&akid=4328%2E5885482%2ENtO8b8 ]Jake told us on our live call. “It was scary, he put
his hands on me, and I knew I had no choice but to let it happen.”

The crowd yelled at Higgins to stop, but afterward Capitol police detained
Jake instead of the Congressman for 30 minutes. “I still don’t know if
it’s over,” Jake said.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8689?t=1022&akid=4328%2E5885482%2ENtO8b8 ]SEE THE VIRAL VIDEO HERE!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

NEW ENDORSEMENT! Our Revolution is backing Aaron Regunberg for Congress in
a special election to replace outgoing US Rep. David Cicilline in RI-1.

Electing Aaron means building on Cicilline’s work and making sure this
seat stays progressive. It means keeping a yes vote for Medicare For All,
canceling medical debt, and universal childcare. We cannot give up any
ground.

Aaron started as a community organizer and became a State Rep, building
coalitions to pass laws for paid sick days, higher wages, and renewable
energy. And, as a new lawyer, he’s supported court cases to hold Big Oil
companies accountable for their environmental crimes.

“There are so many issues that we can win real change on,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8696?t=1023&akid=4328%2E5885482%2ENtO8b8 ]Aaron told
us in this clip. “The cool thing about this race is that we have a really
good shot to win this thing. If we do the work, if we organize our
communities with the help of OR and your amazing members, we can win.”

We must protect this seat and keep up the work of taking on corporate
power and fighting for regular people. Plug in with our team of organizers
to help elect Aaron Regunberg on Election Day September 6th!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8216?t=1024&akid=4328%2E5885482%2ENtO8b8 ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM

★ ★ ★

Jovanka Beckles has kicked off her run for California State Senate with
the backing of Our Revolution East Bay and Richmond Progressives! She’s
the strongest progressive in the race and would be the second black woman
in the state’s 40-seat legislature.

Jovanka got a rare local endorsement from Bernie Sanders in her run for
Richmond City Council in 2014, when she was embattled with Chevron. She
won her race and helped get $100M from the corporation to invest in the
people of the city.

An activist, Jovanka is featured in the Smithsonian for her work with BLM
and the Oakland Museum, which describes her as a ‘community member facing
down goliath, who became a member of Richmond City Council as Chevron
waged a multi-million dollar campaign against her, went on to raise the
corporations’ taxes, lower crime by 33 percent and pass California's first
rent-control ordinance in 30 years.’

“Siblings, this is just to say that I have a track record of standing up
and defending the community,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8697?t=1025&akid=4328%2E5885482%2ENtO8b8 ]she told us on our live call.

★ ★ ★

The best way to make an impact on these races from anywhere in the country
is to sign up to make calls with our team of volunteers.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4329?t=1026&akid=4328%2E5885482%2ENtO8b8 ]JOIN THE PHONE BANK TEAM

★ ★ ★

VICTORY! Last week, Our Revolution-backed Sara Innamorato beat back big
money to become the next Allegheny County Executive - creating a
progressive trifecta in Pittsburgh!

We backed Sara in her successful run for PA House back in 2018 alongside
now-US Rep. Summer Lee, and now we’re proud to see her take the helm of
the second-largest county in Pennsylvania!

As County Exec, she’ll have the power to directly affect people’s lives —
from county-wide housing to addressing human rights violations in the
county jail to protecting abortion care.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

On Monday, Our Revolution joined One Fair Wage at the National Restaurant
Association annual convention in Chicago to call out the lobby’s nefarious
acts against workers.

As adults cannot survive on subminimum wages and the service industry
faces a labor shortage, the Restaurant Association is lobbying to allow
teens to work late and serve alcohol.

“It’s 2023, and we still have to fight for child labor laws?” asked Mike
Oles, OR Organizing Director told the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8691?t=1027&akid=4328%2E5885482%2ENtO8b8 ]Chicago Sun-Times.

Get involved with our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8692?t=1028&akid=4328%2E5885482%2ENtO8b8 ]Raise the Wage Team to organize state by state
for better pay and an end to subminimum wages for tipped workers!

★ ★ ★

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION HEADLINES: Medicare for All Rally | Keith Ellison: George Floyd Murder | OR Activist Attacked by GOP Rep | Regunberg for Congress (RI-1) | Beckles for CA State Senate | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution is the country’s largest grassroots-funded progressive political group because of you! Right now, we’re waging campaigns to raise wages, abolish medical debt, end fossil fuel subsidies, and more. [ ]If you’re able, we hope you’ll pitch in an extra donation to help us meet our end-of-month goal of $10,000 to help fund this work! ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Thursday marked the 3rd anniversary of George Floyd’s death, and we sat down with Minnesota AG and Our Revolution Board Member Keith Ellison, who put Derek Chauvin - the murderer of George Floyd - behind bars in a rare conviction for police brutality. A leader at the forefront of the battle for police reform and true public safety, Keith joined our [ ]LIVE Organizing Call on Monday to impart lessons from the case as told in his new book, “[ ]Break the Wheel: Ending the Cycle of Police Violence.” “When we stand against police brutality, we’re standing up for the idea that the government should not be able to use arbitrary violence against you because you’re the wrong color, the wrong religion, the wrong politics,” Keith said. [ ][IMG] “This is about equal protection under the law. No one is above the law, no one is beneath the law,” [ ]Keith told us in this clip. “This issue of police brutality is solvable, we don’t have to live with it.” Indeed, Congress has not passed the George Floyd Justice and Policing Act and the number of police-involved incidents doesn’t seem to have stopped, but we are seeing more police officers being prosecuted for killing people. But, when progressive leaders like Keith stand up for what’s right, they can face massive blowback, and it’s up to us to be there for them when they do. [ ][IMG] Keith faced an onslaught of negative ads from police unions and big money in his run for re-election in November, but Our Revolution made 500,000 voter contacts and helped him win by 20,000 votes. “Because of Our Revolution, we prevailed,” he said. He explained, “some prosecutors who want to hold police accountable and make sure everyone lives under equal justice, but think ‘if I do this the police union is going to come around next election and defeat me, then I won’t be able to do any good for anybody.” “We’ve got to stand together. It’s way better to win the election, not just know we fought the good fight,” Keith said. “We’re in it to win it, and we know most people share our values — we just have to reach them.” [ ][IMG] While they last, get your signed copy of Keith Ellison’s new Book, “Break The Wheel: Ending the Cycle of Police Violence” with any donation of $35 or more! Get an insider’s look at the George Floyd murder trial and the strategy to win real police reform and true public safety. Each book sold helps fund this necessary work. [ ]GET YOUR COPY OF KEITH'S NEW BOOK! ★ ★ ★ THE FIGHT FOR MEDICARE FOR ALL & FREEDOM FROM MEDICAL DEBT This week, Our Revolution joined Bernie Sanders and US Rep. Pramila Jayapal for a town hall and rally to reintroduce Medicare for All in Congress! And, we’re organizing people with medical debt to speak up and fight for health care justice. [ ]Join our growing team organizing to build pressure on Congress and the President to cancel medical debt, end price-gouging, guarantee free care, and stop predatory collection tactics. Our next meeting is this Wednesday at 7 pm ET on Zoom. ★ ★ ★ After the Medicare for All rally on Capitol Hill, Our Revolution Howard County MD leader Jake Burdett was physically attacked by US Rep. Clay Higgins for asking questions at a MAGA press conference. “Higgins seemed to forget he had to resign from being a cop for excessive force years ago,” [ ]Jake told us on our live call. “It was scary, he put his hands on me, and I knew I had no choice but to let it happen.” The crowd yelled at Higgins to stop, but afterward Capitol police detained Jake instead of the Congressman for 30 minutes. “I still don’t know if it’s over,” Jake said. [ ]SEE THE VIRAL VIDEO HERE! ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ NEW ENDORSEMENT! Our Revolution is backing Aaron Regunberg for Congress in a special election to replace outgoing US Rep. David Cicilline in RI-1. Electing Aaron means building on Cicilline’s work and making sure this seat stays progressive. It means keeping a yes vote for Medicare For All, canceling medical debt, and universal childcare. We cannot give up any ground. Aaron started as a community organizer and became a State Rep, building coalitions to pass laws for paid sick days, higher wages, and renewable energy. And, as a new lawyer, he’s supported court cases to hold Big Oil companies accountable for their environmental crimes. “There are so many issues that we can win real change on,” [ ]Aaron told us in this clip. “The cool thing about this race is that we have a really good shot to win this thing. If we do the work, if we organize our communities with the help of OR and your amazing members, we can win.” We must protect this seat and keep up the work of taking on corporate power and fighting for regular people. Plug in with our team of organizers to help elect Aaron Regunberg on Election Day September 6th! [ ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM ★ ★ ★ Jovanka Beckles has kicked off her run for California State Senate with the backing of Our Revolution East Bay and Richmond Progressives! She’s the strongest progressive in the race and would be the second black woman in the state’s 40-seat legislature. Jovanka got a rare local endorsement from Bernie Sanders in her run for Richmond City Council in 2014, when she was embattled with Chevron. She won her race and helped get $100M from the corporation to invest in the people of the city. An activist, Jovanka is featured in the Smithsonian for her work with BLM and the Oakland Museum, which describes her as a ‘community member facing down goliath, who became a member of Richmond City Council as Chevron waged a multi-million dollar campaign against her, went on to raise the corporations’ taxes, lower crime by 33 percent and pass California's first rent-control ordinance in 30 years.’ “Siblings, this is just to say that I have a track record of standing up and defending the community,” [ ]she told us on our live call. ★ ★ ★ The best way to make an impact on these races from anywhere in the country is to sign up to make calls with our team of volunteers. [ ]JOIN THE PHONE BANK TEAM ★ ★ ★ VICTORY! Last week, Our Revolution-backed Sara Innamorato beat back big money to become the next Allegheny County Executive - creating a progressive trifecta in Pittsburgh! We backed Sara in her successful run for PA House back in 2018 alongside now-US Rep. Summer Lee, and now we’re proud to see her take the helm of the second-largest county in Pennsylvania! As County Exec, she’ll have the power to directly affect people’s lives — from county-wide housing to addressing human rights violations in the county jail to protecting abortion care. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ On Monday, Our Revolution joined One Fair Wage at the National Restaurant Association annual convention in Chicago to call out the lobby’s nefarious acts against workers. As adults cannot survive on subminimum wages and the service industry faces a labor shortage, the Restaurant Association is lobbying to allow teens to work late and serve alcohol. “It’s 2023, and we still have to fight for child labor laws?” asked Mike Oles, OR Organizing Director told the [ ]Chicago Sun-Times. Get involved with our [ ]Raise the Wage Team to organize state by state for better pay and an end to subminimum wages for tipped workers! ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution is waging campaigns to raise the wage, abolish medical debt, end fossil fuel subsidies, and more. clean_body: | Team — if you didn’t think your vote matters, think again. Just last year, Colorado was home to TWO of the closest House races in the country. More than 230,000 votes were cast in Colorado’s new 8th congressional district. That race came down to just 1,600 votes. 1,600 votes decided an entire election. That’s it. Republicans know how competitive Colorado is going to be. That’s why they’ve already started attacking our Democratic candidates, with even more attacks on the way. Your support helped Jason stand up to extremism and elect incredible candidates like Yadira Caraveo and Brittany Pettersen. clean_body: If you ever want to know who’s really in control, just follow the money. | | | Friend, There’s a tried and true saying: if you ever want to know who’s really in control, just follow the money. If you follow Crooked Joe’s money, it goes back to George Soros, Hollywood, Wall Street, and potentially even BRIBES from foreign nationals. If you follow the money being spent against me in the GOP primary, it goes back to special interest RINOs who have a record of putting America DEAD LAST. But if you follow our movement’s money, it goes right back to YOU. YOU are in control of this movement. And when I’m in the White House again, YOU will be in control of your own country again... The money starts with you and ends with you. This is your movement. And I am your voice. Thank you, | Donald J. name: Katie Porter (iphone)
subject: quick state of the race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Hey Derek, I hope you’re enjoying the long weekend, so I’ll keep this quick.
Our race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive primary of 2024. I’m running because special interests and big corporations have rigged the rules against families and working people. It’s time to shake up the status quo and make real progress.
I’d be so honored to earn your support. Polling has us just pulling ahead, but another candidate still has a big cash advantage over us. Anything you can give today will help us build on this momentum and turn out voters.
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230527-1?refcode=EMAH27_1_PLA_20230527_V1_F](https://act.katieporter.com/go/17669?refcode=EMAH27_1_PLA_20230527_V1_F&t=1&akid=23637%2E3422442%2EktASxr)**
Thanks!
Katie Porter

Team,

We hate to bug you on a Saturday, so we’ll keep this quick.

Nikki continues to be on the frontlines fighting for Illinoisans, and her work in May has been no exception. Just this month, Nikki has:
* Announced millions in federal funding coming to our state to improve our railway systems and expand our public transportation options statewide
* Joined her colleagues in demanding increased funding to combat our states' growing food deserts, and
* Advocated on our behalf to help lower gas prices and increase ethanol availability

This is exactly the kind of leadership the people of Illinois’ 13th District deserve, team, and we need to ensure it continues for years to come. But this race is already heating up – not only has a Republican opponent already filed, but national Republicans are eyeing this seat as a must-win to expand their majority. It’s vital we hit every goal right now so we can be prepared for whatever comes our way in attacks.

**Trump boasts he 'was able to kill Roe v. Wade,' takes credit for state abortion bans**

Reproductive rights are on the line in 2024, Peter.

Since the Supreme Court overturned the landmark _Roe v. Wade_ decision, millions of women have been stripped of the right to make their own personal reproductive health care decisions.

Now Donald Trump is openly bragging that he “was able to kill _Roe v. Wade_ ,” saying "Without me there would be no 6 weeks, 10 weeks, 15 weeks, or whatever is finally agreed to."

**If MAGA Republicans take back the White House and hold Congressional majorities in 2024, they could go even further, banning abortion nationally.**

As a doctor and congresswoman, Kim believes all women deserve safe reproductive healthcare. She’s fighting to pass legislation like the Women's Health Protection Act and the Protecting Reproductive Freedom Act in Congress to fight back against extreme abortion bans being passed in states across the country.

Last year, Kim defeated a Trump-supporting Republican who wanted to ban abortion without exceptions for rape or incest. With National Republicans already targeting Kim, re-electing Kim is critical to winning a pro-choice majority that can enshrine our right to choose.

**[Will you join Kim in the fight to defend reproductive rights? clean_body: Donald Trump is openly bragging that he “was able to kill Roe v. Wade” | | = Trump boasts he 'was able to kill Roe v. Wade,' takes credit for state abortion bans Reproductive rights are on the line in 2024, Peter. Since the Supreme Court overturned the landmark Roe v. Wade decision, millions of women have been stripped of the right to make their own personal reproductive health care decisions. Now Donald Trump is openly bragging that he “was able to kill Roe v. Wade ,” saying "Without me there would be no 6 weeks, 10 weeks, 15 weeks, or whatever is finally agreed to." If MAGA Republicans take back the White House and hold Congressional majorities in 2024, they could go even further, banning abortion nationally. As a doctor and congresswoman, Kim believes all women deserve safe reproductive healthcare. She’s fighting to pass legislation like the Women's Health Protection Act and the Protecting Reproductive Freedom Act in Congress to fight back against extreme abortion bans being passed in states across the country. Last year, Kim defeated a Trump-supporting Republican who wanted to ban abortion without exceptions for rape or incest. With National Republicans already targeting Kim, re-electing Kim is critical to winning a pro-choice majority that can enshrine our right to choose. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible.
