Seth won last year because our grassroots supporters showed up every time we asked, so now, we’re asking if you can help us close this fundraising gap by chipping in what you can today.

Republicans aren’t interested in governing. They’re playing political games with the U.S. economy, attacking abortion rights nationwide, and ignoring the gun violence crisis in America.

**In fact, GOP extremist Lauren Boebert introduced a bill that would cut $1 million from the Providence Police Department — funding specifically earmarked to reduce gun violence and address violent crime!**

We need to take back the House next year so Seth and Democrats can get to work delivering for the American people. And that starts with defending competitive districts like this one.

Here’s more about me and why I’m in this race:

After 9/11, I knew I wanted to work in counterterrorism. That led me to the National Security Division of the U.S. Attorney’s Office where I served as a prosecutor. In recent years, I've seen firsthand that some of the biggest threats we face are right here at home.

More and more, I was handling domestic terrorism cases, many of which involved right-wing extremists who were motivated to do our country harm in the name of a political agenda.

**This type of conspiracy-fueled extremism is a threat to our democracy. We can’t allow it to take root in our politics, let alone the country. We need leaders who will protect our institutions and bring accountability to those who would harm it.**

My opponent Ken Calvert has been one of the worst enablers of the MAGA agenda in Congress. Calvert, and extremists like him, are willing to do and say whatever it takes to hold power -- even if it means undermining democracy and putting lives at risk.

The stakes are high, and we’re also facing unprecedented challenges in 2024. With Trump back on the ballot -- and control of the House and Senate at stake -- reproductive rights, Medicare, Social Security, and voting rights all hang in the balance.

**We came closer than anyone expected to flipping this seat in 2022, and I wouldn’t be in this race if I wasn’t confident we could finish the job. But I can’t do this alone:**

Ken Calvert in California's 41st Congressional District.This will be one of the most competitive House races in the country. To learn more about Will, We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here to . = Peter, I just launched my 2024 campaign to unseat Ken Calvert in California's 41st Congressional District. Last year, my race ended up being one of the closest races in the entire country. We stunned political experts by outperforming every election forecast in CA-41, and I was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote. Now, I’m running to finish the job in 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = Here’s more about me and why I’m in this race: After 9/11, I knew I wanted to work in counterterrorism. That led me to the National Security Division of the U.S. Attorney’s Office where I served as a prosecutor. In recent years, I've seen firsthand that some of the biggest threats we face are right here at home. More and more, I was handling domestic terrorism cases, many of which involved right-wing extremists who were motivated to do our country harm in the name of a political agenda. This type of conspiracy-fueled extremism is a threat to our democracy. We can’t allow it to take root in our politics, let alone the country. We need leaders who will protect our institutions and bring accountability to those who would harm it. My opponent Ken Calvert has been one of the worst enablers of the MAGA agenda in Congress. Calvert, and extremists like him, are willing to do and say whatever it takes to hold power -- even if it means undermining democracy and putting lives at risk. The stakes are high, and we’re also facing unprecedented challenges in 2024. With Trump back on the ballot -- and control of the House and Senate at stake -- reproductive rights, Medicare, Social Security, and voting rights all hang in the balance. We came closer than anyone expected to flipping this seat in 2022, and I wouldn’t be in this race if I wasn’t confident we could finish the job. name: George Whitesides
subject: I’m not your typical politician.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63917430/408423453/1224595648?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTBiODYzNS1iNGZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fy6VAIq2uCpQjyJF9Y1EqVxCmleAJ7-YnFoncH3mbkM=)
Peter,

I've worn many hats in my career. I served as Chief of Staff of NASA under President Barack Obama, was the first CEO of Virgin Galactic, and co-founded an organization dedicated to combating wildfires on the West Coast.

**It’s fair to say that I’m not your typical politician, and I don't plan on running a typical campaign either.**

For starters, I think if you're running to serve the community, that should be reflected in _how_ you campaign. Candidates can do better than spend millions of dollars (of your hard-earned contributions!) on TV ads and mailers that only serve their bottom line. And while it's important to get our message out, there's no reason we can't provide a public service along the way.

I also believe we have a responsibility to reject the hyper-partisan noise we're used to seeing on cable news and actually engage on the issues that matter. On the trail, I'm having conversations about creating renewable energy jobs, improving our education system, climate change, and health care. I'll never shy away from tough conversations, and I won't write anyone off because they're conservative or disillusioned with the process.

**[In that spirit, I'd love to hear from you. Please take a moment to share your thoughts about our campaign, the issues we face as a nation, or anything else that's on your mind. I take your feedback very seriously.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63917431/408423454/-623126329?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTBiODYzNS1iNGZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fy6VAIq2uCpQjyJF9Y1EqVxCmleAJ7-YnFoncH3mbkM=&emci=070b8635-b4fc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=090b8635-b4fc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=36198509)**

---

I look forward to reading your responses.

George

Right now, we’re coming up on the May end-of-month fundraising deadline, and to compete with the special interests who are trying to BUY the White House, we have to end the month with big numbers! (But since I know Crooked Joe really isn’t making life easy for you right now, if you’re doing poorly, please do not contribute. Everything will change when your favorite President is back in the White House. I promise you – the best is yet to come!) Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

body:
The election will be here before we know it.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63918289/408425620/-1153878952?refcode=EM_FR_230527EOM1_DK_90DO_3_NG_A_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTY3NjFlNjQtYjdmYy1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TJ8TlU1uJGM-xy0NERYYvy3WNmobhyKP1JgWnQt2nK4=)
Fellow Democrats, by this time next year, the 2024 election cycle will be in full swing.

A year may seem like a long time, but preparation is the key to success. If we do not set our foundations now, we will be behind when it matters most.

Recruiting and supporting strong Democratic candidates. Supporting our county parties’ efforts to expand Democratic infrastructures throughout the state. Making sure we have trained Precinct Committeepersons and appointed Election Judges. These are just a few of the ways we’re already building for success.

**[Every month, we have the opportunity to strengthen these efforts, and build up the momentum for the Blue Wave we need in 2024. With the end of the month just around the corner, I'm asking you to be an early donor to our $4,000 end-of-the-month goal. subject: this won’t take long

body:
| | | Fellow American,
**FIRST,** my leftist opponent launched a lie-filled campaign about me.

**THEN,** he SMASHED fundraising records in the first few months of his campaign. **[NOW, I’m calling on you to help us step up and defend this seat.](http://links.gopwin.org/u/click?_t=880bb7f57f984ec39ea5a13773012007&_m=c65e4a461a64468886b23719787abafc&_e=KulPc_7BN8yA48lNFH7SD6WU4dLKJl2ETysXJw8yQxdeC7Va_nE23PwcJ7B7Z-GcmHuJHw8sqeYaI6lWztjrHfG1MVLL3Mx1PPZgWOVPjNppzdS6tKGJueJdVCTjctBeA-gkeWWDjr3GpJAuiZxW6HxjibNuAyV3kH6h5mlve2ZsibGG_kMA48Mt5yssJ-cI0oejgovQATV__DZJhmR6jTp9DgliB4ZH4tLAESVuhPm6AxPHo8u6ToWnoWX0LUHBpH9fLZw8RGTsHe0Sgt3TQW3PH45mjltNVCOr_Nc_MLgxXwTjW6MfD8qQNRyDcvO1uVg6mKnv48CrF0MKyJPHVpuNdDjoCSt1_OOmEysI95Z9Fh-En_2NsjTmTNsL5bhb5bVPnPGzOtzZVtem059gQA%3D%3D)** High-profile Democrats are lining up to give millions to my opponent and steal this seat for the radical Left.

**If we’re going to catch up, we need to act quickly. Our end-of-month deadline is just four days away, and I’m calling on my most dedicated patriots to help us meet our critical goal. **

We can’t wait until 2024 to put our mission to defend this seat in motion - we have to act now.

body:
Michelle and Barack Obama know the critical importance of coming together to create change – now they’re calling on you | | |
---
| | **The GOP has spent decades building state power, gerrymandering districts, and propelling their anti-American agenda across the country. From gutting abortion access to infringing on LGBTQ+ rights, state Republicans have become a one-stop shop for advancing the far-right agenda in state after state.** But state Democrats are right on their heels. They’re doing everything in their power to ensure these extremist policies don’t come to fruition. Even the Obamas have sounded the alarm: [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrEVrmg704gBEN_dmOvXSpLPc7n1xnyOXV6dlCZuvFXEfW5FiY29QYhSlb_PH7oV16rbVmFhNVldBEizCifJ77GTfBakwLmiTQIF6dl2w76lL1FwlBXf3JdKupCkEyDdVRM8m_US5CJQlcIM0qsBdqnRjLxDpjd52UffIHFqD4T5kqUS-GktmcOHfAiijgpHzSKTslu1xIRF8MaC9k-Bx-2W0kaEAnnE_NLIYBllqyUf6O3TAQSvJW9UdVgl8T7ZRuN0o2zGbCRJ2JqQqJQ_vhLzEFhO1nsqQ7FYEQd5Q0KxsKtBbBPe7daX3IWVzshnHhi1Ix2AB1ZtF6sn1s0dlxlJg0qjUWN5v-g98HVIMby1C-cP1vfoRqK141G0HvzaFpBnP9ywP_0QR9HHHet2c_ytnTgLyzFKmEzQW0e7I4-Aj2wMNpG1d_ZDsSU8g-rJjvycgo04mZu29X7rEtoI5jRX7vF83pWAFINuTCXbQt8paepcSGWok7JFDOdzZKdFBIZNghNdpE0sLg5h2A5N1auw/3wj/mAS9ozTVRYOkb4JfwqTT9A/h0/jk5MozDHJBo5HziAq0dm1Mujf3V99woyEcdJ694EpwU) Former President Barack Obama and former First Lady Michelle Obama know just how critical coming together right now to rally behind Democrats is. That’s why they’re calling on members of this community – yes, you! – to help fight Republican extremism across the country. clean_body: Michelle and Barack Obama know the critical importance of coming together to create change – now they’re calling on you | | | | | The GOP has spent decades building state power, gerrymandering districts, and propelling their anti-American agenda across the country. From gutting abortion access to infringing on LGBTQ+ rights, state Republicans have become a one-stop shop for advancing the far-right agenda in state after state. But state Democrats are right on their heels. They’re doing everything in their power to ensure these extremist policies don’t come to fruition. Even the Obamas have sounded the alarm: Former President Barack Obama and former First Lady Michelle Obama know just how critical coming together right now to rally behind Democrats is. subject: If Bob Casey slips in the polls, it’s GAME OVER!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
And if we lose Senators like Casey, our Senate majority will crumble...
| There are three things you need to know ASAP about our fight to save our Senate majority:

1️⃣ **We’re defending 23 Senate seats** – and if we lose a single one, our Senate majority will collapse!

2️⃣ **Senator Bob Casey is one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for re-election.** _If he starts slipping in the polls, it’s GAME OVER!_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46194?t=6&akid=7970%2E878179%2EBYICNv) 3️⃣ **We’re launching our SWING STATE SENATE FUND** to defend Democrats like Bob Casey and keep the Senate out of MAGA Mitch McConnell’s hands!

[States like Pennsylvania are critical to saving our Senate majority – and if we fall behind now, the MAGA machine will run right over us. Please, don’t let tonight’s deadline pass by: Rush $7 to keep Democrats like Bob Casey soaring ahead! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46194?t=7&akid=7970%2E878179%2EBYICNv) **SWING STATE SENATE FUND: $7,000 || DEADLINE: 11:59 PM** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46195?t=8&akid=7970%2E878179%2EBYICNv)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7970%2E878179%2EBYICNv). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7970%2E878179%2EBYICNv).**

Hello,
There are critical updates in the campaign against Lauren Boebert.
__**FIRST:**__ Adam Frisch lost to Lauren Boebert in 2022 by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country.
__**THEN:**__ Adam announced that he is running again in a rematch against Boebert, giving us our best chance ever to kick her out of Congress – and the first poll shows a TIED race!
__**BUT NOW:**__ **With just days left until our critical end-of-May fundraising deadline, we are still $68,327 short of our $250,000 goal and what we need to defeat Lauren Boebert.**
None of the pundits gave Adam a chance last time. Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight predicted Boebert would win by over 45,000 votes. But with Lauren Boebert now on notice, her far-right allies are already on the attack.
**We need to hit our $250,000 goal if we’re going to win, but Adam’s not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. We’re counting on grassroots donors like you to give now to defeat Lauren Boebert:**

clean_body: There are critical updates in the campaign against Lauren Boebert. Hello, There are critical updates in the campaign against Lauren Boebert. FIRST: Adam Frisch lost to Lauren Boebert in 2022 by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. THEN: Adam announced that he is running again in a rematch against Boebert, giving us our best chance ever to kick her out of Congress – and the first poll shows a TIED race! BUT NOW: With just days left until our critical end-of-May fundraising deadline, we are still $68,327 short of our $250,000 goal and what we need to defeat Lauren Boebert. None of the pundits gave Adam a chance last time. Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight predicted Boebert would win by over 45,000 votes. But with Lauren Boebert now on notice, her far-right allies are already on the attack. We need to hit our $250,000 goal if we’re going to win, but Adam’s not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: Josh Hawley: “control of the Senate could come down to this seat”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter — Josh Hawley is starting to panic.
**Just read what he told his top donors in a message about his race against Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat:**
**_“Let me be clear: control of the Senate COULD come down to this seat...”_**
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33524?refcode=em20230527-3147&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3147%2E614464%2ExJ0USW)**
After showing himself to be a fraud and a coward on January 6th and failing Missourians in the U.S. Senate, Josh Hawley made himself one of the most vulnerable GOP Senators up for re-election this cycle — and it shows.
**IN MARCH:** An approval poll showed Hawley underwater with Missourians — a net-negative rating and drawing “intensely negative sentiment” from 39% of Missouri voters compared to only 26% who feel strongly favorable.
**IN APRIL:** After months of desperate attacks from Hawley’s insider friends at the National Republican Senatorial Committee, our campaign managed to outraise Hawley’s by nearly 2-1 in the most recent fundraising quarter.
**AND THEN:** Some of Hawley’s top supporters are now refusing to support him this cycle — including Big Tech billionaire Peter Thiel, who’s donated hundreds of thousands of dollars to Hawley’s previous election bids and reportedly said he won’t support any Republicans this cycle due to their out-of-touch culture wars.
**All of this means we have a real opportunity to defeat Josh Hawley and take Missouri’s Senate seat back for the people next year, but it’s not going to be easy.**
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33524?refcode=em20230527-3147&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3147%2E614464%2ExJ0USW)**
**GOP insiders at the National Republican Senatorial Committee are doing everything in their power to make Josh Hawley look strong.** They launched one of their very first attack ads this cycle against Lucas Kunce and — on the very last day of the most recent FEC fundraising quarter — used their joint committee with Hawley to transfer _$250,000_ directly to his campaign.
If these are the kind of resources they’re willing to spend to tear down our campaign in the off-year, it’s only a matter of time before they start spending even more to ramp up their attacks and put Hawley’s campaign in the position to win.
**That’s why we need your help today, Peter.** Lucas launched this campaign early so we’d have time to raise the kind of money we need to mount a serious challenge to a corrupt, incumbent politician like Hawley and get our positive vision for Missouri in front of voters as soon, and as often, as possible.
**[So please, will you rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to our grassroots movement to elect Lucas Kunce? Our best shot at building a winning campaign is keeping up our record-breaking momentum — and we need your support to do it.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33524?refcode=em20230527-3147&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3147%2E614464%2ExJ0USW)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33525?refcode=em20230527-3147&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=3147%2E614464%2ExJ0USW) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33525?refcode=em20230527-3147&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=3147%2E614464%2ExJ0USW) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33525?refcode=em20230527-3147&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=3147%2E614464%2ExJ0USW) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33525?refcode=em20230527-3147&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=3147%2E614464%2ExJ0USW) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33525?refcode=em20230527-3147&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=3147%2E614464%2ExJ0USW) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33525?refcode=em20230527-3147&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=3147%2E614464%2ExJ0USW) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33524?refcode=em20230527-3147&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3147%2E614464%2ExJ0USW)
---
Thank you,
— Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230527-3147-footer&t=11&refcode2=3147_614464_xJ0USW&akid=3147%2E614464%2ExJ0USW)**

body:
Peter, this is important.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63919543/408429373/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDZiMGRmZi1iOWZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_z53M1Za9JLbdR-XBg7v6EERA-B6p7BotCKFuS6-vV0=)
---
Peter, May is almost over and that means AAPI Month is also coming to a close. But before the month ends, I wanted to send one more message on this topic.

**In the past few years, we’ve seen unprecedented levels of violence against Asian and Asian American people across our country.**

[**Will you add your name to join me in standing against Asian hate and fight for equality and safety? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63919545/408429375/-1884104647?refcode=MTFC_20230527_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDZiMGRmZi1iOWZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_z53M1Za9JLbdR-XBg7v6EERA-B6p7BotCKFuS6-vV0=&emci=32506ad2-fdfb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=306b0dff-b9fc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18839602) | [SIGN ON NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63919546/408429377/-1884104647?refcode=MTFC_20230527_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDZiMGRmZi1iOWZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_z53M1Za9JLbdR-XBg7v6EERA-B6p7BotCKFuS6-vV0=&emci=32506ad2-fdfb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=306b0dff-b9fc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18839602)
---
We must ensure we’re accurately documenting hate crimes against Asian Americans, listening to the voices and perspectives of AAPI communities, and starting a dialogue about this often overlooked problem.

Fortunately, many of these steps are already underway. **But there's so much more we must do.**

[**So Peter, I need to ask again -- will you stand with me and add your name to our pledge to Stop Asian Hate? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63919548/408429378/-1884104647?refcode=MTFC_20230527_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDZiMGRmZi1iOWZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_z53M1Za9JLbdR-XBg7v6EERA-B6p7BotCKFuS6-vV0=&emci=32506ad2-fdfb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=306b0dff-b9fc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18839602)
[SIGN ON NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63919558/408429382/-1884104647?refcode=MTFC_20230527_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDZiMGRmZi1iOWZjLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_z53M1Za9JLbdR-XBg7v6EERA-B6p7BotCKFuS6-vV0=&emci=32506ad2-fdfb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=306b0dff-b9fc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18839602)
---
I’m proud to be a strong advocate for AAPI communities. In fact, recently, my bill, the VALOR Act, passed the House – this legislation ensures Korean-American veterans who served during the Vietnam War get the access to VA care they deserve.

**I’ve always fought against Asian Hate and advocated for AAPI equality and that work won’t end just because AAPI Month does.**

Sincerely,

Mark Takano
| | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517

clean_body: Peter, this is important. | = Peter, May is almost over and that means AAPI Month is also coming to a close. But before the month ends, I wanted to send one more message on this topic. In the past few years, we’ve seen unprecedented levels of violence against Asian and Asian American people across our country. | We must ensure we’re accurately documenting hate crimes against Asian Americans, listening to the voices and perspectives of AAPI communities, and starting a dialogue about this often overlooked problem. Fortunately, many of these steps are already underway. But there's so much more we must do. I’m proud to be a strong advocate for AAPI communities. In fact, recently, my bill, the VALOR Act, passed the House – this legislation ensures Korean-American veterans who served during the Vietnam War get the access to VA care they deserve. I’ve always fought against Asian Hate and advocated for AAPI equality and that work won’t end just because AAPI Month does. Sincerely, Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. Hey there, it's Greg.

I hate to bother you over Memorial Day weekend, but I wanted to reach out personally to let you know why you may be receiving more emails than usual over the next few days.

**This Wednesday at midnight is our May end-of-month deadline, and according to my finance team, we’re still running about $6,500 behind our goal.**_I’ll explain more in a moment, but first:_

name: Sen. Cory Booker
subject: We need to support Joe and Kamala with everything we have:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I’m going to do everything in my power to reelect Joe and Kamala on November 5, 2024. Are you with me? | | |
---
Peter, Throughout my life and my career, I’ve had one guiding principle: _Love._ There’s no such thing as too much love -- it’s what keeps folks safe, gives us hope in dark moments, and inspires us to keep building the America we know is possible. I’ve made it my mission -- and I hope you’ll make it yours too, Peter -- to turn that care and concern into real action. That action extends beyond my service in the U.S. Senate -- it motivates me every day to help elect more leaders who put the interests of the American people before their own. Leaders like Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. **It’s why I was proud to join the Biden-Harris campaign’s National Advisory Board earlier this month, and why I’m going to do everything in my power to reelect Joe and Kamala in 2024. But I can’t do it alone, so I’m asking:** **[Will you join me in supporting Joe and Kamala’s campaign by becoming a Founding Donor today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZolpNtnxhhD-1AkF4SxfyYkjCYJCv2caeuzF8aIRa567iKShiHcEX15Dz0isqWqzS9XIwk_Cy5rFCUqmy7jDhVTG6qv0umpLvCwNdKxgssqdOdYWeyUsnqGcGMQV_aqo4jpUQGqxCDUPcApMgo9O9HP0CJR94jMGxBD38lNaZyvRBkFJa4S_G2ms62EfuQkks7qmwQiKvMg9hiarez2I_px7MkCBRrivbb7N7suhV5j0L7xWnT8PiR5Ujs0cEd8yLwp3PZBoxvogDC0TOYMDE24livgyzwQ4NkiAl1ABvh8KsN9VN3NqrApLBFx-FWgWR7ju08tsoazAM-2Gr_Z2fqwano0AOj55z5_-Dk2JPH8B6dzzRW2Ihs7ZNE7rvbIT6QDXMhNuxGByUOFMDqWCSWf70UXogeJQVNYDgw_WBf5E8k5fhBC2B6dOi3ITwfuy5arH1HwWxD-TCRVuhOaCJxg/3wj/boNn_DB3TG6vKVJUx8sw2g/h0/4TQ4Pi2hnvDCP8AgGPjxsT1vDjj9_nU4e8JNzTQApuU)**

Joe and Kamala lead with compassion and empathy -- and, yes, love too. They recognize that we’re all better off when we fight for one another, when we work together to create a country we can all be proud of.
Whether it’s passing the _Inflation Reduction Act_ to lower costs for working families or helping create more than 12 million jobs, they’re working every day to build, as the late Congresswoman Barbara Jordan once said, “an America as good as its promise.”
**But it'll take all of us coming together to finish the job. So I’m asking:**
**[Will you chip in any amount to become a Founding Donor to Joe and Kamala’s reelection campaign today? We need to support them with everything we have.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZolpNtnxhhD-1AkF4SxfyYkjCYJCv2caeuzF8aIRa567iKShiHcEX15Dz0isqWqzS9XIwk_Cy5rFCUqmy7jDhVSRlPMl2ba_XJ-2t2_58TccIeexHu0CFp-HOJ-VYdz2AXzyIqs6cdaVuPVwHWJBYgEgYT_l8gHHFaAvlbRKhbTeO01C-1aRvpoUP1-rNhMGwJqO8DpwilvB75hF2eofNg2iD3-cUrk83ssH7_AtyV10aFrccfrXT5Y_Nqx_EbuzBkarv-_R1CjT6bpzuK0csMCrPkp_-JJLYB59ceq1wTi1HjeUkzq7di-j4lR6r4lrLhQNeO1qYPiS74LpY9D7vpeJb8Cqzbjdmhi78bBOMrwZPjH8VqQKoDglY1G9_9RDdZ99iO4_hHIufzyZx_FrmAtw-jriZjjuwH8P-xUJAQfmC73x4HG9Ze5SCxwO8b-NMfghUOuddkhniVEDn-nkmmA/3wj/boNn_DB3TG6vKVJUx8sw2g/h7/Y9olus-1L-eezbmnIpfV4uaCi1ePP-JKtLCbL367Eho)**

clean_body: I’m going to do everything in my power to reelect Joe and Kamala on November 5, 2024. Are you with me? | | | Peter, Throughout my life and my career, I’ve had one guiding principle: Love. There’s no such thing as too much love -- it’s what keeps folks safe, gives us hope in dark moments, and inspires us to keep building the America we know is possible. I’ve made it my mission -- and I hope you’ll make it yours too, Peter -- to turn that care and concern into real action. That action extends beyond my service in the U.S. Senate -- it motivates me every day to help elect more leaders who put the interests of the American people before their own. Leaders like Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. It’s why I was proud to join the Biden-Harris campaign’s National Advisory Board earlier this month, and why I’m going to do everything in my power to reelect Joe and Kamala in 2024. But I can’t do it alone, so I’m asking: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Joe and Kamala lead with compassion and empathy -- and, yes, love too. They recognize that we’re all better off when we fight for one another, when we work together to create a country we can all be proud of. Whether it’s passing the Inflation Reduction Act to lower costs for working families or helping create more than 12 million jobs, they’re working every day to build, as the late Congresswoman Barbara Jordan once said, “an America as good as its promise.” But it'll take all of us coming together to finish the job. So I’m asking: Thanks for being a part of this team. With love and gratitude, Cory Cory Booker U.S. Senator, New Jersey

On Wednesday, I was on the scene outside Ron DeSantis' failed announcement for President at the swanky Four Seasons Hotel in Miami. While the announcement was broadcast on a bug-ridden Twitter Space hosted by Elon Musk, and moderated by Big Tech investor David Sacks, the in-person event was infested with rich elites and establishment RINOS who were salivating over the prospect of DeSantis becoming their puppet in the White House.
Tickets to attend his announcement in person reportedly ran for a cool $5,000.
But, outside the event is where the real grassroots voters made their voices heard.
Trump supporters showed up outside of the Four Seasons where they protested to make it clear that DeSantis is a fraud, and that President Donald Trump is the only choice for America First in 2024.
I reported on the scene and even made an appearance on Roger Stone's show, The StoneZONE, which you can [watch here](https://substack.com/redirect/b7d3dd9c-e97b-4ed8-b757-eefc69685376?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b7d3dd9c-e97b-4ed8-b757-eefc69685376?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Perhaps one of the most recognizable faces outside the event was Maurice Symonette of Blacks for Trump, who has become incredibly well known due to him attending virtually every Trump rally, usually sitting directly behind President Trump holding his signature "Blacks for Trump" sign.
I caught up with him and his group outside the Four Seasons Hotel, and he didn't mince words when explaining why he was there to oppose Ron DeSantis.
"I'm here to destroy DeSantis because he's a bastard from Hell," adding that "I'm here to let [DeSantis] know that I helped you only because Trump actually asked us to go out and help him."

body:
Checking in to see if you can help.
#
Derek, we’re always transparent with our team, so here it goes:
We just checked ActBlue, and we’re nearly $40,000 behind where we were last month.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230527-1?refcode=em20230527-1-8389&refcode2=8389_434096_-yQ_-S&akid=8389%2E434096%2E-yQ_-S)
_Us sprinting to catch up_ ☝️
It’s critical that we keep supporting John’s work in the Senate, so we’re checking in to see if there’s *any* donation you can make toward our end-of-month fundraising goal. **[Can we ask you to chip in anything now — even $3 — to close the gap?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230527-1?refcode=em20230527-1-8389&refcode2=8389_434096_-yQ_-S&akid=8389%2E434096%2E-yQ_-S)**

It's going to take a surge to get back on track, but if you and just two more folks from 18326 chip in today, we'll take a big stride closer to our goal.
—Team Fetterman HQ 💛

| Hi there, it’s Tamie. There’s a lot at stake in my race against Jim Jordan and I really need your help.

Our critical End-of-Month deadline is just 4 days away, _and my finance team says May fundraising has slowed to a near-halt._

If we have a poor showing right as this race is heating up, crooked Jim Jordan will buy his way to victory with the help of his ultra-wealthy MAGA mega-donors.

**_We can’t let that happen!_**

[I’m not just running to defeat Jim Jordan — I’m running to put an end to Trumpism and save the House from far-right extremism once and for all. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7968%2E878179%2EBqVhNA). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7968%2E878179%2EBqVhNA).**

But it’s going to take all of us working together

Team – Across the country, Republican politicians are escalating their efforts to undermine our elections.

They’re making it harder for voters to pass ballot measures protecting reproductive freedom.

They’re restricting young people’s access to the ballot box.

They’re asking courts to overrule precedent to enable partisan gerrymandering.

They’ve even expelled duly elected lawmakers from legislative bodies.

**But in spite of these mounting assaults on democracy, Attorney General Eric Holder is not losing faith – and neither are we.** | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63932953/408442947/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230527_FR_5DD_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNlM2E4ODJjLWNiZmMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GB9ejYCe0wdENx0agVNz-JTqWSvwiQH_wDKCWRFPVGI=)

clean_body: But it’s going to take all of us working together | Team – Across the country, Republican politicians are escalating their efforts to undermine our elections. They’re making it harder for voters to pass ballot measures protecting reproductive freedom. They’re restricting young people’s access to the ballot box. They’re asking courts to overrule precedent to enable partisan gerrymandering. They’ve even expelled duly elected lawmakers from legislative bodies. But in spite of these mounting assaults on democracy, Attorney General Eric Holder is not losing faith – and neither are we. | = = Team, we have the power to defend our democracy from those who seek to subvert it. But it’s going to take all of us working together. That means you have a choice to make in this moment: You can tune out and let Republicans get away with their plans to undermine our elections – which is exactly what will happen if folks stop paying attention. Or, you can double down on your commitment to building a fairer and more representative democracy by pitching in now to support the NDRC. Are you with us, team? Then please, donate now: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The NDRC is committed to doing everything in our power to defend democracy, but the bottom line is that we cannot do it alone. = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: Imagine a country where Republicans can’t buy elections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2325%2E5257348%2Ex8y6Rb ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, if you imagine a government without the Senate
filibuster, a different vision of the country begins to take shape.

A government where Mitch McConnell can’t unilaterally block a vote on
abortion rights, gun safety, the minimum wage, voting rights, climate, or
universal health care.

Where legislation doesn’t fail because it only won 59 votes out of 100.
(How absurd is that?)

Where voters pick their representatives, not the other way around.

Where partisan gerrymandering no longer hands Kevin McCarthy the House
majority, and nonpartisan commissions draw fair maps for every district
like we do in California.

Where Super PACs cannot spend unlimited amounts of money, where
corporations cannot make political contributions, and where big money
donors can’t hide in the dark. (To be honest, we probably wouldn’t have to
send as many emails to compete).

Added together, a very different picture begins to take shape.

Of a country that no longer suffers daily from mass shootings.

A country where you can access an abortion no matter which state you live
in.

A country where you can afford to go to college without taking on massive
debt.

A country with enough affordable housing, clean energy, clean air, and
clean water.

Adam has been on the frontlines of the fight for our democracy. And to fix
our democracy, we need to fix the Senate. That’s why Adam is running.

To not only take action on important issues, but on how the Senate itself
functions. Because the current gridlock impacts the lives of every
Californian and every American — and it needs to change.

name: Kal, Digital Coordinator (RonBeGone!)
subject: I left Florida because of Ron DeSantis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
| Hi, my name is Kal and I’m a digital coordinator here at Ron Be Gone.

I lived in Florida my entire life. I went to school there, my entire family is there, and _everything I’ve ever known is there._ **I’m also trans.**

At every turn, Ron DeSantis has worked to restrict bodily autonomy: New laws restrict gender affirming care for adults, and halt access to desperately needed medical care – _despite DeSantis claiming Florida is a “free state.”_

**This week, I left my entire life behind in Florida because of what Ron DeSantis has done to my community – and if he takes over America, there’s nowhere left to turn.**

[**So I’m asking you personally to chip in $3 to Ron Be Gone today – we’re on the frontlines in the fight against Ron DeSantis, and your support will be put to use _immediately_ in our efforts to keep DeSantis out of the White House and ensure the rest of the country never experiences what he’s done to Florida.**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17609?t=7&akid=1830%2E564421%2EgXC8XD) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17615?t=13&akid=1830%2E564421%2EgXC8XD)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17616?t=14&akid=1830%2E564421%2EgXC8XD)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17617?t=15&akid=1830%2E564421%2EgXC8XD)
I can’t thank you enough for your support,

Kal, Digital Coordinator
Ron Be Gone
| | Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc.
(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

MAGA Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst Governor in America and an utter nightmare for Floridians. He is relentless in his praise for Donald Trump, he completely botched Florida's pandemic response and put lives at risk, and he gave scarce COVID vaccines to his major campaign donors instead of the most vulnerable Floridians. He MUST be defeated in the next election. We know for sure that Donald Trump is going to go ALL OUT to help DeSantis win, so we need to start fighting back today by building a massive coalition of good Democratic supporters.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution to beat Ron DeSantis by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/118?t=1&akid=1830%2E564421%2EgXC8XD). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and ensure that we can implement our entire strategy to crush Ron DeSantis, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/119?t=2&akid=1830%2E564421%2EgXC8XD).**

[Click here](https://act.ronbegone.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1830%2E564421%2EgXC8XD) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.ronbegone.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=16&akid=1830%2E564421%2EgXC8XD). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Beat Ron DeSantis »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/120?t=4&akid=1830%2E564421%2EgXC8XD)

name: Jane Fonda
subject: How you can help end the era of fossil fuels:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
People across the country are mobilizing June 8-11 to send a clear message to the Biden administration that now is the time to act on fossil fuels.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63933657/408445738/-1917331050?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmNTNlMzA1LWQyZmMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j1Snz0MIawmofr4oiaq1P6fD0tMtgQU87RlDpJf4TbQ=&emci=e93c17ce-d3fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5f53e305-d2fc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)

| Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I’m reaching out with an important message: people across the country are mobilizing June 8-11 to send a clear message to the Biden administration that now is the time to act on fossil fuels.

In 2020, President Biden promised to be a climate president and begin to phase out fossil fuels. While he has secured some key climate victories, he continues to approve new fossil fuel projects that put us on a dangerous path.

[_**It’s time to take action, team. Join our partners in the climate movement for a national week of action from June 8 - 11 to demand President Biden act now to help end the era of fossil fuels.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63933658/408445739/-1221753512?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmNTNlMzA1LWQyZmMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j1Snz0MIawmofr4oiaq1P6fD0tMtgQU87RlDpJf4TbQ=&emci=e93c17ce-d3fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5f53e305-d2fc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)

All of the actions will be unique, volunteer-lead events. Click the link below to find an action near you, or consider hosting your own!
---
| [JOIN NOW! ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63933659/408445740/-1221753512?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmNTNlMzA1LWQyZmMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j1Snz0MIawmofr4oiaq1P6fD0tMtgQU87RlDpJf4TbQ=&emci=e93c17ce-d3fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5f53e305-d2fc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)

We need to put pressure on President Biden to use his executive powers to declare a climate emergency and stop approving new oil and gas drilling projects. There is so much at stake as frontline communities bear the brunt of the effects of climate change, we cannot sit idly by.

[_**That’s why I’m asking you to join the national week of climate action to demand President Biden do his part in the fight to end the era of fossil fuels.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63933660/408445741/-1221753512?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmNTNlMzA1LWQyZmMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j1Snz0MIawmofr4oiaq1P6fD0tMtgQU87RlDpJf4TbQ=&emci=e93c17ce-d3fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5f53e305-d2fc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)

clean_body: People across the country are mobilizing June 8-11 to send a clear message to the Biden administration that now is the time to act on fossil fuels. | | Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I’m reaching out with an important message: people across the country are mobilizing June 8-11 to send a clear message to the Biden administration that now is the time to act on fossil fuels. In 2020, President Biden promised to be a climate president and begin to phase out fossil fuels. While he has secured some key climate victories, he continues to approve new fossil fuel projects that put us on a dangerous path. All of the actions will be unique, volunteer-lead events. Click the link below to find an action near you, or consider hosting your own! | We need to put pressure on President Biden to use his executive powers to declare a climate emergency and stop approving new oil and gas drilling projects. There is so much at stake as frontline communities bear the brunt of the effects of climate change, we cannot sit idly by. | Let’s fight like hell to protect our planet, Jane Fonda P.S. If you would like to show your support to the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and support our organizing efforts, = | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Cecile Richards
subject: I'm going to take Trump at his word
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63934186/408448329/-498614040?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2613-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwMWMxNjhiLWRhZmMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zadaAyIp9E1-JdHS4feUSmIpVDZtdqzN9uG9WIa-st4=) **For once, I have to take Trump at his word, friend: **

We know Republicans want to end abortion entirely in America, **and Trump recently indicated that if elected president again in 2024, he would consider signing into law legislation BANNING abortions nationwide.**

Look, Republicans already have made abortion care essentially illegal in 14 states – and with this court case on the abortion pill mifepristone, they're trying to end the most common form of abortion in America.
Republican leaders are taking every opportunity to push their anti-choice agenda, strip away our reproductive freedoms and ban abortion in every form. **But we won't go down without a fight. If we want to prevent a Trump presidency, we have to act NOW.**
That's why I'm working with American Bridge, and why I'm calling on you to help us raise $15,000 today to defeat anti-abortion Republicans around the country. **[Will you rush a $15 donation or more today to help us hold Donald Trump's Republicans accountable and prevent them from banning abortion nationwide?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63934187/408448330/-498614040?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2613-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwMWMxNjhiLWRhZmMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zadaAyIp9E1-JdHS4feUSmIpVDZtdqzN9uG9WIa-st4=)**

body:

### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **

### ** Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared:**
* **[61,000 pounds of explosive chemical](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alijujt-trhiujldw-y/)** is missing from a train.
* **[Printing error on ballots](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alijujt-trhiujldw-j/)** makes everyone a democrat.
* **[What the heck](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alijujt-trhiujldw-t/)** is Fetterman wearing?
* **[$3 Billion](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alijujt-trhiujldw-i/)** mistake in Ukraine Aid.
* **[Senators are being issued satellite phones](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alijujt-trhiujldw-d/)** for disruptive event.
* **[Target partnered](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alijujt-trhiujldw-h/)** with a Satanist brand; **[parents are boycotting](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alijujt-trhiujldw-k/)!**
* Ron DeSantis is **[running for President](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alijujt-trhiujldw-u/)**. Trump **[didn't take it well](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alijujt-trhiujldw-o/).**
* Ford puts **[safety first](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alijujt-trhiujldw-x/).**
* Target has found itself on the**[refuse-to-buy list](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alijujt-trhiujldw-m/).**
* Another company**[wants to go broke](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alijujt-trhiujldw-c/).**

### **How Could He Say That?**
Ron**[DeSantis fired back at former President Trump](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alijujt-trhiujldw-q/) **after he claimed former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, a Democrat, "did better" in his COVID-19 response despite Cuomo's infamous nursing home scandal.
### **Biden Lies Again**
U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) [**claimed that the U.S. government doesn 't financially support illegal immigrants, while federal dollars continue to fund nonprofits helping illegal migrants.**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alijujt-trhiujldw-a/) **He's a Disaster** CNN delivered**["horrible news" for Biden](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alijujt-trhiujldw-f/) **as the network's latest polling offered a grim forecast ahead of his 2024 reelection bid. Governor Ron DeSantis has never backed down from a tough fight. He's a native Floridian with blue-collar roots, played baseball at Yale, and graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. name: Colin Allred
subject: Friend, this race is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Francisco Aguilar [https://secure
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
Friend, I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me. I'd love to take a moment to explain why.
I'm a fourth-generation Texan. I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-allred-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_052723_b2_colin-surrogate_30ac&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-allred-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_052723_b2_colin-surrogate_30ac&amount=10]
Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-allred-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_052723_b2_colin-surrogate_30ac&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-allred-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_052723_b2_colin-surrogate_30ac&amount=10]
After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights. I've watched this fundamental right be attacked and eroded my whole life – right here in Texas we have some of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, and it's no secret that these laws target Black and brown voters.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-allred-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_052723_b2_colin-surrogate_30ac&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-allred-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_052723_b2_colin-surrogate_30ac&amount=10]
It was one of the great honors of my life that one of my heroes and a voting rights and American giant, Congressman John Lewis, joined me on the campaign trail in 2018. I beat the odds – and an 11-term GOP incumbent – to win that race and help Democrats flip the House. Now I'm ready to do it again and replace Ted Cruz in the U.S. Senate – but I need your help. That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between my campaign and DASS today → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-allred-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_052723_b2_colin-surrogate_30ac&amount=10]
DONATE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-allred-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_052723_b2_colin-surrogate_30ac&amount=5]
We've all watched for 10 years as Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas repeatedly. He's bowed down to Donald Trump, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories about the 2020 elections, cheered on the rioters that stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6 and abandoned our state while Texans froze in the dark. To add insult to injury, after we passed critical voting rights legislation in the House, he spearheaded the effort to kill it in the Senate.
Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. That's not me. I'm running for Senate to be a voice for all Texans, for families like yours and mine, and I hope you'll help me get there, friend. Because the truth is, unseating Ted Cruz won't be easy. It's possible, if we all work together and amass a grassroots movement like Texas has never seen, but I need you with me.
So please, will you split a donation of $5, $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and DASS to help me defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar makes a difference in our battleground race, and I truly appreciate it → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-allred-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_052723_b2_colin-surrogate_30ac&amount=10]
DONATE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-allred-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_052723_b2_colin-surrogate_30ac&amount=5]
Thanks for reading my story – and for being on my team. I can't tell you what it means to have you with me in this fight from the very beginning.
Colin Allred
DONATE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-allred-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_052723_b2_colin-surrogate_30ac&amount=5]

Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions.
Please donate anything you can today to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/skdk-dasspac-email-footer-062022?&refcode=DASS_EM_Ask_06132022&amount=5]
CHIP IN $5 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/skdk-dasspac-email-footer-062022?&refcode=DASS_EM_FOOTER_BUTTON_06132022&amount=5]
This email was sent to: Democrats Only. The only way our work is possible is through grassroots activists like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails from us, please click here. [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/less-emails?source=DASS_EM_Footer_Less-Emails_06132022] If you no longer wish to receive emails to defeat Trump's Big Lie puppets, click here to unsubscribe: https://action.demsofstate.org/a/unsub?unsubscribedata=iCrsmXDos5YYJBvfNRF%2BJzGsaSAB%2B9DQ3fVhmnFywyrlEb87v2jrpWL9F86d6xWgVPxuTc1Ku8E8ui2RanH2I2JcWnd%2BNqXDftYt0Ij5VuJAwTm5w7uHY2ULWEXBAbjoMCh7WdOjCBUPFmN6sflcBP0ZikG2tNFcyMEFitqkf1GKGrOZTsL7LVH6CWJiY%2FUzp7MnLJPDZ4zW5k9OXjcjczP7VG5qk%2Fd2m7xOkqTl721DJonLIS0yBaxz8Yl%2Fw5V9I7AqhFvefWYO8Oibi9o%2BSoNsuILgBDRqzDbMFpAAEF8CN1fQfQzpQ9K5kI3biTItET0ynueZSkzxxPV3Gq%2F%2FkaqcP88i2E%2FRs0kIZr3%2FAbMRTBaPqr47geW29QwkE7VvNd780xIS5c15jN%2BC3db%2BIxtBkffbfttV9OGIjeYQ%2FjEP9BFj5gNaQ2%2BTq7RkdLT%2B

I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter. [] After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights. I've watched this fundamental right be attacked and eroded my whole life – right here in Texas we have some of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, and it's no secret that these laws target Black and brown voters. [] It was one of the great honors of my life that one of my heroes and a voting rights and American giant, Congressman John Lewis, joined me on the campaign trail in 2018. I beat the odds – and an 11-term GOP incumbent – to win that race and help Democrats flip the House. Now I'm ready to do it again and replace Ted Cruz in the U.S. Senate – but I need your help. That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between my campaign and DASS today → [] DONATE >> [] We've all watched for 10 years as Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas repeatedly. He's bowed down to Donald Trump, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories about the 2020 elections, cheered on the rioters that stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6 and abandoned our state while Texans froze in the dark. To add insult to injury, after we passed critical voting rights legislation in the House, he spearheaded the effort to kill it in the Senate. Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. That's not me. I'm running for Senate to be a voice for all Texans, for families like yours and mine, and I hope you'll help me get there, friend. Because the truth is, unseating Ted Cruz won't be easy. It's possible, if we all work together and amass a grassroots movement like Texas has never seen, but I need you with me. So please, will you split a donation of $5, $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and DASS to help me defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar makes a difference in our battleground race, and I truly appreciate it → [] DONATE >> [] Thanks for reading my story – and for being on my team. I can't tell you what it means to have you with me in this fight from the very beginning. Colin Allred DONATE >> [] Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions. Please donate anything you can today to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda: [] CHIP IN $5 >> []

With the help of this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers and holding onto every single majority. **But we can’t stop now.**
We’re already preparing for our next big fight – state Democrats have a slew of special elections in the next month, and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November. President Obama is calling out the importance of Democratic leadership in the states – it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to listen to him and help elect state Democrats now. **By renewing your 2023 DLCC membership _today_ you can help pave a path for Democratic wins this year and beyond. **
**As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight against state Republicans’ extremist agenda, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. So, can we count you in?**

name: Barbara Lee
subject: Can you believe that's me? [photo enclosed]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8ajY9mn2xhgsp4Yc1Sq89UrORm0yRIGPi7On0mTREoXpV0ttJTH46CQVUb0frg_qSAWIv_phYQcY9tccOKvEuVwfWHEe6Xt3pJrkw3nQLvq4BuFDsII-1My9hriKo4GQxUTK8z_iXePu6C1twGQckGptsjq1bZs6u1iP7UsRDYJNYJFIdn4wfG-xr-i7cSmSjvIB4O35N687NrPC0hP5omAEaX_Y9YaAzxjrygm1MdfLsUpxsewA6zvhJqz8QXyJ8uEdoFrRZ6w1yAXBTw4VpogCeERfEpAv5BdomX3xwHRsnAy4zniIRbnY_uevUCX-pc-aZFP_wuC_rCXIdBWXJnA/3wj/qZNZkS7aRweEwMBcvdos-w/h0/eSjNcUZXd8zFhFBxUDiu3nuunhNrJeBW9DRUiX0UR1Q) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wcVmDVfjroFVbol-C41V4cmHjMvWOD5NwNTo6pkCi84PKbUWnIJPgDzETGlz4pffcrBrAjmhKhd0qrKAeW1cU1VNavAX6MI6z0qftwyVsX3OKC25xh87TbX-kTNa1Wz5jktM71VEB_ar-oDPzm-iqNNkCF3X_TCIiVbC25jtbWlxTPHVakdVRNHla7zHar8XKl3hWPXc3ptHy9bAZbj9JNKu3v8lXnlkoNkC5owMC4-3n_NfsxdkEkAwKVDI5gbMsQ8PxGWEXrn7P0AMVEYrV9qKk0MM1xqNeT34a7oPYGfIm9uZWSIjxWCw70J0ECjiPtpCQtiFSi2hrU-LHDSOrCIg61pUEXL_JjQZUvE8hoMbtZu0-du1FfUrJyyd4-92xhelHUIplcUzT3J3bzi-zX4bsODPP0Fv5s-UDyzMdDlMe0kqgdf4YGteC7PvZ6Ap4/3wj/qZNZkS7aRweEwMBcvdos-w/h1/8n9NKYfqSt4843SGo2z2v02fYnCwIAjNWpXv-Q4SH1M) Peter, that's me you're looking at.

I was born in El Paso, Texas, during the height of segregation. My father served as a lieutenant colonel in WWII and the Korean War. My mother worked at the USO and was the first Black clerical worker in Fort Bliss.

And yet, despite all the service that my parents provided for our nation, despite all of the racial barriers that they shattered, we were still forbidden to drink out of the same water fountains as white folks. We were still seen as lesser.

And maybe I would've believed that sentiment if I didn't have a mother as dedicated to equality as mine was. From a young age, my mother taught me that if people refuse to make a place for me at the table, I'll just have to make one for myself.

**And that is a lesson I have carried with me my entire life.**

When I was in high school and was told I couldn't join the cheerleading squad because it was exclusively for white girls, I partnered with the NAACP and became my school's _first_ Black cheerleader.

When I went on to become the president of Mills College's Black Student Union and had the honor of meeting Shirley Chisholm, our nation's FIRST African American congresswoman, I was driven by Congresswoman Chisholm's mentorship to seek out a life of public service in D.C. It's there that I began a decades long career on Capitol Hill – working from an intern all the way up to one day following in Chisholm's footsteps and becoming a congresswoman.

**Peter, it's that lesson that led me to the decision to run for Senate now, where there are currently _no_ Black women serving.**

But this fight is proving to be _anything_ but easy. Between Fox News smearing my record to attempt to weaken my legacy and the GOP raising _millions_ to keep deeply progressive candidates like me out of the Senate, I can only do this with your help.

[So _please_ , Peter: Can I count on you to split a contribution of $10 or more between my campaign and The Collective PAC to help me make up my steep fundraising deficit and send me to the Senate? With many California voters still undecided, this is _anyone's_ race, and I need your help to tip the odds in my favor. ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wcVmDVfjroFVbol-C41V4cmHjMvWOD5NwNTo6pkCi84PKbUWnIJPgDzETGlz4pffcrBrAjmhKhd0qrKAeW1cU1VNavAX6MI6z0qftwyVsX3OKC25xh87TbX-kTNa1Wz5jktM71VEB_ar-oDPzm-iqNNkCF3X_TCIiVbC25jtbWl5UFytRl3N9krEzkt1iX66QqKO4IuGTRo-RfadLqvjCXygyifwzN44AAkVPioDjd_ad7NU3n-q8T3Rsx1tU6057ZyGv5G9f3TMzmkkwhGxEa-YJA51woL1G2dcO4nk6eB8yYqkQ4_YSE8UTmap41_6Mj6pE-k0QyCGaZ3gLvbBHLeghb20pg9kaZu_issceTtEeTF6vYPVXAgUFFjWUJr-0Un9mjWk2Qti4K2cxLRyawphAS_3zTHCze2M4AvQQl3xMwVV-RVFFRkz9CllW3AAg/3wj/qZNZkS7aRweEwMBcvdos-w/h2/_SRX7ec_tzmp7exDd2ZaUHnQvMHFuWDcDx1Diu9Fl98) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Barbara Lee and The Collective PAC.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, that's me you're looking at. I was born in El Paso, Texas, during the height of segregation. My father served as a lieutenant colonel in WWII and the Korean War. My mother worked at the USO and was the first Black clerical worker in Fort Bliss. And yet, despite all the service that my parents provided for our nation, despite all of the racial barriers that they shattered, we were still forbidden to drink out of the same water fountains as white folks. We were still seen as lesser. And maybe I would've believed that sentiment if I didn't have a mother as dedicated to equality as mine was. From a young age, my mother taught me that if people refuse to make a place for me at the table, I'll just have to make one for myself. And that is a lesson I have carried with me my entire life. When I was in high school and was told I couldn't join the cheerleading squad because it was exclusively for white girls, I partnered with the NAACP and became my school's first Black cheerleader. When I went on to become the president of Mills College's Black Student Union and had the honor of meeting Shirley Chisholm, our nation's FIRST African American congresswoman, I was driven by Congresswoman Chisholm's mentorship to seek out a life of public service in D.C. It's there that I began a decades long career on Capitol Hill – working from an intern all the way up to one day following in Chisholm's footsteps and becoming a congresswoman. Peter, it's that lesson that led me to the decision to run for Senate now, where there are currently no Black women serving. But this fight is proving to be anything but easy. Between Fox News smearing my record to attempt to weaken my legacy and the GOP raising millions to keep deeply progressive candidates like me out of the Senate, I can only do this with your help. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Barbara Lee and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you for taking this trip down memory lane with me. Barbara Lee The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.
